2449 int len = utfc_ptr2len(regparse);
2450 if (utf_char2len(startc) != len) {
2451 // composing chars
2452 startc = -1;
2453 }
2454 while (--len >= 0) {
2455 regc(*regparse++);
2456 }
2457 }
2458 }
2459 regc(NUL'\000');
2460 prevchr_len = 1; /* last char was the ']' */
2461 if (*regparse != ']')
2462 EMSG_RET_NULL(_(e_toomsbra))return (emsg((char_u *)(gettext((char *)(e_toomsbra)))), rc_did_emsg
= 1, (void *)((void*)0)); /* Cannot happen? */
2463 skipchr(); /* let's be friends with the lexer again */
2464 *flagp |= HASWIDTH0x1 | SIMPLE0x2;
2465 break;
2466 } else if (reg_strict)
2467 EMSG2_RET_NULL(_(e_missingbracket), reg_magic > MAGIC_OFF)return (emsgf((const char *) ((gettext((char *)(e_missingbracket
)))), ((reg_magic > 2) ? "" : "\\")), rc_did_emsg = 1, (void
*)((void*)0));
2468 }
2469 FALLTHROUGH{} __attribute__((fallthrough));
2470
2471 default:
2472 {
2473 int len;
2474
2475 /* A multi-byte character is handled as a separate atom if it's
2476 * before a multi and when it's a composing char. */
2477 if (use_multibytecode(c)) {
2478do_multibyte:
2479 ret = regnode(MULTIBYTECODE200);
2480 regmbc(c);
2481 *flagp |= HASWIDTH0x1 | SIMPLE0x2;
2482 break;
2483 }
2484
2485 ret = regnode(EXACTLY5);
2486
2487 /*
2488 * Append characters as long as:
2489 * - there is no following multi, we then need the character in
2490 * front of it as a single character operand
2491 * - not running into a Magic character
2492 * - "one_exactly" is not set
2493 * But always emit at least one character. Might be a Multi,
2494 * e.g., a "[" without matching "]".
2495 */
2496 for (len = 0; c != NUL'\000' && (len == 0
2497 || (re_multi_type(peekchr()) == NOT_MULTI0
2498 && !one_exactly
2499 && !is_Magic(c)((c) < 0))); ++len) {
2500 c = no_Magic(c);
2501 {
2502 regmbc(c);
2503 {
2504 int l;
2505
2506 /* Need to get composing character too. */
2507 for (;; ) {
2508 l = utf_ptr2len(regparse);
2509 if (!UTF_COMPOSINGLIKE(regparse, regparse + l)utf_composinglike((regparse), (regparse + l)))
2510 break;
2511 regmbc(utf_ptr2char(regparse));
2512 skipchr();
2513 }
2514 }
2515 }
2516 c = getchr();
2517 }
2518 ungetchr();
2519
2520 regc(NUL'\000');
2521 *flagp |= HASWIDTH0x1;
2522 if (len == 1)
2523 *flagp |= SIMPLE0x2;
2524 }
2525 break;
2526 }
2527
2528 return ret;
2529}
2530
2531/// Used in a place where no * or \+ can follow.
2532static bool_Bool re_mult_next(char *what)
2533{
2534 if (re_multi_type(peekchr()) == MULTI_MULT2) {
2535 EMSG2_RET_FAIL(_("E888: (NFA regexp) cannot repeat %s"), what)return (emsgf((const char *) ((gettext((char *)("E888: (NFA regexp) cannot repeat %s"
)))), ((what) ? "" : "\\")), rc_did_emsg = 1, 0);
2536 }
2537 return true1;
2538}
2539
2540// Return true if MULTIBYTECODE should be used instead of EXACTLY for
2541// character "c".
2542static bool_Bool use_multibytecode(int c)
2543{
2544 return utf_char2len(c) > 1
2545 && (re_multi_type(peekchr()) != NOT_MULTI0
2546 || utf_iscomposing(c));
2547}
2548
2549/*
2550 * Emit a node.
2551 * Return pointer to generated code.
2552 */
2553static char_u *regnode(int op)
2554{
2555 char_u *ret;
2556
2557 ret = regcode;
2558 if (ret == JUST_CALC_SIZE((char_u *) -1))
2559 regsize += 3;
2560 else {
2561 *regcode++ = op;
2562 *regcode++ = NUL'\000'; /* Null "next" pointer. */
2563 *regcode++ = NUL'\000';
2564 }
2565 return ret;
2566}
2567
2568/*
2569 * Emit (if appropriate) a byte of code
2570 */
2571static void regc(int b)
2572{
2573 if (regcode == JUST_CALC_SIZE((char_u *) -1))
2574 regsize++;
2575 else
2576 *regcode++ = b;
2577}
2578
2579/*
2580 * Emit (if appropriate) a multi-byte character of code
2581 */
2582static void regmbc(int c)
2583{
2584 if (regcode == JUST_CALC_SIZE((char_u *) -1)) {
2585 regsize += utf_char2len(c);
2586 } else {
2587 regcode += utf_char2bytes(c, regcode);
2588 }
2589}
2590
2591/*
2592 * Insert an operator in front of already-emitted operand
2593 *
2594 * Means relocating the operand.
2595 */
2596static void reginsert(int op, char_u *opnd)
2597{
2598 char_u *src;
2599 char_u *dst;
2600 char_u *place;
2601
2602 if (regcode == JUST_CALC_SIZE((char_u *) -1)) {
2603 regsize += 3;
2604 return;
2605 }
2606 src = regcode;
2607 regcode += 3;
2608 dst = regcode;
2609 while (src > opnd)
2610 *--dst = *--src;
2611
2612 place = opnd; /* Op node, where operand used to be. */
2613 *place++ = op;
2614 *place++ = NUL'\000';
2615 *place = NUL'\000';
2616}
2617
2618/*
2619 * Insert an operator in front of already-emitted operand.
2620 * Add a number to the operator.
2621 */
2622static void reginsert_nr(int op, long val, char_u *opnd)
2623{
2624 char_u *src;
2625 char_u *dst;
2626 char_u *place;
2627
2628 if (regcode == JUST_CALC_SIZE((char_u *) -1)) {
2629 regsize += 7;
2630 return;
2631 }
2632 src = regcode;
2633 regcode += 7;
2634 dst = regcode;
2635 while (src > opnd)
2636 *--dst = *--src;
2637
2638 place = opnd; /* Op node, where operand used to be. */
2639 *place++ = op;
2640 *place++ = NUL'\000';
2641 *place++ = NUL'\000';
2642 assert(val >= 0 && (uintmax_t)val <= UINT32_MAX)((void) sizeof ((val >= 0 && (uintmax_t)val <= (
4294967295U)) ? 1 : 0), __extension__ ({ if (val >= 0 &&
(uintmax_t)val <= (4294967295U)) ; else __assert_fail ("val >= 0 && (uintmax_t)val <= UINT32_MAX"
, "../src/nvim/regexp.c", 2642, __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__
); }));
2643 re_put_uint32(place, (uint32_t)val);
2644}
2645
2646/*
2647 * Insert an operator in front of already-emitted operand.
2648 * The operator has the given limit values as operands. Also set next pointer.
2649 *
2650 * Means relocating the operand.
2651 */
2652static void reginsert_limits(int op, long minval, long maxval, char_u *opnd)
2653{
2654 char_u *src;
2655 char_u *dst;
2656 char_u *place;
2657
2658 if (regcode == JUST_CALC_SIZE((char_u *) -1)) {
2659 regsize += 11;
2660 return;
2661 }
2662 src = regcode;
2663 regcode += 11;
2664 dst = regcode;
2665 while (src > opnd)
2666 *--dst = *--src;
2667
2668 place = opnd; /* Op node, where operand used to be. */
2669 *place++ = op;
2670 *place++ = NUL'\000';
2671 *place++ = NUL'\000';
2672 assert(minval >= 0 && (uintmax_t)minval <= UINT32_MAX)((void) sizeof ((minval >= 0 && (uintmax_t)minval <=
(4294967295U)) ? 1 : 0), __extension__ ({ if (minval >= 0
&& (uintmax_t)minval <= (4294967295U)) ; else __assert_fail
("minval >= 0 && (uintmax_t)minval <= UINT32_MAX"
, "../src/nvim/regexp.c", 2672, __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__
); }));
2673 place = re_put_uint32(place, (uint32_t)minval);
2674 assert(maxval >= 0 && (uintmax_t)maxval <= UINT32_MAX)((void) sizeof ((maxval >= 0 && (uintmax_t)maxval <=
(4294967295U)) ? 1 : 0), __extension__ ({ if (maxval >= 0
&& (uintmax_t)maxval <= (4294967295U)) ; else __assert_fail
("maxval >= 0 && (uintmax_t)maxval <= UINT32_MAX"
, "../src/nvim/regexp.c", 2674, __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__
); }));
2675 place = re_put_uint32(place, (uint32_t)maxval);
2676 regtail(opnd, place);
2677}
2678
2679/*
2680 * Write a four bytes number at "p" and return pointer to the next char.
2681 */
2682static char_u *re_put_uint32(char_u *p, uint32_t val)
2683{
2684 *p++ = (char_u) ((val >> 24) & 0377);
2685 *p++ = (char_u) ((val >> 16) & 0377);
2686 *p++ = (char_u) ((val >> 8) & 0377);
2687 *p++ = (char_u) (val & 0377);
2688 return p;
2689}
2690
2691// Set the next-pointer at the end of a node chain.
2692static void regtail(char_u *p, char_u *val)
2693{
2694 int offset;
2695
2696 if (p == JUST_CALC_SIZE((char_u *) -1)) {
2697 return;
2698 }
2699
2700 // Find last node.
2701 char_u *scan = p;
2702 for (;; ) {
2703 char_u *temp = regnext(scan);
2704 if (temp == NULL((void*)0)) {
2705 break;
2706 }
2707 scan = temp;
2708 }
2709
2710 if (OP(scan)((int)*(scan)) == BACK4) {
2711 offset = (int)(scan - val);
2712 } else {
2713 offset = (int)(val - scan);
2714 }
2715 // When the offset uses more than 16 bits it can no longer fit in the two
2716 // bytes available. Use a global flag to avoid having to check return
2717 // values in too many places.
2718 if (offset > 0xffff) {
2719 reg_toolong = true1;
2720 } else {
2721 *(scan + 1) = (char_u)(((unsigned)offset >> 8) & 0377);
2722 *(scan + 2) = (char_u)(offset & 0377);
2723 }
2724}
2725
2726/*
2727 * Like regtail, on item after a BRANCH; nop if none.
2728 */
2729static void regoptail(char_u *p, char_u *val)
2730{
2731 /* When op is neither BRANCH nor BRACE_COMPLEX0-9, it is "operandless" */
2732 if (p == NULL((void*)0) || p == JUST_CALC_SIZE((char_u *) -1)
2733 || (OP(p)((int)*(p)) != BRANCH3
2734 && (OP(p)((int)*(p)) < BRACE_COMPLEX140 || OP(p)((int)*(p)) > BRACE_COMPLEX140 + 9)))
2735 return;
2736 regtail(OPERAND(p)((p) + 3), val);
2737}
2738
2739/*
2740 * Functions for getting characters from the regexp input.
2741 */
2742
2743/*
2744 * Start parsing at "str".
2745 */
2746static void initchr(char_u *str)
2747{
2748 regparse = str;
2749 prevchr_len = 0;
2750 curchr = prevprevchr = prevchr = nextchr = -1;
2751 at_start = true1;
2752 prev_at_start = false0;
2753}
2754
2755/*
2756 * Save the current parse state, so that it can be restored and parsing
2757 * starts in the same state again.
2758 */
2759static void save_parse_state(parse_state_T *ps)
2760{
2761 ps->regparse = regparse;
2762 ps->prevchr_len = prevchr_len;
2763 ps->curchr = curchr;
2764 ps->prevchr = prevchr;
2765 ps->prevprevchr = prevprevchr;
2766 ps->nextchr = nextchr;
2767 ps->at_start = at_start;
2768 ps->prev_at_start = prev_at_start;
2769 ps->regnpar = regnpar;
2770}
2771
2772/*
2773 * Restore a previously saved parse state.
2774 */
2775static void restore_parse_state(parse_state_T *ps)
2776{
2777 regparse = ps->regparse;
2778 prevchr_len = ps->prevchr_len;
2779 curchr = ps->curchr;
2780 prevchr = ps->prevchr;
2781 prevprevchr = ps->prevprevchr;
2782 nextchr = ps->nextchr;
2783 at_start = ps->at_start;
2784 prev_at_start = ps->prev_at_start;
2785 regnpar = ps->regnpar;
2786}
2787
2788
2789/*
2790 * Get the next character without advancing.
2791 */
2792static int peekchr(void)
2793{
2794 static int after_slash = false0;
2795
2796 if (curchr != -1) {
2797 return curchr;
2798 }
2799
2800 switch (curchr = regparse[0]) {
2801 case '.':
2802 case '[':
2803 case '~':
2804 /* magic when 'magic' is on */
2805 if (reg_magic >= MAGIC_ON3)
2806 curchr = Magic(curchr)((int)(curchr) - 256);
2807 break;
2808 case '(':
2809 case ')':
2810 case '{':
2811 case '%':
2812 case '+':
2813 case '=':
2814 case '?':
2815 case '@':
2816 case '!':
2817 case '&':
2818 case '|':
2819 case '<':
2820 case '>':
2821 case '#': /* future ext. */
2822 case '"': /* future ext. */
2823 case '\'': /* future ext. */
2824 case ',': /* future ext. */
2825 case '-': /* future ext. */
2826 case ':': /* future ext. */
2827 case ';': /* future ext. */
2828 case '`': /* future ext. */
2829 case '/': /* Can't be used in / command */
2830 /* magic only after "\v" */
2831 if (reg_magic == MAGIC_ALL4)
2832 curchr = Magic(curchr)((int)(curchr) - 256);
2833 break;
2834 case '*':
2835 /* * is not magic as the very first character, eg "?*ptr", when
2836 * after '^', eg "/^*ptr" and when after "\(", "\|", "\&". But
2837 * "\(\*" is not magic, thus must be magic if "after_slash" */
2838 if (reg_magic >= MAGIC_ON3
2839 && !at_start
2840 && !(prev_at_start && prevchr == Magic('^')((int)('^') - 256))
2841 && (after_slash
2842 || (prevchr != Magic('(')((int)('(') - 256)
2843 && prevchr != Magic('&')((int)('&') - 256)
2844 && prevchr != Magic('|')((int)('|') - 256))))
2845 curchr = Magic('*')((int)('*') - 256);
2846 break;
2847 case '^':
2848 /* '^' is only magic as the very first character and if it's after
2849 * "\(", "\|", "\&' or "\n" */
2850 if (reg_magic >= MAGIC_OFF2
2851 && (at_start
2852 || reg_magic == MAGIC_ALL4
2853 || prevchr == Magic('(')((int)('(') - 256)
2854 || prevchr == Magic('|')((int)('|') - 256)
2855 || prevchr == Magic('&')((int)('&') - 256)
2856 || prevchr == Magic('n')((int)('n') - 256)
2857 || (no_Magic(prevchr) == '('
2858 && prevprevchr == Magic('%')((int)('%') - 256)))) {
2859 curchr = Magic('^')((int)('^') - 256);
2860 at_start = true1;
2861 prev_at_start = false0;
2862 }
2863 break;
2864 case '$':
2865 /* '$' is only magic as the very last char and if it's in front of
2866 * either "\|", "\)", "\&", or "\n" */
2867 if (reg_magic >= MAGIC_OFF2) {
2868 char_u *p = regparse + 1;
2869 bool_Bool is_magic_all = (reg_magic == MAGIC_ALL4);
2870
2871 // ignore \c \C \m \M \v \V and \Z after '$'
2872 while (p[0] == '\\' && (p[1] == 'c' || p[1] == 'C'
2873 || p[1] == 'm' || p[1] == 'M'
2874 || p[1] == 'v' || p[1] == 'V'
2875 || p[1] == 'Z')) {
2876 if (p[1] == 'v') {
2877 is_magic_all = true1;
2878 } else if (p[1] == 'm' || p[1] == 'M' || p[1] == 'V') {
2879 is_magic_all = false0;
2880 }
2881 p += 2;
2882 }
2883 if (p[0] == NUL'\000'
2884 || (p[0] == '\\'
2885 && (p[1] == '|' || p[1] == '&' || p[1] == ')'
2886 || p[1] == 'n'))
2887 || (is_magic_all
2888 && (p[0] == '|' || p[0] == '&' || p[0] == ')'))
2889 || reg_magic == MAGIC_ALL4) {
2890 curchr = Magic('$')((int)('$') - 256);
2891 }
2892 }
2893 break;
2894 case '\\':
2895 {
2896 int c = regparse[1];
2897
2898 if (c == NUL'\000')
2899 curchr = '\\'; /* trailing '\' */
2900 else if (
2901 c <= '~' && META_flags[c]
2902 ) {
2903 /*
2904 * META contains everything that may be magic sometimes,
2905 * except ^ and $ ("\^" and "\$" are only magic after
2906 * "\V"). We now fetch the next character and toggle its
2907 * magicness. Therefore, \ is so meta-magic that it is
2908 * not in META.
2909 */
2910 curchr = -1;
2911 prev_at_start = at_start;
2912 at_start = false0; // be able to say "/\*ptr"
2913 regparse++;
2914 after_slash++;
2915 (void)peekchr();
2916 regparse--;
2917 after_slash--;
2918 curchr = toggle_Magic(curchr);
2919 } else if (vim_strchr(REGEXP_ABBR, c)) {
2920 /*
2921 * Handle abbreviations, like "\t" for TAB -- webb
2922 */
2923 curchr = backslash_trans(c);
2924 } else if (reg_magic == MAGIC_NONE1 && (c == '$' || c == '^'))
2925 curchr = toggle_Magic(c);
2926 else {
2927 /*
2928 * Next character can never be (made) magic?
2929 * Then backslashing it won't do anything.
2930 */
2931 curchr = utf_ptr2char(regparse + 1);
2932 }
2933 break;
2934 }
2935
2936 default:
2937 curchr = utf_ptr2char(regparse);
2938 }
2939
2940 return curchr;
2941}
2942
2943/*
2944 * Eat one lexed character. Do this in a way that we can undo it.
2945 */
2946static void skipchr(void)
2947{
2948 /* peekchr() eats a backslash, do the same here */
2949 if (*regparse == '\\')
2950 prevchr_len = 1;
2951 else
2952 prevchr_len = 0;
2953 if (regparse[prevchr_len] != NUL'\000') {
2954 // Exclude composing chars that utfc_ptr2len does include.
2955 prevchr_len += utf_ptr2len(regparse + prevchr_len);
2956 }
2957 regparse += prevchr_len;
2958 prev_at_start = at_start;
2959 at_start = false0;
2960 prevprevchr = prevchr;
2961 prevchr = curchr;
2962 curchr = nextchr; /* use previously unget char, or -1 */
2963 nextchr = -1;
2964}
2965
2966/*
2967 * Skip a character while keeping the value of prev_at_start for at_start.
2968 * prevchr and prevprevchr are also kept.
2969 */
2970static void skipchr_keepstart(void)
2971{
2972 int as = prev_at_start;
2973 int pr = prevchr;
2974 int prpr = prevprevchr;
2975
2976 skipchr();
2977 at_start = as;
2978 prevchr = pr;
2979 prevprevchr = prpr;
2980}
2981
2982/*
2983 * Get the next character from the pattern. We know about magic and such, so
2984 * therefore we need a lexical analyzer.
2985 */
2986static int getchr(void)
2987{
2988 int chr = peekchr();
2989
2990 skipchr();
2991 return chr;
2992}
2993
2994/*
2995 * put character back. Works only once!
2996 */
2997static void ungetchr(void)
2998{
2999 nextchr = curchr;
3000 curchr = prevchr;
3001 prevchr = prevprevchr;
3002 at_start = prev_at_start;
3003 prev_at_start = false0;
3004
3005 /* Backup regparse, so that it's at the same position as before the
3006 * getchr(). */
3007 regparse -= prevchr_len;
3008}
3009
3010/*
3011 * Get and return the value of the hex string at the current position.
3012 * Return -1 if there is no valid hex number.
3013 * The position is updated:
3014 * blahblah\%x20asdf
3015 * before-^ ^-after
3016 * The parameter controls the maximum number of input characters. This will be
3017 * 2 when reading a \%x20 sequence and 4 when reading a \%u20AC sequence.
3018 */
3019static int64_t gethexchrs(int maxinputlen)
3020{
3021 int64_t nr = 0;
3022 int c;
3023 int i;
3024
3025 for (i = 0; i < maxinputlen; ++i) {
3026 c = regparse[0];
3027 if (!ascii_isxdigit(c))
3028 break;
3029 nr <<= 4;
3030 nr |= hex2nr(c);
3031 ++regparse;
3032 }
3033
3034 if (i == 0)
3035 return -1;
3036 return nr;
3037}
3038
3039/*
3040 * Get and return the value of the decimal string immediately after the
3041 * current position. Return -1 for invalid. Consumes all digits.
3042 */
3043static int64_t getdecchrs(void)
3044{
3045 int64_t nr = 0;
3046 int c;
3047 int i;
3048
3049 for (i = 0;; ++i) {
3050 c = regparse[0];
3051 if (c < '0' || c > '9')
3052 break;
3053 nr *= 10;
3054 nr += c - '0';
3055 ++regparse;
3056 curchr = -1; /* no longer valid */
3057 }
3058
3059 if (i == 0)
3060 return -1;
3061 return nr;
3062}
3063
3064/*
3065 * get and return the value of the octal string immediately after the current
3066 * position. Return -1 for invalid, or 0-255 for valid. Smart enough to handle
3067 * numbers > 377 correctly (for example, 400 is treated as 40) and doesn't
3068 * treat 8 or 9 as recognised characters. Position is updated:
3069 * blahblah\%o210asdf
3070 * before-^ ^-after
3071 */
3072static int64_t getoctchrs(void)
3073{
3074 int64_t nr = 0;
3075 int c;
3076 int i;
3077
3078 for (i = 0; i < 3 && nr < 040; i++) { // -V536
3079 c = regparse[0];
3080 if (c < '0' || c > '7')
3081 break;
3082 nr <<= 3;
3083 nr |= hex2nr(c);
3084 ++regparse;
3085 }
3086
3087 if (i == 0)
3088 return -1;
3089 return nr;
3090}
3091
3092/*
3093 * Get a number after a backslash that is inside [].
3094 * When nothing is recognized return a backslash.
3095 */
3096static int coll_get_char(void)
3097{
3098 int64_t nr = -1;
3099
3100 switch (*regparse++) {
3101 case 'd': nr = getdecchrs(); break;
3102 case 'o': nr = getoctchrs(); break;
3103 case 'x': nr = gethexchrs(2); break;
3104 case 'u': nr = gethexchrs(4); break;
3105 case 'U': nr = gethexchrs(8); break;
3106 }
3107 if (nr < 0 || nr > INT_MAX2147483647) {
3108 // If getting the number fails be backwards compatible: the character
3109 // is a backslash.
3110 regparse--;
3111 nr = '\\';
3112 }
3113 return nr;
3114}
3115
3116/*
3117 * read_limits - Read two integers to be taken as a minimum and maximum.
3118 * If the first character is '-', then the range is reversed.
3119 * Should end with 'end'. If minval is missing, zero is default, if maxval is
3120 * missing, a very big number is the default.
3121 */
3122static int read_limits(long *minval, long *maxval)
3123{
3124 int reverse = false0;
3125 char_u *first_char;
3126 long tmp;
3127
3128 if (*regparse == '-') {
3129 // Starts with '-', so reverse the range later.
3130 regparse++;
3131 reverse = true1;
3132 }
3133 first_char = regparse;
3134 *minval = getdigits_long(&regparse, false0, 0);
3135 if (*regparse == ',') { // There is a comma.
3136 if (ascii_isdigit(*++regparse)) {
3137 *maxval = getdigits_long(&regparse, false0, MAX_LIMIT(32767L << 16L));
3138 } else {
3139 *maxval = MAX_LIMIT(32767L << 16L);
3140 }
3141 } else if (ascii_isdigit(*first_char)) {
3142 *maxval = *minval; // It was \{n} or \{-n}
3143 } else {
3144 *maxval = MAX_LIMIT(32767L << 16L); // It was \{} or \{-}
3145 }
3146 if (*regparse == '\\') {
3147 regparse++; // Allow either \{...} or \{...\}
3148 }
3149 if (*regparse != '}') {
3150 sprintf((char *)IObuff, _("E554: Syntax error in %s{...}")gettext((char *)("E554: Syntax error in %s{...}")),
3151 reg_magic == MAGIC_ALL4 ? "" : "\\");
3152 EMSG_RET_FAIL(IObuff)return (emsg((char_u *)(IObuff)), rc_did_emsg = 1, 0);
3153 }
3154
3155 /*
3156 * Reverse the range if there was a '-', or make sure it is in the right
3157 * order otherwise.
3158 */
3159 if ((!reverse && *minval > *maxval) || (reverse && *minval < *maxval)) {
3160 tmp = *minval;
3161 *minval = *maxval;
3162 *maxval = tmp;
3163 }
3164 skipchr(); /* let's be friends with the lexer again */
3165 return OK1;
3166}
3167
3168/*
3169 * vim_regexec and friends
3170 */
3171
3172/*
3173 * Global work variables for vim_regexec().
3174 */
3175
3176/* Save the sub-expressions before attempting a match. */
3177#define save_se(savep, posp, pp)(rex.reg_match == ((void*)0)) ? save_se_multi((savep), (posp)
) : save_se_one((savep), (pp)) \
3178 REG_MULTI(rex.reg_match == ((void*)0)) ? save_se_multi((savep), (posp)) : save_se_one((savep), (pp))
3179
3180/* After a failed match restore the sub-expressions. */
3181#define restore_se(savep, posp, pp){ if ((rex.reg_match == ((void*)0))) *(posp) = (savep)->se_u
.pos; else *(pp) = (savep)->se_u.ptr; } { \
3182 if (REG_MULTI(rex.reg_match == ((void*)0))) \
3183 *(posp) = (savep)->se_u.pos; \
3184 else \
3185 *(pp) = (savep)->se_u.ptr; }
3186
3187
3188#ifdef REGEXP_DEBUG
3189int regnarrate = 0;
3190#endif
3191
3192// Sometimes need to save a copy of a line. Since alloc()/free() is very
3193// slow, we keep one allocated piece of memory and only re-allocate it when
3194// it's too small. It's freed in bt_regexec_both() when finished.
3195static char_u *reg_tofree = NULL((void*)0);
3196static unsigned reg_tofreelen;
3197
3198// Structure used to store the execution state of the regex engine.
3199// Which ones are set depends on whether a single-line or multi-line match is
3200// done:
3201// single-line multi-line
3202// reg_match &regmatch_T NULL
3203// reg_mmatch NULL &regmmatch_T
3204// reg_startp reg_match->startp <invalid>
3205// reg_endp reg_match->endp <invalid>
3206// reg_startpos <invalid> reg_mmatch->startpos
3207// reg_endpos <invalid> reg_mmatch->endpos
3208// reg_win NULL window in which to search
3209// reg_buf curbuf buffer in which to search
3210// reg_firstlnum <invalid> first line in which to search
3211// reg_maxline 0 last line nr
3212// reg_line_lbr false or true false
3213typedef struct {
3214 regmatch_T *reg_match;
3215 regmmatch_T *reg_mmatch;
3216 char_u **reg_startp;
3217 char_u **reg_endp;
3218 lpos_T *reg_startpos;
3219 lpos_T *reg_endpos;
3220 win_T *reg_win;
3221 buf_T *reg_buf;
3222 linenr_T reg_firstlnum;
3223 linenr_T reg_maxline;
3224 bool_Bool reg_line_lbr; // "\n" in string is line break
3225
3226 // The current match-position is remembered with these variables:
3227 linenr_T lnum; ///< line number, relative to first line
3228 char_u *line; ///< start of current line
3229 char_u *input; ///< current input, points into "regline"
3230
3231 int need_clear_subexpr; ///< subexpressions still need to be cleared
3232 int need_clear_zsubexpr; ///< extmatch subexpressions still need to be
3233 ///< cleared
3234
3235
3236 // Internal copy of 'ignorecase'. It is set at each call to vim_regexec().
3237 // Normally it gets the value of "rm_ic" or "rmm_ic", but when the pattern
3238 // contains '\c' or '\C' the value is overruled.
3239 bool_Bool reg_ic;
3240
3241 // Similar to "reg_ic", but only for 'combining' characters. Set with \Z
3242 // flag in the regexp. Defaults to false, always.
3243 bool_Bool reg_icombine;
3244
3245 // Copy of "rmm_maxcol": maximum column to search for a match. Zero when
3246 // there is no maximum.
3247 colnr_T reg_maxcol;
3248
3249 // State for the NFA engine regexec.
3250 int nfa_has_zend; ///< NFA regexp \ze operator encountered.
3251 int nfa_has_backref; ///< NFA regexp \1 .. \9 encountered.
3252 int nfa_nsubexpr; ///< Number of sub expressions actually being used
3253 ///< during execution. 1 if only the whole match
3254 ///< (subexpr 0) is used.
3255 // listid is global, so that it increases on recursive calls to
3256 // nfa_regmatch(), which means we don't have to clear the lastlist field of
3257 // all the states.
3258 int nfa_listid;
3259 int nfa_alt_listid;
3260
3261 int nfa_has_zsubexpr; ///< NFA regexp has \z( ), set zsubexpr.
3262} regexec_T;
3263
3264static regexec_T rex;
3265static bool_Bool rex_in_use = false0;
3266
3267/*
3268 * "regstack" and "backpos" are used by regmatch(). They are kept over calls
3269 * to avoid invoking malloc() and free() often.
3270 * "regstack" is a stack with regitem_T items, sometimes preceded by regstar_T
3271 * or regbehind_T.
3272 * "backpos_T" is a table with backpos_T for BACK
3273 */
3274static garray_T regstack = GA_EMPTY_INIT_VALUE{ 0, 0, 0, 1, ((void*)0) };
3275static garray_T backpos = GA_EMPTY_INIT_VALUE{ 0, 0, 0, 1, ((void*)0) };
3276
3277/*
3278 * Both for regstack and backpos tables we use the following strategy of
3279 * allocation (to reduce malloc/free calls):
3280 * - Initial size is fairly small.
3281 * - When needed, the tables are grown bigger (8 times at first, double after
3282 * that).
3283 * - After executing the match we free the memory only if the array has grown.
3284 * Thus the memory is kept allocated when it's at the initial size.
3285 * This makes it fast while not keeping a lot of memory allocated.
3286 * A three times speed increase was observed when using many simple patterns.
3287 */
3288#define REGSTACK_INITIAL2048 2048
3289#define BACKPOS_INITIAL64 64
3290
3291#if defined(EXITFREE)
3292void free_regexp_stuff(void)
3293{
3294 ga_clear(&regstack);
3295 ga_clear(&backpos);
3296 xfree(reg_tofree);
3297 xfree(reg_prev_sub);
3298}
3299
3300#endif
3301
3302// Return true if character 'c' is included in 'iskeyword' option for
3303// "reg_buf" buffer.
3304static bool_Bool reg_iswordc(int c)
3305{
3306 return vim_iswordc_buf(c, rex.reg_buf);
3307}
3308
3309/*
3310 * Get pointer to the line "lnum", which is relative to "reg_firstlnum".
3311 */
3312static char_u *reg_getline(linenr_T lnum)
3313{
3314 // when looking behind for a match/no-match lnum is negative. But we
3315 // can't go before line 1
3316 if (rex.reg_firstlnum + lnum < 1) {
3317 return NULL((void*)0);
3318 }
3319 if (lnum > rex.reg_maxline) {
3320 // Must have matched the "\n" in the last line.
3321 return (char_u *)"";
3322 }
3323 return ml_get_buf(rex.reg_buf, rex.reg_firstlnum + lnum, false0);
3324}
3325
3326static regsave_T behind_pos;
3327
3328static char_u *reg_startzp[NSUBEXP10]; /* Workspace to mark beginning */
3329static char_u *reg_endzp[NSUBEXP10]; /* and end of \z(...\) matches */
3330static lpos_T reg_startzpos[NSUBEXP10]; /* idem, beginning pos */
3331static lpos_T reg_endzpos[NSUBEXP10]; /* idem, end pos */
3332
3333// true if using multi-line regexp.
3334#define REG_MULTI(rex.reg_match == ((void*)0)) (rex.reg_match == NULL((void*)0))
3335
3336/*
3337 * Match a regexp against a string.
3338 * "rmp->regprog" is a compiled regexp as returned by vim_regcomp().
3339 * Uses curbuf for line count and 'iskeyword'.
3340 * If "line_lbr" is true, consider a "\n" in "line" to be a line break.
3341 *
3342 * Returns 0 for failure, number of lines contained in the match otherwise.
3343 */
3344static int
3345bt_regexec_nl (
3346 regmatch_T *rmp,
3347 char_u *line, /* string to match against */
3348 colnr_T col, /* column to start looking for match */
3349 bool_Bool line_lbr
3350)
3351{
3352 rex.reg_match = rmp;
3353 rex.reg_mmatch = NULL((void*)0);
3354 rex.reg_maxline = 0;
3355 rex.reg_line_lbr = line_lbr;
3356 rex.reg_buf = curbuf;
3357 rex.reg_win = NULL((void*)0);
3358 rex.reg_ic = rmp->rm_ic;
3359 rex.reg_icombine = false0;
3360 rex.reg_maxcol = 0;
3361
3362 long r = bt_regexec_both(line, col, NULL((void*)0), NULL((void*)0));
3363 assert(r <= INT_MAX)((void) sizeof ((r <= 2147483647) ? 1 : 0), __extension__ (
{ if (r <= 2147483647) ; else __assert_fail ("r <= INT_MAX"
, "../src/nvim/regexp.c", 3363, __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__
); }));
3364 return (int)r;
3365}
3366
3367/// Wrapper around strchr which accounts for case-insensitive searches and
3368/// non-ASCII characters.
3369///
3370/// This function is used a lot for simple searches, keep it fast!
3371///
3372/// @param s string to search
3373/// @param c character to find in @a s
3374///
3375/// @return NULL if no match, otherwise pointer to the position in @a s
3376static inline char_u *cstrchr(const char_u *const s, const int c)
3377 FUNC_ATTR_PURE FUNC_ATTR_WARN_UNUSED_RESULT FUNC_ATTR_NONNULL_ALL
3378 FUNC_ATTR_ALWAYS_INLINE
3379{
3380 if (!rex.reg_ic) {
3381 return vim_strchr(s, c);
3382 }
3383
3384 // Use folded case for UTF-8, slow! For ASCII use libc strpbrk which is
3385 // expected to be highly optimized.
3386 if (c > 0x80) {
3387 const int folded_c = utf_fold(c);
3388 for (const char_u *p = s; *p != NUL'\000'; p += utfc_ptr2len(p)) {
3389 if (utf_fold(utf_ptr2char(p)) == folded_c) {
3390 return (char_u *)p;
3391 }
3392 }
3393 return NULL((void*)0);
3394 }
3395
3396 int cc;
3397 if (ASCII_ISUPPER(c)((unsigned)(c) >= 'A' && (unsigned)(c) <= 'Z')) {
3398 cc = TOLOWER_ASC(c)(((c) < 'A' || (c) > 'Z') ? (c) : (c) + ('a' - 'A'));
3399 } else if (ASCII_ISLOWER(c)((unsigned)(c) >= 'a' && (unsigned)(c) <= 'z')) {
3400 cc = TOUPPER_ASC(c)(((c) < 'a' || (c) > 'z') ? (c) : (c) - ('a' - 'A'));
3401 } else {
3402 return vim_strchr(s, c);
3403 }
3404
3405 char tofind[] = { (char)c, (char)cc, NUL'\000' };
3406 return (char_u *)strpbrk((const char *)s, tofind);
3407}
3408
3409/// Matches a regexp against multiple lines.
3410/// "rmp->regprog" is a compiled regexp as returned by vim_regcomp().
3411/// Uses curbuf for line count and 'iskeyword'.
3412///
3413/// @param win Window in which to search or NULL
3414/// @param buf Buffer in which to search
3415/// @param lnum Number of line to start looking for match
3416/// @param col Column to start looking for match
3417/// @param tm Timeout limit or NULL
3418///
3419/// @return zero if there is no match and number of lines contained in the match
3420/// otherwise.
3421static long bt_regexec_multi(regmmatch_T *rmp, win_T *win, buf_T *buf,
3422 linenr_T lnum, colnr_T col,
3423 proftime_T *tm, int *timed_out)
3424{
3425 rex.reg_match = NULL((void*)0);
3426 rex.reg_mmatch = rmp;
3427 rex.reg_buf = buf;
3428 rex.reg_win = win;
3429 rex.reg_firstlnum = lnum;
3430 rex.reg_maxline = rex.reg_buf->b_ml.ml_line_count - lnum;
3431 rex.reg_line_lbr = false0;
3432 rex.reg_ic = rmp->rmm_ic;
3433 rex.reg_icombine = false0;
3434 rex.reg_maxcol = rmp->rmm_maxcol;
3435
3436 return bt_regexec_both(NULL((void*)0), col, tm, timed_out);
3437}
3438
3439/// Match a regexp against a string ("line" points to the string) or multiple
3440/// lines (if "line" is NULL, use reg_getline()).
3441/// @return 0 for failure, or number of lines contained in the match.
3442static long bt_regexec_both(char_u *line,
3443 colnr_T col, // column to start search
3444 proftime_T *tm, // timeout limit or NULL
3445 int *timed_out) // flag set on timeout or NULL
3446{
3447 bt_regprog_T *prog;
3448 char_u *s;
3449 long retval = 0L;
3450
3451 /* Create "regstack" and "backpos" if they are not allocated yet.
3452 * We allocate *_INITIAL amount of bytes first and then set the grow size
3453 * to much bigger value to avoid many malloc calls in case of deep regular
3454 * expressions. */
3455 if (regstack.ga_data == NULL((void*)0)) {
3456 /* Use an item size of 1 byte, since we push different things
3457 * onto the regstack. */
3458 ga_init(&regstack, 1, REGSTACK_INITIAL2048);
3459 ga_grow(&regstack, REGSTACK_INITIAL2048);
3460 ga_set_growsize(&regstack, REGSTACK_INITIAL2048 * 8);
3461 }
3462
3463 if (backpos.ga_data == NULL((void*)0)) {
3464 ga_init(&backpos, sizeof(backpos_T), BACKPOS_INITIAL64);
3465 ga_grow(&backpos, BACKPOS_INITIAL64);
3466 ga_set_growsize(&backpos, BACKPOS_INITIAL64 * 8);
3467 }
3468
3469 if (REG_MULTI(rex.reg_match == ((void*)0))) {
3470 prog = (bt_regprog_T *)rex.reg_mmatch->regprog;
3471 line = reg_getline((linenr_T)0);
3472 rex.reg_startpos = rex.reg_mmatch->startpos;
3473 rex.reg_endpos = rex.reg_mmatch->endpos;
3474 } else {
3475 prog = (bt_regprog_T *)rex.reg_match->regprog;
3476 rex.reg_startp = rex.reg_match->startp;
3477 rex.reg_endp = rex.reg_match->endp;
3478 }
3479
3480 /* Be paranoid... */
3481 if (prog == NULL((void*)0) || line == NULL((void*)0)) {
3482 IEMSG(_(e_null))iemsg((const char *)(gettext((char *)(e_null))));
3483 goto theend;
3484 }
3485
3486 /* Check validity of program. */
3487 if (prog_magic_wrong())
3488 goto theend;
3489
3490 // If the start column is past the maximum column: no need to try.
3491 if (rex.reg_maxcol > 0 && col >= rex.reg_maxcol) {
3492 goto theend;
3493 }
3494
3495 // If pattern contains "\c" or "\C": overrule value of rex.reg_ic
3496 if (prog->regflags & RF_ICASE1) {
3497 rex.reg_ic = true1;
3498 } else if (prog->regflags & RF_NOICASE2) {
3499 rex.reg_ic = false0;
3500 }
3501
3502 // If pattern contains "\Z" overrule value of rex.reg_icombine
3503 if (prog->regflags & RF_ICOMBINE8) {
3504 rex.reg_icombine = true1;
3505 }
3506
3507 /* If there is a "must appear" string, look for it. */
3508 if (prog->regmust != NULL((void*)0)) {
3509 int c = utf_ptr2char(prog->regmust);
3510 s = line + col;
3511
3512 // This is used very often, esp. for ":global". Use two versions of
3513 // the loop to avoid overhead of conditions.
3514 if (!rex.reg_ic) {
3515 while ((s = vim_strchr(s, c)) != NULL((void*)0)) {
3516 if (cstrncmp(s, prog->regmust, &prog->regmlen) == 0) {
3517 break; // Found it.
3518 }
3519 MB_PTR_ADV(s)(s += utfc_ptr2len((char_u *)s));
3520 }
3521 } else {
3522 while ((s = cstrchr(s, c)) != NULL((void*)0)) {
3523 if (cstrncmp(s, prog->regmust, &prog->regmlen) == 0) {
3524 break; // Found it.
3525 }
3526 MB_PTR_ADV(s)(s += utfc_ptr2len((char_u *)s));
3527 }
3528 }
3529 if (s == NULL((void*)0)) { // Not present.
3530 goto theend;
3531 }
3532 }
3533
3534 rex.line = line;
3535 rex.lnum = 0;
3536 reg_toolong = false0;
3537
3538 /* Simplest case: Anchored match need be tried only once. */
3539 if (prog->reganch) {
3540 int c = utf_ptr2char(rex.line + col);
3541 if (prog->regstart == NUL'\000'
3542 || prog->regstart == c
3543 || (rex.reg_ic
3544 && (utf_fold(prog->regstart) == utf_fold(c)
3545 || (c < 255 && prog->regstart < 255
3546 && mb_tolower(prog->regstart) == mb_tolower(c))))) {
3547 retval = regtry(prog, col, tm, timed_out);
3548 } else {
3549 retval = 0;
3550 }
3551 } else {
3552 int tm_count = 0;
3553 /* Messy cases: unanchored match. */
3554 while (!got_int) {
3555 if (prog->regstart != NUL'\000') {
3556 // Skip until the char we know it must start with.
3557 s = cstrchr(rex.line + col, prog->regstart);
3558 if (s == NULL((void*)0)) {
3559 retval = 0;
3560 break;
3561 }
3562 col = (int)(s - rex.line);
3563 }
3564
3565 // Check for maximum column to try.
3566 if (rex.reg_maxcol > 0 && col >= rex.reg_maxcol) {
3567 retval = 0;
3568 break;
3569 }
3570
3571 retval = regtry(prog, col, tm, timed_out);
3572 if (retval > 0) {
3573 break;
3574 }
3575
3576 // if not currently on the first line, get it again
3577 if (rex.lnum != 0) {
3578 rex.lnum = 0;
3579 rex.line = reg_getline((linenr_T)0);
3580 }
3581 if (rex.line[col] == NUL'\000') {
3582 break;
3583 }
3584 col += (*mb_ptr2lenutfc_ptr2len)(rex.line + col);
3585 // Check for timeout once in a twenty times to avoid overhead.
3586 if (tm != NULL((void*)0) && ++tm_count == 20) {
3587 tm_count = 0;
3588 if (profile_passed_limit(*tm)) {
3589 if (timed_out != NULL((void*)0)) {
3590 *timed_out = true1;
3591 }
3592 break;
3593 }
3594 }
3595 }
3596 }
3597
3598theend:
3599 /* Free "reg_tofree" when it's a bit big.
3600 * Free regstack and backpos if they are bigger than their initial size. */
3601 if (reg_tofreelen > 400) {
3602 XFREE_CLEAR(reg_tofree)do { void **ptr_ = (void **)&(reg_tofree); xfree(*ptr_); *
ptr_ = ((void*)0); (void)(*ptr_); } while (0);
3603 }
3604 if (regstack.ga_maxlen > REGSTACK_INITIAL2048)
3605 ga_clear(&regstack);
3606 if (backpos.ga_maxlen > BACKPOS_INITIAL64)
3607 ga_clear(&backpos);
3608
3609 if (retval > 0) {
3610 // Make sure the end is never before the start. Can happen when \zs
3611 // and \ze are used.
3612 if (REG_MULTI(rex.reg_match == ((void*)0))) {
3613 const lpos_T *const start = &rex.reg_mmatch->startpos[0];
3614 const lpos_T *const end = &rex.reg_mmatch->endpos[0];
3615
3616 if (end->lnum < start->lnum
3617 || (end->lnum == start->lnum && end->col < start->col)) {
3618 rex.reg_mmatch->endpos[0] = rex.reg_mmatch->startpos[0];
3619 }
3620 } else {
3621 if (rex.reg_match->endp[0] < rex.reg_match->startp[0]) {
3622 rex.reg_match->endp[0] = rex.reg_match->startp[0];
3623 }
3624 }
3625 }
3626
3627 return retval;
3628}
3629
3630
3631/*
3632 * Create a new extmatch and mark it as referenced once.
3633 */
3634static reg_extmatch_T *make_extmatch(void)
3635 FUNC_ATTR_NONNULL_RET
3636{
3637 reg_extmatch_T *em = xcalloc(1, sizeof(reg_extmatch_T));
3638 em->refcnt = 1;
3639 return em;
3640}
3641
3642/*
3643 * Add a reference to an extmatch.
3644 */
3645reg_extmatch_T *ref_extmatch(reg_extmatch_T *em)
3646{
3647 if (em != NULL((void*)0))
3648 em->refcnt++;
3649 return em;
3650}
3651
3652/*
3653 * Remove a reference to an extmatch. If there are no references left, free
3654 * the info.
3655 */
3656void unref_extmatch(reg_extmatch_T *em)
3657{
3658 int i;
3659
3660 if (em != NULL((void*)0) && --em->refcnt <= 0) {
3661 for (i = 0; i < NSUBEXP10; ++i)
3662 xfree(em->matches[i]);
3663 xfree(em);
3664 }
3665}
3666
3667/// Try match of "prog" with at rex.line["col"].
3668/// @returns 0 for failure, or number of lines contained in the match.
3669static long regtry(bt_regprog_T *prog,
3670 colnr_T col,
3671 proftime_T *tm, // timeout limit or NULL
3672 int *timed_out) // flag set on timeout or NULL
3673{
3674 rex.input = rex.line + col;
3675 rex.need_clear_subexpr = true1;
3676 // Clear the external match subpointers if necessaey.
3677 rex.need_clear_zsubexpr = (prog->reghasz == REX_SET1);
3678
3679 if (regmatch(prog->program + 1, tm, timed_out) == 0) {
3680 return 0;
3681 }
3682
3683 cleanup_subexpr();
3684 if (REG_MULTI(rex.reg_match == ((void*)0))) {
3685 if (rex.reg_startpos[0].lnum < 0) {
3686 rex.reg_startpos[0].lnum = 0;
3687 rex.reg_startpos[0].col = col;
3688 }
3689 if (rex.reg_endpos[0].lnum < 0) {
3690 rex.reg_endpos[0].lnum = rex.lnum;
3691 rex.reg_endpos[0].col = (int)(rex.input - rex.line);
3692 } else {
3693 // Use line number of "\ze".
3694 rex.lnum = rex.reg_endpos[0].lnum;
3695 }
3696 } else {
3697 if (rex.reg_startp[0] == NULL((void*)0)) {
3698 rex.reg_startp[0] = rex.line + col;
3699 }
3700 if (rex.reg_endp[0] == NULL((void*)0)) {
3701 rex.reg_endp[0] = rex.input;
3702 }
3703 }
3704 /* Package any found \z(...\) matches for export. Default is none. */
3705 unref_extmatch(re_extmatch_out);
3706 re_extmatch_out = NULL((void*)0);
3707
3708 if (prog->reghasz == REX_SET1) {
3709 int i;
3710
3711 cleanup_zsubexpr();
3712 re_extmatch_out = make_extmatch();
3713 for (i = 0; i < NSUBEXP10; i++) {
3714 if (REG_MULTI(rex.reg_match == ((void*)0))) {
3715 /* Only accept single line matches. */
3716 if (reg_startzpos[i].lnum >= 0
3717 && reg_endzpos[i].lnum == reg_startzpos[i].lnum
3718 && reg_endzpos[i].col >= reg_startzpos[i].col) {
3719 re_extmatch_out->matches[i] =
3720 vim_strnsave(reg_getline(reg_startzpos[i].lnum)
3721 + reg_startzpos[i].col,
3722 reg_endzpos[i].col
3723 - reg_startzpos[i].col);
3724 }
3725 } else {
3726 if (reg_startzp[i] != NULL((void*)0) && reg_endzp[i] != NULL((void*)0))
3727 re_extmatch_out->matches[i] =
3728 vim_strnsave(reg_startzp[i], reg_endzp[i] - reg_startzp[i]);
3729 }
3730 }
3731 }
3732 return 1 + rex.lnum;
3733}
3734
3735
3736// Get class of previous character.
3737static int reg_prev_class(void)
3738{
3739 if (rex.input > rex.line) {
3740 return mb_get_class_tab(
3741 rex.input - 1 - utf_head_off(rex.line, rex.input - 1),
3742 rex.reg_buf->b_chartab);
3743 }
3744 return -1;
3745}
3746
3747
3748// Return true if the current rex.input position matches the Visual area.
3749static bool_Bool reg_match_visual(void)
3750{
3751 pos_T top, bot;
3752 linenr_T lnum;
3753 colnr_T col;
3754 win_T *wp = rex.reg_win == NULL((void*)0) ? curwin : rex.reg_win;
3755 int mode;
3756 colnr_T start, end;
3757 colnr_T start2, end2;
3758 colnr_T curswant;
3759
3760 // Check if the buffer is the current buffer.
3761 if (rex.reg_buf != curbuf || VIsual.lnum == 0) {
3762 return false0;
3763 }
3764
3765 if (VIsual_active) {
3766 if (lt(VIsual, wp->w_cursor)) {
3767 top = VIsual;
3768 bot = wp->w_cursor;
3769 } else {
3770 top = wp->w_cursor;
3771 bot = VIsual;
3772 }
3773 mode = VIsual_mode;
3774 curswant = wp->w_curswant;
3775 } else {
3776 if (lt(curbuf->b_visual.vi_start, curbuf->b_visual.vi_end)) {
3777 top = curbuf->b_visual.vi_start;
3778 bot = curbuf->b_visual.vi_end;
3779 } else {
3780 top = curbuf->b_visual.vi_end;
3781 bot = curbuf->b_visual.vi_start;
3782 }
3783 mode = curbuf->b_visual.vi_mode;
3784 curswant = curbuf->b_visual.vi_curswant;
3785 }
3786 lnum = rex.lnum + rex.reg_firstlnum;
3787 if (lnum < top.lnum || lnum > bot.lnum) {
3788 return false0;
3789 }
3790
3791 if (mode == 'v') {
3792 col = (colnr_T)(rex.input - rex.line);
3793 if ((lnum == top.lnum && col < top.col)
3794 || (lnum == bot.lnum && col >= bot.col + (*p_sel != 'e'))) {
3795 return false0;
3796 }
3797 } else if (mode == Ctrl_V22) {
3798 getvvcol(wp, &top, &start, NULL((void*)0), &end);
3799 getvvcol(wp, &bot, &start2, NULL((void*)0), &end2);
3800 if (start2 < start)
3801 start = start2;
3802 if (end2 > end)
3803 end = end2;
3804 if (top.col == MAXCOL || bot.col == MAXCOL || curswant == MAXCOL) {
3805 end = MAXCOL;
3806 }
3807 unsigned int cols_u = win_linetabsize(wp, rex.line,
3808 (colnr_T)(rex.input - rex.line));
3809 assert(cols_u <= MAXCOL)((void) sizeof ((cols_u <= MAXCOL) ? 1 : 0), __extension__
({ if (cols_u <= MAXCOL) ; else __assert_fail ("cols_u <= MAXCOL"
, "../src/nvim/regexp.c", 3809, __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__
); }));
3810 colnr_T cols = (colnr_T)cols_u;
3811 if (cols < start || cols > end - (*p_sel == 'e')) {
3812 return false0;
3813 }
3814 }
3815 return true1;
3816}
3817
3818#define ADVANCE_REGINPUT()(rex.input += utfc_ptr2len((char_u *)rex.input)) MB_PTR_ADV(rex.input)(rex.input += utfc_ptr2len((char_u *)rex.input))
3819
3820/*
3821 * The arguments from BRACE_LIMITS are stored here. They are actually local
3822 * to regmatch(), but they are here to reduce the amount of stack space used
3823 * (it can be called recursively many times).
3824 */
3825static long bl_minval;
3826static long bl_maxval;
3827
3828/// Main matching routine
3829///
3830/// Conceptually the strategy is simple: Check to see whether the current node
3831/// matches, push an item onto the regstack and loop to see whether the rest
3832/// matches, and then act accordingly. In practice we make some effort to
3833/// avoid using the regstack, in particular by going through "ordinary" nodes
3834/// (that don't need to know whether the rest of the match failed) by a nested
3835/// loop.
3836///
3837/// Returns true when there is a match. Leaves rex.input and rex.lnum
3838/// just after the last matched character.
3839/// Returns false when there is no match. Leaves rex.input and rex.lnum in an
3840/// undefined state!
3841static bool_Bool regmatch(
3842 char_u *scan, // Current node.
3843 proftime_T *tm, // timeout limit or NULL
3844 int *timed_out // flag set on timeout or NULL
3845)
3846{
3847 char_u *next; /* Next node. */
3848 int op;
3849 int c;
3850 regitem_T *rp;
3851 int no;
3852 int status; // one of the RA_ values:
3853 int tm_count = 0;
3854#define RA_FAIL1 1 // something failed, abort
3855#define RA_CONT2 2 // continue in inner loop
3856#define RA_BREAK3 3 // break inner loop
3857#define RA_MATCH4 4 // successful match
3858#define RA_NOMATCH5 5 // didn't match
3859
3860 // Make "regstack" and "backpos" empty. They are allocated and freed in
3861 // bt_regexec_both() to reduce malloc()/free() calls.
3862 regstack.ga_len = 0;
3863 backpos.ga_len = 0;
3864
3865 /*
3866 * Repeat until "regstack" is empty.
3867 */
3868 for (;; ) {
3869 /* Some patterns may take a long time to match, e.g., "\([a-z]\+\)\+Q".
3870 * Allow interrupting them with CTRL-C. */
3871 fast_breakcheck();
3872
3873#ifdef REGEXP_DEBUG
3874 if (scan != NULL((void*)0) && regnarrate) {
3875 mch_errmsg((char *)regprop(scan))fprintf(stderr, "%s", ((char *)regprop(scan)));
3876 mch_errmsg("(\n")fprintf(stderr, "%s", ("(\n"));
3877 }
3878#endif
3879
3880 /*
3881 * Repeat for items that can be matched sequentially, without using the
3882 * regstack.
3883 */
3884 for (;; ) {
3885 if (got_int || scan == NULL((void*)0)) {
3886 status = RA_FAIL1;
3887 break;
3888 }
3889 // Check for timeout once in a 100 times to avoid overhead.
3890 if (tm != NULL((void*)0) && ++tm_count == 100) {
3891 tm_count = 0;
3892 if (profile_passed_limit(*tm)) {
3893 if (timed_out != NULL((void*)0)) {
3894 *timed_out = true1;
3895 }
3896 status = RA_FAIL1;
3897 break;
3898 }
3899 }
3900 status = RA_CONT2;
3901
3902#ifdef REGEXP_DEBUG
3903 if (regnarrate) {
3904 mch_errmsg((char *)regprop(scan))fprintf(stderr, "%s", ((char *)regprop(scan)));
3905 mch_errmsg("...\n")fprintf(stderr, "%s", ("...\n"));
3906 if (re_extmatch_in != NULL((void*)0)) {
3907 int i;
3908
3909 mch_errmsg(_("External submatches:\n"))fprintf(stderr, "%s", (gettext((char *)("External submatches:\n"
))));
3910 for (i = 0; i < NSUBEXP10; i++) {
3911 mch_errmsg(" \"")fprintf(stderr, "%s", (" \""));
3912 if (re_extmatch_in->matches[i] != NULL((void*)0))
3913 mch_errmsg((char *)re_extmatch_in->matches[i])fprintf(stderr, "%s", ((char *)re_extmatch_in->matches[i])
);
3914 mch_errmsg("\"\n")fprintf(stderr, "%s", ("\"\n"));
3915 }
3916 }
3917 }
3918#endif
3919 next = regnext(scan);
3920
3921 op = OP(scan)((int)*(scan));
3922 // Check for character class with NL added.
3923 if (!rex.reg_line_lbr && WITH_NL(op)((op) >= 20 + 30 && (op) <= 48 + 30) && REG_MULTI(rex.reg_match == ((void*)0))
3924 && *rex.input == NUL'\000' && rex.lnum <= rex.reg_maxline) {
3925 reg_nextline();
3926 } else if (rex.reg_line_lbr && WITH_NL(op)((op) >= 20 + 30 && (op) <= 48 + 30) && *rex.input == '\n') {
3927 ADVANCE_REGINPUT()(rex.input += utfc_ptr2len((char_u *)rex.input));
3928 } else {
3929 if (WITH_NL(op)((op) >= 20 + 30 && (op) <= 48 + 30)) {
3930 op -= ADD_NL30;
3931 }
3932 c = utf_ptr2char(rex.input);
3933 switch (op) {
3934 case BOL1:
3935 if (rex.input != rex.line) {
3936 status = RA_NOMATCH5;
3937 }
3938 break;
3939
3940 case EOL2:
3941 if (c != NUL'\000') {
3942 status = RA_NOMATCH5;
3943 }
3944 break;
3945
3946 case RE_BOF201:
3947 // We're not at the beginning of the file when below the first
3948 // line where we started, not at the start of the line or we
3949 // didn't start at the first line of the buffer.
3950 if (rex.lnum != 0 || rex.input != rex.line
3951 || (REG_MULTI(rex.reg_match == ((void*)0)) && rex.reg_firstlnum > 1)) {
3952 status = RA_NOMATCH5;
3953 }
3954 break;
3955
3956 case RE_EOF202:
3957 if (rex.lnum != rex.reg_maxline || c != NUL'\000') {
3958 status = RA_NOMATCH5;
3959 }
3960 break;
3961
3962 case CURSOR203:
3963 // Check if the buffer is in a window and compare the
3964 // rex.reg_win->w_cursor position to the match position.
3965 if (rex.reg_win == NULL((void*)0)
3966 || (rex.lnum + rex.reg_firstlnum != rex.reg_win->w_cursor.lnum)
3967 || ((colnr_T)(rex.input - rex.line) !=
3968 rex.reg_win->w_cursor.col)) {
3969 status = RA_NOMATCH5;
3970 }
3971 break;
3972
3973 case RE_MARK207:
3974 /* Compare the mark position to the match position. */
3975 {
3976 int mark = OPERAND(scan)((scan) + 3)[0];
3977 int cmp = OPERAND(scan)((scan) + 3)[1];
3978 pos_T *pos;
3979
3980 pos = getmark_buf(rex.reg_buf, mark, false0);
3981 if (pos == NULL((void*)0) // mark doesn't exist
3982 || pos->lnum <= 0) { // mark isn't set in reg_buf
3983 status = RA_NOMATCH5;
3984 } else {
3985 const colnr_T pos_col = pos->lnum == rex.lnum + rex.reg_firstlnum
3986 && pos->col == MAXCOL
3987 ? (colnr_T)STRLEN(reg_getline(pos->lnum - rex.reg_firstlnum))strlen((char *)(reg_getline(pos->lnum - rex.reg_firstlnum)
))
3988 : pos->col;
3989
3990 if (pos->lnum == rex.lnum + rex.reg_firstlnum
3991 ? (pos_col == (colnr_T)(rex.input - rex.line)
3992 ? (cmp == '<' || cmp == '>')
3993 : (pos_col < (colnr_T)(rex.input - rex.line)
3994 ? cmp != '>'
3995 : cmp != '<'))
3996 : (pos->lnum < rex.lnum + rex.reg_firstlnum
3997 ? cmp != '>'
3998 : cmp != '<')) {
3999 status = RA_NOMATCH5;
4000 }
4001 }
4002 }
4003 break;
4004
4005 case RE_VISUAL208:
4006 if (!reg_match_visual())
4007 status = RA_NOMATCH5;
4008 break;
4009
4010 case RE_LNUM204:
4011 assert(rex.lnum + rex.reg_firstlnum >= 0((void) sizeof ((rex.lnum + rex.reg_firstlnum >= 0 &&
(uintmax_t)(rex.lnum + rex.reg_firstlnum) <= (4294967295U
)) ? 1 : 0), __extension__ ({ if (rex.lnum + rex.reg_firstlnum
>= 0 && (uintmax_t)(rex.lnum + rex.reg_firstlnum)
<= (4294967295U)) ; else __assert_fail ("rex.lnum + rex.reg_firstlnum >= 0 && (uintmax_t)(rex.lnum + rex.reg_firstlnum) <= UINT32_MAX"
, "../src/nvim/regexp.c", 4012, __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__
); }))
4012 && (uintmax_t)(rex.lnum + rex.reg_firstlnum) <= UINT32_MAX)((void) sizeof ((rex.lnum + rex.reg_firstlnum >= 0 &&
(uintmax_t)(rex.lnum + rex.reg_firstlnum) <= (4294967295U
)) ? 1 : 0), __extension__ ({ if (rex.lnum + rex.reg_firstlnum
>= 0 && (uintmax_t)(rex.lnum + rex.reg_firstlnum)
<= (4294967295U)) ; else __assert_fail ("rex.lnum + rex.reg_firstlnum >= 0 && (uintmax_t)(rex.lnum + rex.reg_firstlnum) <= UINT32_MAX"
, "../src/nvim/regexp.c", 4012, __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__
); }));
4013 if (!REG_MULTI(rex.reg_match == ((void*)0))
4014 || !re_num_cmp((uint32_t)(rex.lnum + rex.reg_firstlnum), scan)) {
4015 status = RA_NOMATCH5;
4016 }
4017 break;
4018
4019 case RE_COL205:
4020 assert(rex.input - rex.line + 1 >= 0((void) sizeof ((rex.input - rex.line + 1 >= 0 && (
uintmax_t)(rex.input - rex.line + 1) <= (4294967295U)) ? 1
: 0), __extension__ ({ if (rex.input - rex.line + 1 >= 0 &&
(uintmax_t)(rex.input - rex.line + 1) <= (4294967295U)) ;
else __assert_fail ("rex.input - rex.line + 1 >= 0 && (uintmax_t)(rex.input - rex.line + 1) <= UINT32_MAX"
, "../src/nvim/regexp.c", 4021, __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__
); }))
4021 && (uintmax_t)(rex.input - rex.line + 1) <= UINT32_MAX)((void) sizeof ((rex.input - rex.line + 1 >= 0 && (
uintmax_t)(rex.input - rex.line + 1) <= (4294967295U)) ? 1
: 0), __extension__ ({ if (rex.input - rex.line + 1 >= 0 &&
(uintmax_t)(rex.input - rex.line + 1) <= (4294967295U)) ;
else __assert_fail ("rex.input - rex.line + 1 >= 0 && (uintmax_t)(rex.input - rex.line + 1) <= UINT32_MAX"
, "../src/nvim/regexp.c", 4021, __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__
); }));
4022 if (!re_num_cmp((uint32_t)(rex.input - rex.line + 1), scan)) {
4023 status = RA_NOMATCH5;
4024 }
4025 break;
4026
4027 case RE_VCOL206:
4028 if (!re_num_cmp(win_linetabsize(rex.reg_win == NULL((void*)0)
4029 ? curwin : rex.reg_win,
4030 rex.line,
4031 (colnr_T)(rex.input - rex.line)) + 1,
4032 scan)) {
4033 status = RA_NOMATCH5;
4034 }
4035 break;
4036
4037 case BOW15: // \<word; rex.input points to w
4038 if (c == NUL'\000') { // Can't match at end of line
4039 status = RA_NOMATCH5;
4040 } else {
4041 // Get class of current and previous char (if it exists).
4042 const int this_class =
4043 mb_get_class_tab(rex.input, rex.reg_buf->b_chartab);
4044 if (this_class <= 1) {
4045 status = RA_NOMATCH5; // Not on a word at all.
4046 } else if (reg_prev_class() == this_class) {
4047 status = RA_NOMATCH5; // Previous char is in same word.
4048 }
4049 }
4050 break;
4051
4052 case EOW16: // word\>; rex.input points after d
4053 if (rex.input == rex.line) { // Can't match at start of line
4054 status = RA_NOMATCH5;
4055 } else {
4056 int this_class, prev_class;
4057
4058 // Get class of current and previous char (if it exists).
4059 this_class = mb_get_class_tab(rex.input, rex.reg_buf->b_chartab);
4060 prev_class = reg_prev_class();
4061 if (this_class == prev_class
4062 || prev_class == 0 || prev_class == 1) {
4063 status = RA_NOMATCH5;
4064 }
4065 }
4066 break; // Matched with EOW
4067
4068 case ANY20:
4069 // ANY does not match new lines.
4070 if (c == NUL'\000') {
4071 status = RA_NOMATCH5;
4072 } else {
4073 ADVANCE_REGINPUT()(rex.input += utfc_ptr2len((char_u *)rex.input));
4074 }
4075 break;
4076
4077 case IDENT23:
4078 if (!vim_isIDc(c))
4079 status = RA_NOMATCH5;
4080 else
4081 ADVANCE_REGINPUT()(rex.input += utfc_ptr2len((char_u *)rex.input));
4082 break;
4083
4084 case SIDENT24:
4085 if (ascii_isdigit(*rex.input) || !vim_isIDc(c)) {
4086 status = RA_NOMATCH5;
4087 } else {
4088 ADVANCE_REGINPUT()(rex.input += utfc_ptr2len((char_u *)rex.input));
4089 }
4090 break;
4091
4092 case KWORD25:
4093 if (!vim_iswordp_buf(rex.input, rex.reg_buf)) {
4094 status = RA_NOMATCH5;
4095 } else {
4096 ADVANCE_REGINPUT()(rex.input += utfc_ptr2len((char_u *)rex.input));
4097 }
4098 break;
4099
4100 case SKWORD26:
4101 if (ascii_isdigit(*rex.input)
4102 || !vim_iswordp_buf(rex.input, rex.reg_buf)) {
4103 status = RA_NOMATCH5;
4104 } else {
4105 ADVANCE_REGINPUT()(rex.input += utfc_ptr2len((char_u *)rex.input));
4106 }
4107 break;
4108
4109 case FNAME27:
4110 if (!vim_isfilec(c)) {
4111 status = RA_NOMATCH5;
4112 } else {
4113 ADVANCE_REGINPUT()(rex.input += utfc_ptr2len((char_u *)rex.input));
4114 }
4115 break;
4116
4117 case SFNAME28:
4118 if (ascii_isdigit(*rex.input) || !vim_isfilec(c)) {
4119 status = RA_NOMATCH5;
4120 } else {
4121 ADVANCE_REGINPUT()(rex.input += utfc_ptr2len((char_u *)rex.input));
4122 }
4123 break;
4124
4125 case PRINT29:
4126 if (!vim_isprintc(PTR2CHAR(rex.input)utf_ptr2char(rex.input))) {
4127 status = RA_NOMATCH5;
4128 } else {
4129 ADVANCE_REGINPUT()(rex.input += utfc_ptr2len((char_u *)rex.input));
4130 }
4131 break;
4132
4133 case SPRINT30:
4134 if (ascii_isdigit(*rex.input) || !vim_isprintc(PTR2CHAR(rex.input)utf_ptr2char(rex.input))) {
4135 status = RA_NOMATCH5;
4136 } else {
4137 ADVANCE_REGINPUT()(rex.input += utfc_ptr2len((char_u *)rex.input));
4138 }
4139 break;
4140
4141 case WHITE31:
4142 if (!ascii_iswhite(c))
4143 status = RA_NOMATCH5;
4144 else
4145 ADVANCE_REGINPUT()(rex.input += utfc_ptr2len((char_u *)rex.input));
4146 break;
4147
4148 case NWHITE32:
4149 if (c == NUL'\000' || ascii_iswhite(c))
4150 status = RA_NOMATCH5;
4151 else
4152 ADVANCE_REGINPUT()(rex.input += utfc_ptr2len((char_u *)rex.input));
4153 break;
4154
4155 case DIGIT33:
4156 if (!ri_digit(c)(c < 0x100 && (class_tab[c] & 0x01)))
4157 status = RA_NOMATCH5;
4158 else
4159 ADVANCE_REGINPUT()(rex.input += utfc_ptr2len((char_u *)rex.input));
4160 break;
4161
4162 case NDIGIT34:
4163 if (c == NUL'\000' || ri_digit(c)(c < 0x100 && (class_tab[c] & 0x01)))
4164 status = RA_NOMATCH5;
4165 else
4166 ADVANCE_REGINPUT()(rex.input += utfc_ptr2len((char_u *)rex.input));

4168
4169 case HEX35:
4170 if (!ri_hex(c)(c < 0x100 && (class_tab[c] & 0x02)))
4171 status = RA_NOMATCH5;
4172 else
4173 ADVANCE_REGINPUT()(rex.input += utfc_ptr2len((char_u *)rex.input));
4174 break;
4175
4176 case NHEX36:
4177 if (c == NUL'\000' || ri_hex(c)(c < 0x100 && (class_tab[c] & 0x02)))
4178 status = RA_NOMATCH5;
4179 else
4180 ADVANCE_REGINPUT()(rex.input += utfc_ptr2len((char_u *)rex.input));
4181 break;
4182
4183 case OCTAL37:
4184 if (!ri_octal(c)(c < 0x100 && (class_tab[c] & 0x04)))
4185 status = RA_NOMATCH5;
4186 else
4187 ADVANCE_REGINPUT()(rex.input += utfc_ptr2len((char_u *)rex.input));
4188 break;
4189
4190 case NOCTAL38:
4191 if (c == NUL'\000' || ri_octal(c)(c < 0x100 && (class_tab[c] & 0x04)))
4192 status = RA_NOMATCH5;

4194 ADVANCE_REGINPUT()(rex.input += utfc_ptr2len((char_u *)rex.input));

4196
4197 case WORD39:
4198 if (!ri_word(c)(c < 0x100 && (class_tab[c] & 0x08)))
4199 status = RA_NOMATCH5;
4200 else
4201 ADVANCE_REGINPUT()(rex.input += utfc_ptr2len((char_u *)rex.input));
4202 break;
4203
4204 case NWORD40:
4205 if (c == NUL'\000' || ri_word(c)(c < 0x100 && (class_tab[c] & 0x08)))
4206 status = RA_NOMATCH5;
4207 else
4208 ADVANCE_REGINPUT()(rex.input += utfc_ptr2len((char_u *)rex.input));

4210
4211 case HEAD41:
4212 if (!ri_head(c)(c < 0x100 && (class_tab[c] & 0x10)))
4213 status = RA_NOMATCH5;
4214 else
4215 ADVANCE_REGINPUT()(rex.input += utfc_ptr2len((char_u *)rex.input));
4216 break;
4217
4218 case NHEAD42:
4219 if (c == NUL'\000' || ri_head(c)(c < 0x100 && (class_tab[c] & 0x10)))
4220 status = RA_NOMATCH5;
4221 else
4222 ADVANCE_REGINPUT()(rex.input += utfc_ptr2len((char_u *)rex.input));
4223 break;
4224
4225 case ALPHA43:
4226 if (!ri_alpha(c)(c < 0x100 && (class_tab[c] & 0x20)))

4229 ADVANCE_REGINPUT()(rex.input += utfc_ptr2len((char_u *)rex.input));
4230 break;
4231
4232 case NALPHA44:
4233 if (c == NUL'\000' || ri_alpha(c)(c < 0x100 && (class_tab[c] & 0x20)))
4234 status = RA_NOMATCH5;
4235 else
4236 ADVANCE_REGINPUT()(rex.input += utfc_ptr2len((char_u *)rex.input));
4237 break;
4238
4239 case LOWER45:
4240 if (!ri_lower(c)(c < 0x100 && (class_tab[c] & 0x40)))
4241 status = RA_NOMATCH5;

4243 ADVANCE_REGINPUT()(rex.input += utfc_ptr2len((char_u *)rex.input));
4244 break;
4245
4246 case NLOWER46:
4247 if (c == NUL'\000' || ri_lower(c)(c < 0x100 && (class_tab[c] & 0x40)))
4248 status = RA_NOMATCH5;
4249 else
4250 ADVANCE_REGINPUT()(rex.input += utfc_ptr2len((char_u *)rex.input));
4251 break;
4252
4253 case UPPER47:
4254 if (!ri_upper(c)(c < 0x100 && (class_tab[c] & 0x80)))
4255 status = RA_NOMATCH5;
4256 else
4257 ADVANCE_REGINPUT()(rex.input += utfc_ptr2len((char_u *)rex.input));
4258 break;
4259
4260 case NUPPER48:
4261 if (c == NUL'\000' || ri_upper(c)(c < 0x100 && (class_tab[c] & 0x80)))
4262 status = RA_NOMATCH5;
4263 else
4264 ADVANCE_REGINPUT()(rex.input += utfc_ptr2len((char_u *)rex.input));
4265 break;
4266
4267 case EXACTLY5:
4268 {
4269 int len;
4270 char_u *opnd;
4271
4272 opnd = OPERAND(scan)((scan) + 3);
4273 // Inline the first byte, for speed.
4274 if (*opnd != *rex.input
4275 && (!rex.reg_ic)) {
4276 status = RA_NOMATCH5;
4277 } else if (*opnd == NUL'\000') {
4278 // match empty string always works; happens when "~" is
4279 // empty.
4280 } else {
4281 if (opnd[1] == NUL'\000' && !rex.reg_ic) {
4282 len = 1; // matched a single byte above
4283 } else {
4284 // Need to match first byte again for multi-byte.
4285 len = (int)STRLEN(opnd)strlen((char *)(opnd));
4286 if (cstrncmp(opnd, rex.input, &len) != 0) {
4287 status = RA_NOMATCH5;
4288 }
4289 }
4290 // Check for following composing character, unless %C
4291 // follows (skips over all composing chars).
4292 if (status != RA_NOMATCH5
4293 && UTF_COMPOSINGLIKE(rex.input, rex.input + len)utf_composinglike((rex.input), (rex.input + len))
4294 && !rex.reg_icombine
4295 && OP(next)((int)*(next)) != RE_COMPOSING209) {
4296 // raaron: This code makes a composing character get
4297 // ignored, which is the correct behavior (sometimes)
4298 // for voweled Hebrew texts.
4299 status = RA_NOMATCH5;
4300 }
4301 if (status != RA_NOMATCH5) {
4302 rex.input += len;
4303 }
4304 }
4305 }
4306 break;
4307
4308 case ANYOF21:
4309 case ANYBUT22:
4310 if (c == NUL'\000')
4311 status = RA_NOMATCH5;
4312 else if ((cstrchr(OPERAND(scan)((scan) + 3), c) == NULL((void*)0)) == (op == ANYOF21))
4313 status = RA_NOMATCH5;
4314 else
4315 ADVANCE_REGINPUT()(rex.input += utfc_ptr2len((char_u *)rex.input));
4316 break;
4317
4318 case MULTIBYTECODE200:
4319 {
4320 int i, len;
4321
4322 const char_u *opnd = OPERAND(scan)((scan) + 3);
4323 // Safety check (just in case 'encoding' was changed since
4324 // compiling the program).
4325 if ((len = (*mb_ptr2lenutfc_ptr2len)(opnd)) < 2) {
4326 status = RA_NOMATCH5;
4327 break;
4328 }
4329 const int opndc = utf_ptr2char(opnd);
4330 if (utf_iscomposing(opndc)) {
4331 // When only a composing char is given match at any
4332 // position where that composing char appears.
4333 status = RA_NOMATCH5;
4334 for (i = 0; rex.input[i] != NUL'\000';
4335 i += utf_ptr2len(rex.input + i)) {
4336 const int inpc = utf_ptr2char(rex.input + i);
4337 if (!utf_iscomposing(inpc)) {
4338 if (i > 0) {
4339 break;
4340 }
4341 } else if (opndc == inpc) {
4342 // Include all following composing chars.
4343 len = i + utfc_ptr2len(rex.input + i);
4344 status = RA_MATCH4;
4345 break;
4346 }
4347 }
4348 } else {
4349 for (i = 0; i < len; i++) {
4350 if (opnd[i] != rex.input[i]) {
4351 status = RA_NOMATCH5;
4352 break;
4353 }
4354 }
4355 }
4356 rex.input += len;
4357 }
4358 break;
4359
4360 case RE_COMPOSING209:
4361 {
4362 // Skip composing characters.
4363 while (utf_iscomposing(utf_ptr2char(rex.input))) {
4364 MB_CPTR_ADV(rex.input)(rex.input += utf_ptr2len(rex.input));
4365 }
4366 }
4367 break;
4368
4369 case NOTHING6:
4370 break;
4371
4372 case BACK4:
4373 {
4374 int i;
4375
4376 /*
4377 * When we run into BACK we need to check if we don't keep
4378 * looping without matching any input. The second and later
4379 * times a BACK is encountered it fails if the input is still
4380 * at the same position as the previous time.
4381 * The positions are stored in "backpos" and found by the
4382 * current value of "scan", the position in the RE program.
4383 */
4384 backpos_T *bp = (backpos_T *)backpos.ga_data;
4385 for (i = 0; i < backpos.ga_len; ++i)
4386 if (bp[i].bp_scan == scan)
4387 break;
4388 if (i == backpos.ga_len) {
4389 backpos_T *p = GA_APPEND_VIA_PTR(backpos_T, &backpos)ga_append_via_ptr(&backpos, sizeof(backpos_T));
4390 p->bp_scan = scan;
4391 } else if (reg_save_equal(&bp[i].bp_pos))
4392 /* Still at same position as last time, fail. */
4393 status = RA_NOMATCH5;
4394
4395 assert(status != RA_FAIL)((void) sizeof ((status != 1) ? 1 : 0), __extension__ ({ if (
status != 1) ; else __assert_fail ("status != RA_FAIL", "../src/nvim/regexp.c"
, 4395, __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__); }));
4396 if (status != RA_NOMATCH5) {
4397 reg_save(&bp[i].bp_pos, &backpos);
4398 }
4399 }
4400 break;
4401
4402 case MOPEN80 + 0: /* Match start: \zs */
4403 case MOPEN80 + 1: /* \( */
4404 case MOPEN80 + 2:
4405 case MOPEN80 + 3:
4406 case MOPEN80 + 4:
4407 case MOPEN80 + 5:
4408 case MOPEN80 + 6:
4409 case MOPEN80 + 7:
4410 case MOPEN80 + 8:
4411 case MOPEN80 + 9:
4412 {
4413 no = op - MOPEN80;
4414 cleanup_subexpr();
4415 rp = regstack_push(RS_MOPEN, scan);
4416 if (rp == NULL((void*)0))
4417 status = RA_FAIL1;
4418 else {
4419 rp->rs_no = no;
4420 save_se(&rp->rs_un.sesave, &rex.reg_startpos[no],(rex.reg_match == ((void*)0)) ? save_se_multi((&rp->rs_un
.sesave), (&rex.reg_startpos[no])) : save_se_one((&rp
->rs_un.sesave), (&rex.reg_startp[no]))
4421 &rex.reg_startp[no])(rex.reg_match == ((void*)0)) ? save_se_multi((&rp->rs_un
.sesave), (&rex.reg_startpos[no])) : save_se_one((&rp
->rs_un.sesave), (&rex.reg_startp[no]));
4422 // We simply continue and handle the result when done.
4423 }
4424 }
4425 break;
4426
4427 case NOPEN150: /* \%( */
4428 case NCLOSE151: /* \) after \%( */
4429 if (regstack_push(RS_NOPEN, scan) == NULL((void*)0))
4430 status = RA_FAIL1;
4431 /* We simply continue and handle the result when done. */
4432 break;
4433

4435 case ZOPEN110 + 2:

4441 case ZOPEN110 + 8:
4442 case ZOPEN110 + 9:
4443 {

rs_un.sesave), (&reg_startzp[no]))
4452 &reg_startzp[no])(rex.reg_match == ((void*)0)) ? save_se_multi((&rp->rs_un
.sesave), (&reg_startzpos[no])) : save_se_one((&rp->
rs_un.sesave), (&reg_startzp[no]));
4453 /* We simply continue and handle the result when done. */
4454 }
4455 }

4457
4458 case MCLOSE90 + 0: /* Match end: \ze */
4459 case MCLOSE90 + 1: /* \) */
4460 case MCLOSE90 + 2:
4461 case MCLOSE90 + 3:
4462 case MCLOSE90 + 4:
4463 case MCLOSE90 + 5:
4464 case MCLOSE90 + 6:
4465 case MCLOSE90 + 7:
4466 case MCLOSE90 + 8:
4467 case MCLOSE90 + 9:
4468 {
4469 no = op - MCLOSE90;
4470 cleanup_subexpr();
4471 rp = regstack_push(RS_MCLOSE, scan);
4472 if (rp == NULL((void*)0)) {
4473 status = RA_FAIL1;
4474 } else {
4475 rp->rs_no = no;
4476 save_se(&rp->rs_un.sesave, &rex.reg_endpos[no], &rex.reg_endp[no])(rex.reg_match == ((void*)0)) ? save_se_multi((&rp->rs_un
.sesave), (&rex.reg_endpos[no])) : save_se_one((&rp->
rs_un.sesave), (&rex.reg_endp[no]));
4477 // We simply continue and handle the result when done.
4478 }
4479 }
4480 break;
4481
4482 case ZCLOSE120 + 1: /* \) after \z( */
4483 case ZCLOSE120 + 2:
4484 case ZCLOSE120 + 3:
4485 case ZCLOSE120 + 4:
4486 case ZCLOSE120 + 5:
4487 case ZCLOSE120 + 6:
4488 case ZCLOSE120 + 7:
4489 case ZCLOSE120 + 8:
4490 case ZCLOSE120 + 9:
4491 {
4492 no = op - ZCLOSE120;
4493 cleanup_zsubexpr();
4494 rp = regstack_push(RS_ZCLOSE, scan);
4495 if (rp == NULL((void*)0))
4496 status = RA_FAIL1;
4497 else {
4498 rp->rs_no = no;
4499 save_se(&rp->rs_un.sesave, &reg_endzpos[no],(rex.reg_match == ((void*)0)) ? save_se_multi((&rp->rs_un
.sesave), (&reg_endzpos[no])) : save_se_one((&rp->
rs_un.sesave), (&reg_endzp[no]))
4500 &reg_endzp[no])(rex.reg_match == ((void*)0)) ? save_se_multi((&rp->rs_un
.sesave), (&reg_endzpos[no])) : save_se_one((&rp->
rs_un.sesave), (&reg_endzp[no]));
4501 /* We simply continue and handle the result when done. */
4502 }
4503 }
4504 break;
4505
4506 case BACKREF100 + 1:
4507 case BACKREF100 + 2:
4508 case BACKREF100 + 3:
4509 case BACKREF100 + 4:
4510 case BACKREF100 + 5:
4511 case BACKREF100 + 6:
4512 case BACKREF100 + 7:
4513 case BACKREF100 + 8:
4514 case BACKREF100 + 9:
4515 {
4516 int len;
4517
4518 no = op - BACKREF100;
4519 cleanup_subexpr();
4520 if (!REG_MULTI(rex.reg_match == ((void*)0))) { // Single-line regexp
4521 if (rex.reg_startp[no] == NULL((void*)0) || rex.reg_endp[no] == NULL((void*)0)) {
4522 // Backref was not set: Match an empty string.
4523 len = 0;
4524 } else {
4525 // Compare current input with back-ref in the same line.
4526 len = (int)(rex.reg_endp[no] - rex.reg_startp[no]);
4527 if (cstrncmp(rex.reg_startp[no], rex.input, &len) != 0) {
4528 status = RA_NOMATCH5;
4529 }
4530 }
4531 } else { // Multi-line regexp
4532 if (rex.reg_startpos[no].lnum < 0 || rex.reg_endpos[no].lnum < 0) {
4533 // Backref was not set: Match an empty string.
4534 len = 0;
4535 } else {
4536 if (rex.reg_startpos[no].lnum == rex.lnum
4537 && rex.reg_endpos[no].lnum == rex.lnum) {
4538 // Compare back-ref within the current line.
4539 len = rex.reg_endpos[no].col - rex.reg_startpos[no].col;
4540 if (cstrncmp(rex.line + rex.reg_startpos[no].col,
4541 rex.input, &len) != 0) {
4542 status = RA_NOMATCH5;
4543 }
4544 } else {
4545 // Messy situation: Need to compare between two lines.
4546 int r = match_with_backref(rex.reg_startpos[no].lnum,
4547 rex.reg_startpos[no].col,
4548 rex.reg_endpos[no].lnum,
4549 rex.reg_endpos[no].col,
4550 &len);
4551 if (r != RA_MATCH4) {
4552 status = r;
4553 }
4554 }
4555 }
4556 }
4557
4558 // Matched the backref, skip over it.
4559 rex.input += len;
4560 }
4561 break;
4562
4563 case ZREF130 + 1:
4564 case ZREF130 + 2:
4565 case ZREF130 + 3:
4566 case ZREF130 + 4:
4567 case ZREF130 + 5:
4568 case ZREF130 + 6:
4569 case ZREF130 + 7:
4570 case ZREF130 + 8:
4571 case ZREF130 + 9:
4572 {
4573 cleanup_zsubexpr();
4574 no = op - ZREF130;
4575 if (re_extmatch_in != NULL((void*)0)
4576 && re_extmatch_in->matches[no] != NULL((void*)0)) {
4577 int len = (int)STRLEN(re_extmatch_in->matches[no])strlen((char *)(re_extmatch_in->matches[no]));
4578 if (cstrncmp(re_extmatch_in->matches[no], rex.input, &len) != 0) {
4579 status = RA_NOMATCH5;
4580 } else {
4581 rex.input += len;
4582 }
4583 } else {
4584 // Backref was not set: Match an empty string.
4585 }
4586 }
4587 break;
4588
4589 case BRANCH3:
4590 {
4591 if (OP(next)((int)*(next)) != BRANCH3) /* No choice. */
4592 next = OPERAND(scan)((scan) + 3); /* Avoid recursion. */
4593 else {
4594 rp = regstack_push(RS_BRANCH, scan);
4595 if (rp == NULL((void*)0))
4596 status = RA_FAIL1;
4597 else
4598 status = RA_BREAK3; /* rest is below */
4599 }
4600 }
4601 break;
4602
4603 case BRACE_LIMITS17:
4604 {
4605 if (OP(next)((int)*(next)) == BRACE_SIMPLE14) {
4606 bl_minval = OPERAND_MIN(scan)(((long)(scan)[3] << 24) + ((long)(scan)[4] << 16
) + ((long)(scan)[5] << 8) + (long)(scan)[6]);
4607 bl_maxval = OPERAND_MAX(scan)(((long)((scan) + 4)[3] << 24) + ((long)((scan) + 4)[4]
<< 16) + ((long)((scan) + 4)[5] << 8) + (long)((
scan) + 4)[6]);
4608 } else if (OP(next)((int)*(next)) >= BRACE_COMPLEX140
4609 && OP(next)((int)*(next)) < BRACE_COMPLEX140 + 10) {
4610 no = OP(next)((int)*(next)) - BRACE_COMPLEX140;
4611 brace_min[no] = OPERAND_MIN(scan)(((long)(scan)[3] << 24) + ((long)(scan)[4] << 16
) + ((long)(scan)[5] << 8) + (long)(scan)[6]);
4612 brace_max[no] = OPERAND_MAX(scan)(((long)((scan) + 4)[3] << 24) + ((long)((scan) + 4)[4]
<< 16) + ((long)((scan) + 4)[5] << 8) + (long)((
scan) + 4)[6]);
4613 brace_count[no] = 0;
4614 } else {
4615 internal_error("BRACE_LIMITS");
4616 status = RA_FAIL1;
4617 }
4618 }
4619 break;
4620
4621 case BRACE_COMPLEX140 + 0:
4622 case BRACE_COMPLEX140 + 1:
4623 case BRACE_COMPLEX140 + 2:
4624 case BRACE_COMPLEX140 + 3:
4625 case BRACE_COMPLEX140 + 4:
4626 case BRACE_COMPLEX140 + 5:
4627 case BRACE_COMPLEX140 + 6:
4628 case BRACE_COMPLEX140 + 7:
4629 case BRACE_COMPLEX140 + 8:
4630 case BRACE_COMPLEX140 + 9:
4631 {
4632 no = op - BRACE_COMPLEX140;
4633 ++brace_count[no];
4634
4635 /* If not matched enough times yet, try one more */
4636 if (brace_count[no] <= (brace_min[no] <= brace_max[no]
4637 ? brace_min[no] : brace_max[no])) {
4638 rp = regstack_push(RS_BRCPLX_MORE, scan);
4639 if (rp == NULL((void*)0))
4640 status = RA_FAIL1;
4641 else {
4642 rp->rs_no = no;
4643 reg_save(&rp->rs_un.regsave, &backpos);
4644 next = OPERAND(scan)((scan) + 3);
4645 /* We continue and handle the result when done. */
4646 }
4647 break;
4648 }
4649
4650 /* If matched enough times, may try matching some more */
4651 if (brace_min[no] <= brace_max[no]) {
4652 /* Range is the normal way around, use longest match */
4653 if (brace_count[no] <= brace_max[no]) {
4654 rp = regstack_push(RS_BRCPLX_LONG, scan);
4655 if (rp == NULL((void*)0))
4656 status = RA_FAIL1;
4657 else {
4658 rp->rs_no = no;
4659 reg_save(&rp->rs_un.regsave, &backpos);
4660 next = OPERAND(scan)((scan) + 3);
4661 /* We continue and handle the result when done. */
4662 }
4663 }
4664 } else {
4665 /* Range is backwards, use shortest match first */
4666 if (brace_count[no] <= brace_min[no]) {
4667 rp = regstack_push(RS_BRCPLX_SHORT, scan);
4668 if (rp == NULL((void*)0))
4669 status = RA_FAIL1;
4670 else {
4671 reg_save(&rp->rs_un.regsave, &backpos);
4672 /* We continue and handle the result when done. */
4673 }
4674 }
4675 }
4676 }
4677 break;
4678
4679 case BRACE_SIMPLE14:
4680 case STAR7:
4681 case PLUS8:
4682 {
4683 regstar_T rst;
4684
4685 /*
4686 * Lookahead to avoid useless match attempts when we know
4687 * what character comes next.
4688 */
4689 if (OP(next)((int)*(next)) == EXACTLY5) {
4690 rst.nextb = *OPERAND(next)((next) + 3);
4691 if (rex.reg_ic) {
4692 if (mb_isupper(rst.nextb)) {
4693 rst.nextb_ic = mb_tolower(rst.nextb);
4694 } else {
4695 rst.nextb_ic = mb_toupper(rst.nextb);
4696 }
4697 } else {
4698 rst.nextb_ic = rst.nextb;
4699 }
4700 } else {
4701 rst.nextb = NUL'\000';
4702 rst.nextb_ic = NUL'\000';
4703 }
4704 if (op != BRACE_SIMPLE14) {
4705 rst.minval = (op == STAR7) ? 0 : 1;
4706 rst.maxval = MAX_LIMIT(32767L << 16L);
4707 } else {
4708 rst.minval = bl_minval;
4709 rst.maxval = bl_maxval;
4710 }
4711
4712 /*
4713 * When maxval > minval, try matching as much as possible, up
4714 * to maxval. When maxval < minval, try matching at least the
4715 * minimal number (since the range is backwards, that's also
4716 * maxval!).
4717 */
4718 rst.count = regrepeat(OPERAND(scan)((scan) + 3), rst.maxval);
4719 if (got_int) {
4720 status = RA_FAIL1;
4721 break;
4722 }
4723 if (rst.minval <= rst.maxval
4724 ? rst.count >= rst.minval : rst.count >= rst.maxval) {
4725 /* It could match. Prepare for trying to match what
4726 * follows. The code is below. Parameters are stored in
4727 * a regstar_T on the regstack. */
4728 if ((long)((unsigned)regstack.ga_len >> 10) >= p_mmp) {
4729 EMSG(_(e_maxmempat))emsg((char_u *)(gettext((char *)(e_maxmempat))));
4730 status = RA_FAIL1;
4731 } else {
4732 ga_grow(&regstack, sizeof(regstar_T));
4733 regstack.ga_len += sizeof(regstar_T);
4734 rp = regstack_push(rst.minval <= rst.maxval
4735 ? RS_STAR_LONG : RS_STAR_SHORT, scan);
4736 if (rp == NULL((void*)0))
4737 status = RA_FAIL1;
4738 else {
4739 *(((regstar_T *)rp) - 1) = rst;
4740 status = RA_BREAK3; /* skip the restore bits */
4741 }
4742 }
4743 } else
4744 status = RA_NOMATCH5;
4745
4746 }
4747 break;
4748
4749 case NOMATCH10:
4750 case MATCH9:
4751 case SUBPAT13:
4752 rp = regstack_push(RS_NOMATCH, scan);
4753 if (rp == NULL((void*)0))
4754 status = RA_FAIL1;
4755 else {
4756 rp->rs_no = op;
4757 reg_save(&rp->rs_un.regsave, &backpos);
4758 next = OPERAND(scan)((scan) + 3);
4759 /* We continue and handle the result when done. */
4760 }
4761 break;
4762
4763 case BEHIND11:
4764 case NOBEHIND12:
4765 /* Need a bit of room to store extra positions. */
4766 if ((long)((unsigned)regstack.ga_len >> 10) >= p_mmp) {
4767 EMSG(_(e_maxmempat))emsg((char_u *)(gettext((char *)(e_maxmempat))));
4768 status = RA_FAIL1;
4769 } else {
4770 ga_grow(&regstack, sizeof(regbehind_T));
4771 regstack.ga_len += sizeof(regbehind_T);
4772 rp = regstack_push(RS_BEHIND1, scan);
4773 if (rp == NULL((void*)0))
4774 status = RA_FAIL1;
4775 else {
4776 /* Need to save the subexpr to be able to restore them
4777 * when there is a match but we don't use it. */
4778 save_subexpr(((regbehind_T *)rp) - 1);
4779
4780 rp->rs_no = op;
4781 reg_save(&rp->rs_un.regsave, &backpos);
4782 /* First try if what follows matches. If it does then we
4783 * check the behind match by looping. */
4784 }
4785 }
4786 break;
4787
4788 case BHPOS19:
4789 if (REG_MULTI(rex.reg_match == ((void*)0))) {
4790 if (behind_pos.rs_u.pos.col != (colnr_T)(rex.input - rex.line)
4791 || behind_pos.rs_u.pos.lnum != rex.lnum) {
4792 status = RA_NOMATCH5;
4793 }
4794 } else if (behind_pos.rs_u.ptr != rex.input) {
4795 status = RA_NOMATCH5;
4796 }
4797 break;
4798
4799 case NEWL18:
4800 if ((c != NUL'\000' || !REG_MULTI(rex.reg_match == ((void*)0)) || rex.lnum > rex.reg_maxline
4801 || rex.reg_line_lbr) && (c != '\n' || !rex.reg_line_lbr)) {
4802 status = RA_NOMATCH5;
4803 } else if (rex.reg_line_lbr) {
4804 ADVANCE_REGINPUT()(rex.input += utfc_ptr2len((char_u *)rex.input));
4805 } else {
4806 reg_nextline();
4807 }
4808 break;
4809
4810 case END0:
4811 status = RA_MATCH4; /* Success! */
4812 break;
4813
4814 default:
4815 IEMSG(_(e_re_corr))iemsg((const char *)(gettext((char *)(e_re_corr))));
4816#ifdef REGEXP_DEBUG
4817 printf("Illegal op code %d\n", op);
4818#endif
4819 status = RA_FAIL1;
4820 break;
4821 }
4822 }
4823
4824 /* If we can't continue sequentially, break the inner loop. */
4825 if (status != RA_CONT2)
4826 break;
4827
4828 /* Continue in inner loop, advance to next item. */
4829 scan = next;
4830
4831 } /* end of inner loop */
4832
4833 /*
4834 * If there is something on the regstack execute the code for the state.
4835 * If the state is popped then loop and use the older state.
4836 */
4837 while (!GA_EMPTY(&regstack)((&regstack)->ga_len <= 0) && status != RA_FAIL1) {
4838 rp = (regitem_T *)((char *)regstack.ga_data + regstack.ga_len) - 1;
4839 switch (rp->rs_state) {
4840 case RS_NOPEN:
4841 /* Result is passed on as-is, simply pop the state. */
4842 regstack_pop(&scan);
4843 break;
4844
4845 case RS_MOPEN:
4846 // Pop the state. Restore pointers when there is no match.
4847 if (status == RA_NOMATCH5) {
4848 restore_se(&rp->rs_un.sesave, &rex.reg_startpos[rp->rs_no],{ if ((rex.reg_match == ((void*)0))) *(&rex.reg_startpos[
rp->rs_no]) = (&rp->rs_un.sesave)->se_u.pos; else
*(&rex.reg_startp[rp->rs_no]) = (&rp->rs_un.sesave
)->se_u.ptr; }
4849 &rex.reg_startp[rp->rs_no]){ if ((rex.reg_match == ((void*)0))) *(&rex.reg_startpos[
rp->rs_no]) = (&rp->rs_un.sesave)->se_u.pos; else
*(&rex.reg_startp[rp->rs_no]) = (&rp->rs_un.sesave
)->se_u.ptr; };
4850 }
4851 regstack_pop(&scan);
4852 break;
4853
4854 case RS_ZOPEN:
4855 /* Pop the state. Restore pointers when there is no match. */
4856 if (status == RA_NOMATCH5)
4857 restore_se(&rp->rs_un.sesave, &reg_startzpos[rp->rs_no],{ if ((rex.reg_match == ((void*)0))) *(&reg_startzpos[rp->
rs_no]) = (&rp->rs_un.sesave)->se_u.pos; else *(&
reg_startzp[rp->rs_no]) = (&rp->rs_un.sesave)->se_u
.ptr; }
4858 &reg_startzp[rp->rs_no]){ if ((rex.reg_match == ((void*)0))) *(&reg_startzpos[rp->
rs_no]) = (&rp->rs_un.sesave)->se_u.pos; else *(&
reg_startzp[rp->rs_no]) = (&rp->rs_un.sesave)->se_u
.ptr; };
4859 regstack_pop(&scan);
4860 break;
4861
4862 case RS_MCLOSE:
4863 // Pop the state. Restore pointers when there is no match.
4864 if (status == RA_NOMATCH5) {
4865 restore_se(&rp->rs_un.sesave, &rex.reg_endpos[rp->rs_no],{ if ((rex.reg_match == ((void*)0))) *(&rex.reg_endpos[rp
->rs_no]) = (&rp->rs_un.sesave)->se_u.pos; else *
(&rex.reg_endp[rp->rs_no]) = (&rp->rs_un.sesave
)->se_u.ptr; }
4866 &rex.reg_endp[rp->rs_no]){ if ((rex.reg_match == ((void*)0))) *(&rex.reg_endpos[rp
->rs_no]) = (&rp->rs_un.sesave)->se_u.pos; else *
(&rex.reg_endp[rp->rs_no]) = (&rp->rs_un.sesave
)->se_u.ptr; };
4867 }
4868 regstack_pop(&scan);
4869 break;
4870
4871 case RS_ZCLOSE:
4872 /* Pop the state. Restore pointers when there is no match. */
4873 if (status == RA_NOMATCH5)
4874 restore_se(&rp->rs_un.sesave, &reg_endzpos[rp->rs_no],{ if ((rex.reg_match == ((void*)0))) *(&reg_endzpos[rp->
rs_no]) = (&rp->rs_un.sesave)->se_u.pos; else *(&
reg_endzp[rp->rs_no]) = (&rp->rs_un.sesave)->se_u
.ptr; }
4875 &reg_endzp[rp->rs_no]){ if ((rex.reg_match == ((void*)0))) *(&reg_endzpos[rp->
rs_no]) = (&rp->rs_un.sesave)->se_u.pos; else *(&
reg_endzp[rp->rs_no]) = (&rp->rs_un.sesave)->se_u
.ptr; };
4876 regstack_pop(&scan);
4877 break;
4878
4879 case RS_BRANCH:
4880 if (status == RA_MATCH4)
4881 /* this branch matched, use it */
4882 regstack_pop(&scan);
4883 else {
4884 if (status != RA_BREAK3) {
4885 /* After a non-matching branch: try next one. */
4886 reg_restore(&rp->rs_un.regsave, &backpos);
4887 scan = rp->rs_scan;
4888 }
4889 if (scan == NULL((void*)0) || OP(scan)((int)*(scan)) != BRANCH3) {
4890 /* no more branches, didn't find a match */
4891 status = RA_NOMATCH5;
4892 regstack_pop(&scan);
4893 } else {
4894 /* Prepare to try a branch. */
4895 rp->rs_scan = regnext(scan);
4896 reg_save(&rp->rs_un.regsave, &backpos);
4897 scan = OPERAND(scan)((scan) + 3);
4898 }
4899 }
4900 break;
4901
4902 case RS_BRCPLX_MORE:
4903 /* Pop the state. Restore pointers when there is no match. */
4904 if (status == RA_NOMATCH5) {
4905 reg_restore(&rp->rs_un.regsave, &backpos);
4906 --brace_count[rp->rs_no]; /* decrement match count */
4907 }
4908 regstack_pop(&scan);
4909 break;
4910
4911 case RS_BRCPLX_LONG:
4912 /* Pop the state. Restore pointers when there is no match. */
4913 if (status == RA_NOMATCH5) {
4914 /* There was no match, but we did find enough matches. */
4915 reg_restore(&rp->rs_un.regsave, &backpos);
4916 --brace_count[rp->rs_no];
4917 /* continue with the items after "\{}" */
4918 status = RA_CONT2;
4919 }
4920 regstack_pop(&scan);
4921 if (status == RA_CONT2)
4922 scan = regnext(scan);
4923 break;
4924
4925 case RS_BRCPLX_SHORT:
4926 /* Pop the state. Restore pointers when there is no match. */
4927 if (status == RA_NOMATCH5)
4928 /* There was no match, try to match one more item. */
4929 reg_restore(&rp->rs_un.regsave, &backpos);
4930 regstack_pop(&scan);
4931 if (status == RA_NOMATCH5) {
4932 scan = OPERAND(scan)((scan) + 3);
4933 status = RA_CONT2;
4934 }
4935 break;
4936
4937 case RS_NOMATCH:
4938 /* Pop the state. If the operand matches for NOMATCH or
4939 * doesn't match for MATCH/SUBPAT, we fail. Otherwise backup,
4940 * except for SUBPAT, and continue with the next item. */
4941 if (status == (rp->rs_no == NOMATCH10 ? RA_MATCH4 : RA_NOMATCH5))
4942 status = RA_NOMATCH5;
4943 else {
4944 status = RA_CONT2;
4945 if (rp->rs_no != SUBPAT13) /* zero-width */
4946 reg_restore(&rp->rs_un.regsave, &backpos);
4947 }
4948 regstack_pop(&scan);
4949 if (status == RA_CONT2)
4950 scan = regnext(scan);
4951 break;
4952
4953 case RS_BEHIND1:
4954 if (status == RA_NOMATCH5) {
4955 regstack_pop(&scan);
4956 regstack.ga_len -= sizeof(regbehind_T);
4957 } else {
4958 /* The stuff after BEHIND/NOBEHIND matches. Now try if
