4959 * the behind part does (not) match before the current
4960 * position in the input. This must be done at every
4961 * position in the input and checking if the match ends at
4962 * the current position. */
4963
4964 /* save the position after the found match for next */
4965 reg_save(&(((regbehind_T *)rp) - 1)->save_after, &backpos);
4966
4967 /* Start looking for a match with operand at the current
4968 * position. Go back one character until we find the
4969 * result, hitting the start of the line or the previous
4970 * line (for multi-line matching).
4971 * Set behind_pos to where the match should end, BHPOS
4972 * will match it. Save the current value. */
4973 (((regbehind_T *)rp) - 1)->save_behind = behind_pos;
4974 behind_pos = rp->rs_un.regsave;
4975
4976 rp->rs_state = RS_BEHIND2;
4977
4978 reg_restore(&rp->rs_un.regsave, &backpos);
4979 scan = OPERAND(rp->rs_scan)((rp->rs_scan) + 3) + 4;
4980 }
4981 break;
4982
4983 case RS_BEHIND2:
4984 /*
4985 * Looping for BEHIND / NOBEHIND match.
4986 */
4987 if (status == RA_MATCH4 && reg_save_equal(&behind_pos)) {
4988 /* found a match that ends where "next" started */
4989 behind_pos = (((regbehind_T *)rp) - 1)->save_behind;
4990 if (rp->rs_no == BEHIND11)
4991 reg_restore(&(((regbehind_T *)rp) - 1)->save_after,
4992 &backpos);
4993 else {
4994 /* But we didn't want a match. Need to restore the
4995 * subexpr, because what follows matched, so they have
4996 * been set. */
4997 status = RA_NOMATCH5;
4998 restore_subexpr(((regbehind_T *)rp) - 1);
4999 }
5000 regstack_pop(&scan);
5001 regstack.ga_len -= sizeof(regbehind_T);
5002 } else {
5003 long limit;
5004
5005 /* No match or a match that doesn't end where we want it: Go
5006 * back one character. May go to previous line once. */
5007 no = OK1;
5008 limit = OPERAND_MIN(rp->rs_scan)(((long)(rp->rs_scan)[3] << 24) + ((long)(rp->rs_scan
)[4] << 16) + ((long)(rp->rs_scan)[5] << 8) + (
long)(rp->rs_scan)[6]);
5009 if (REG_MULTI(rex.reg_match == ((void*)0))) {
5010 if (limit > 0
5011 && ((rp->rs_un.regsave.rs_u.pos.lnum
5012 < behind_pos.rs_u.pos.lnum
5013 ? (colnr_T)STRLEN(rex.line)strlen((char *)(rex.line))
5014 : behind_pos.rs_u.pos.col)
5015 - rp->rs_un.regsave.rs_u.pos.col >= limit))
5016 no = FAIL0;
5017 else if (rp->rs_un.regsave.rs_u.pos.col == 0) {
5018 if (rp->rs_un.regsave.rs_u.pos.lnum
5019 < behind_pos.rs_u.pos.lnum
5020 || reg_getline(
5021 --rp->rs_un.regsave.rs_u.pos.lnum)
5022 == NULL((void*)0))
5023 no = FAIL0;
5024 else {
5025 reg_restore(&rp->rs_un.regsave, &backpos);
5026 rp->rs_un.regsave.rs_u.pos.col =
5027 (colnr_T)STRLEN(rex.line)strlen((char *)(rex.line));
5028 }
5029 } else {
5030 const char_u *const line =
5031 reg_getline(rp->rs_un.regsave.rs_u.pos.lnum);
5032
5033 rp->rs_un.regsave.rs_u.pos.col -=
5034 utf_head_off(line,
5035 line + rp->rs_un.regsave.rs_u.pos.col - 1)
5036 + 1;
5037 }
5038 } else {
5039 if (rp->rs_un.regsave.rs_u.ptr == rex.line) {
5040 no = FAIL0;
5041 } else {
5042 MB_PTR_BACK(rex.line, rp->rs_un.regsave.rs_u.ptr)(rp->rs_un.regsave.rs_u.ptr -= utf_head_off((char_u *)rex.
line, (char_u *)rp->rs_un.regsave.rs_u.ptr - 1) + 1);
5043 if (limit > 0
5044 && (long)(behind_pos.rs_u.ptr
5045 - rp->rs_un.regsave.rs_u.ptr) > limit) {
5046 no = FAIL0;
5047 }
5048 }
5049 }
5050 if (no == OK1) {
5051 /* Advanced, prepare for finding match again. */
5052 reg_restore(&rp->rs_un.regsave, &backpos);
5053 scan = OPERAND(rp->rs_scan)((rp->rs_scan) + 3) + 4;
5054 if (status == RA_MATCH4) {
5055 /* We did match, so subexpr may have been changed,
5056 * need to restore them for the next try. */
5057 status = RA_NOMATCH5;
5058 restore_subexpr(((regbehind_T *)rp) - 1);
5059 }
5060 } else {
5061 /* Can't advance. For NOBEHIND that's a match. */
5062 behind_pos = (((regbehind_T *)rp) - 1)->save_behind;
5063 if (rp->rs_no == NOBEHIND12) {
5064 reg_restore(&(((regbehind_T *)rp) - 1)->save_after,
5065 &backpos);
5066 status = RA_MATCH4;
5067 } else {
5068 /* We do want a proper match. Need to restore the
5069 * subexpr if we had a match, because they may have
5070 * been set. */
5071 if (status == RA_MATCH4) {
5072 status = RA_NOMATCH5;
5073 restore_subexpr(((regbehind_T *)rp) - 1);
5074 }
5075 }
5076 regstack_pop(&scan);
5077 regstack.ga_len -= sizeof(regbehind_T);
5078 }
5079 }
5080 break;
5081
5082 case RS_STAR_LONG:
5083 case RS_STAR_SHORT:
5084 {
5085 regstar_T *rst = ((regstar_T *)rp) - 1;
5086
5087 if (status == RA_MATCH4) {
5088 regstack_pop(&scan);
5089 regstack.ga_len -= sizeof(regstar_T);
5090 break;
5091 }
5092
5093 /* Tried once already, restore input pointers. */
5094 if (status != RA_BREAK3)
5095 reg_restore(&rp->rs_un.regsave, &backpos);
5096
5097 /* Repeat until we found a position where it could match. */
5098 for (;; ) {
5099 if (status != RA_BREAK3) {
5100 /* Tried first position already, advance. */
5101 if (rp->rs_state == RS_STAR_LONG) {
5102 /* Trying for longest match, but couldn't or
5103 * didn't match -- back up one char. */
5104 if (--rst->count < rst->minval)
5105 break;
5106 if (rex.input == rex.line) {
5107 // backup to last char of previous line
5108 rex.lnum--;
5109 rex.line = reg_getline(rex.lnum);
5110 // Just in case regrepeat() didn't count right.
5111 if (rex.line == NULL((void*)0)) {
5112 break;
5113 }
5114 rex.input = rex.line + STRLEN(rex.line)strlen((char *)(rex.line));
5115 fast_breakcheck();
5116 } else {
5117 MB_PTR_BACK(rex.line, rex.input)(rex.input -= utf_head_off((char_u *)rex.line, (char_u *)rex.
input - 1) + 1);
5118 }
5119 } else {
5120 /* Range is backwards, use shortest match first.
5121 * Careful: maxval and minval are exchanged!
5122 * Couldn't or didn't match: try advancing one
5123 * char. */
5124 if (rst->count == rst->minval
5125 || regrepeat(OPERAND(rp->rs_scan)((rp->rs_scan) + 3), 1L) == 0)
5126 break;
5127 ++rst->count;
5128 }
5129 if (got_int)
5130 break;
5131 } else
5132 status = RA_NOMATCH5;
5133
5134 // If it could match, try it.
5135 if (rst->nextb == NUL'\000' || *rex.input == rst->nextb
5136 || *rex.input == rst->nextb_ic) {
5137 reg_save(&rp->rs_un.regsave, &backpos);
5138 scan = regnext(rp->rs_scan);
5139 status = RA_CONT2;
5140 break;
5141 }
5142 }
5143 if (status != RA_CONT2) {
5144 /* Failed. */
5145 regstack_pop(&scan);
5146 regstack.ga_len -= sizeof(regstar_T);
5147 status = RA_NOMATCH5;
5148 }
5149 }
5150 break;
5151 }
5152
5153 /* If we want to continue the inner loop or didn't pop a state
5154 * continue matching loop */
5155 if (status == RA_CONT2 || rp == (regitem_T *)
5156 ((char *)regstack.ga_data + regstack.ga_len) - 1)
5157 break;
5158 }
5159
5160 /* May need to continue with the inner loop, starting at "scan". */
5161 if (status == RA_CONT2)
5162 continue;
5163
5164 /*
5165 * If the regstack is empty or something failed we are done.
5166 */
5167 if (GA_EMPTY(&regstack)((&regstack)->ga_len <= 0) || status == RA_FAIL1) {
5168 if (scan == NULL((void*)0)) {
5169 /*
5170 * We get here only if there's trouble -- normally "case END" is
5171 * the terminating point.
5172 */
5173 IEMSG(_(e_re_corr))iemsg((const char *)(gettext((char *)(e_re_corr))));
5174#ifdef REGEXP_DEBUG
5175 printf("Premature EOL\n");
5176#endif
5177 }
5178 return status == RA_MATCH4;
5179 }
5180
5181 } /* End of loop until the regstack is empty. */
5182
5183 /* NOTREACHED */
5184}
5185
5186/*
5187 * Push an item onto the regstack.
5188 * Returns pointer to new item. Returns NULL when out of memory.
5189 */
5190static regitem_T *regstack_push(regstate_T state, char_u *scan)
5191{
5192 regitem_T *rp;
5193
5194 if ((long)((unsigned)regstack.ga_len >> 10) >= p_mmp) {
5195 EMSG(_(e_maxmempat))emsg((char_u *)(gettext((char *)(e_maxmempat))));
5196 return NULL((void*)0);
5197 }
5198 ga_grow(&regstack, sizeof(regitem_T));
5199
5200 rp = (regitem_T *)((char *)regstack.ga_data + regstack.ga_len);
5201 rp->rs_state = state;
5202 rp->rs_scan = scan;
5203
5204 regstack.ga_len += sizeof(regitem_T);
5205 return rp;
5206}
5207
5208/*
5209 * Pop an item from the regstack.
5210 */
5211static void regstack_pop(char_u **scan)
5212{
5213 regitem_T *rp;
5214
5215 rp = (regitem_T *)((char *)regstack.ga_data + regstack.ga_len) - 1;
5216 *scan = rp->rs_scan;
5217
5218 regstack.ga_len -= sizeof(regitem_T);
5219}
5220
5221/*
5222 * regrepeat - repeatedly match something simple, return how many.
5223 * Advances rex.input (and rex.lnum) to just after the matched chars.
5224 */
5225static int
5226regrepeat (
5227 char_u *p,
5228 long maxcount /* maximum number of matches allowed */
5229)
5230{
5231 long count = 0;
5232 char_u *opnd;
5233 int mask;
5234 int testval = 0;
5235
5236 char_u *scan = rex.input; // Make local copy of rex.input for speed.
5237 opnd = OPERAND(p)((p) + 3);
5238 switch (OP(p)((int)*(p))) {
5239 case ANY20:
5240 case ANY20 + ADD_NL30:
5241 while (count < maxcount) {
5242 /* Matching anything means we continue until end-of-line (or
5243 * end-of-file for ANY + ADD_NL), only limited by maxcount. */
5244 while (*scan != NUL'\000' && count < maxcount) {
5245 count++;
5246 MB_PTR_ADV(scan)(scan += utfc_ptr2len((char_u *)scan));
5247 }
5248 if (!REG_MULTI(rex.reg_match == ((void*)0)) || !WITH_NL(OP(p))((((int)*(p))) >= 20 + 30 && (((int)*(p))) <= 48
+ 30) || rex.lnum > rex.reg_maxline
5249 || rex.reg_line_lbr || count == maxcount) {
5250 break;
5251 }
5252 count++; // count the line-break
5253 reg_nextline();
5254 scan = rex.input;
5255 if (got_int) {
5256 break;
5257 }
5258 }
5259 break;
5260
5261 case IDENT23:
5262 case IDENT23 + ADD_NL30:
5263 testval = 1;
5264 FALLTHROUGH{} __attribute__((fallthrough));
5265 case SIDENT24:
5266 case SIDENT24 + ADD_NL30:
5267 while (count < maxcount) {
5268 if (vim_isIDc(PTR2CHAR(scan)utf_ptr2char(scan)) && (testval || !ascii_isdigit(*scan))) {
5269 MB_PTR_ADV(scan)(scan += utfc_ptr2len((char_u *)scan));
5270 } else if (*scan == NUL'\000') {
5271 if (!REG_MULTI(rex.reg_match == ((void*)0)) || !WITH_NL(OP(p))((((int)*(p))) >= 20 + 30 && (((int)*(p))) <= 48
+ 30) || rex.lnum > rex.reg_maxline
5272 || rex.reg_line_lbr) {
5273 break;
5274 }
5275 reg_nextline();
5276 scan = rex.input;
5277 if (got_int) {
5278 break;
5279 }
5280 } else if (rex.reg_line_lbr && *scan == '\n' && WITH_NL(OP(p))((((int)*(p))) >= 20 + 30 && (((int)*(p))) <= 48
+ 30)) {
5281 scan++;
5282 } else {
5283 break;
5284 }
5285 ++count;
5286 }
5287 break;
5288
5289 case KWORD25:
5290 case KWORD25 + ADD_NL30:
5291 testval = 1;
5292 FALLTHROUGH{} __attribute__((fallthrough));
5293 case SKWORD26:
5294 case SKWORD26 + ADD_NL30:
5295 while (count < maxcount) {
5296 if (vim_iswordp_buf(scan, rex.reg_buf)
5297 && (testval || !ascii_isdigit(*scan))) {
5298 MB_PTR_ADV(scan)(scan += utfc_ptr2len((char_u *)scan));
5299 } else if (*scan == NUL'\000') {
5300 if (!REG_MULTI(rex.reg_match == ((void*)0)) || !WITH_NL(OP(p))((((int)*(p))) >= 20 + 30 && (((int)*(p))) <= 48
+ 30) || rex.lnum > rex.reg_maxline
5301 || rex.reg_line_lbr) {
5302 break;
5303 }
5304 reg_nextline();
5305 scan = rex.input;
5306 if (got_int) {
5307 break;
5308 }
5309 } else if (rex.reg_line_lbr && *scan == '\n' && WITH_NL(OP(p))((((int)*(p))) >= 20 + 30 && (((int)*(p))) <= 48
+ 30)) {
5310 scan++;
5311 } else {
5312 break;
5313 }
5314 count++;
5315 }
5316 break;
5317
5318 case FNAME27:
5319 case FNAME27 + ADD_NL30:
5320 testval = 1;
5321 FALLTHROUGH{} __attribute__((fallthrough));
5322 case SFNAME28:
5323 case SFNAME28 + ADD_NL30:
5324 while (count < maxcount) {
5325 if (vim_isfilec(PTR2CHAR(scan)utf_ptr2char(scan)) && (testval || !ascii_isdigit(*scan))) {
5326 MB_PTR_ADV(scan)(scan += utfc_ptr2len((char_u *)scan));
5327 } else if (*scan == NUL'\000') {
5328 if (!REG_MULTI(rex.reg_match == ((void*)0)) || !WITH_NL(OP(p))((((int)*(p))) >= 20 + 30 && (((int)*(p))) <= 48
+ 30) || rex.lnum > rex.reg_maxline
5329 || rex.reg_line_lbr) {
5330 break;
5331 }
5332 reg_nextline();
5333 scan = rex.input;
5334 if (got_int) {
5335 break;
5336 }
5337 } else if (rex.reg_line_lbr && *scan == '\n' && WITH_NL(OP(p))((((int)*(p))) >= 20 + 30 && (((int)*(p))) <= 48
+ 30)) {
5338 scan++;
5339 } else {
5340 break;
5341 }
5342 count++;
5343 }
5344 break;
5345
5346 case PRINT29:
5347 case PRINT29 + ADD_NL30:
5348 testval = 1;
5349 FALLTHROUGH{} __attribute__((fallthrough));
5350 case SPRINT30:
5351 case SPRINT30 + ADD_NL30:
5352 while (count < maxcount) {
5353 if (*scan == NUL'\000') {
5354 if (!REG_MULTI(rex.reg_match == ((void*)0)) || !WITH_NL(OP(p))((((int)*(p))) >= 20 + 30 && (((int)*(p))) <= 48
+ 30) || rex.lnum > rex.reg_maxline
5355 || rex.reg_line_lbr) {
5356 break;
5357 }
5358 reg_nextline();
5359 scan = rex.input;
5360 if (got_int) {
5361 break;
5362 }
5363 } else if (vim_isprintc(PTR2CHAR(scan)utf_ptr2char(scan)) == 1
5364 && (testval || !ascii_isdigit(*scan))) {
5365 MB_PTR_ADV(scan)(scan += utfc_ptr2len((char_u *)scan));
5366 } else if (rex.reg_line_lbr && *scan == '\n' && WITH_NL(OP(p))((((int)*(p))) >= 20 + 30 && (((int)*(p))) <= 48
+ 30)) {
5367 scan++;
5368 } else {
5369 break;
5370 }
5371 count++;
5372 }
5373 break;
5374
5375 case WHITE31:
5376 case WHITE31 + ADD_NL30:
5377 testval = mask = RI_WHITE0x100;
5378do_class:
5379 while (count < maxcount) {
5380 int l;
5381 if (*scan == NUL'\000') {
5382 if (!REG_MULTI(rex.reg_match == ((void*)0)) || !WITH_NL(OP(p))((((int)*(p))) >= 20 + 30 && (((int)*(p))) <= 48
+ 30) || rex.lnum > rex.reg_maxline
5383 || rex.reg_line_lbr) {
5384 break;
5385 }
5386 reg_nextline();
5387 scan = rex.input;
5388 if (got_int) {
5389 break;
5390 }
5391 } else if ((l = (*mb_ptr2lenutfc_ptr2len)(scan)) > 1) {
5392 if (testval != 0) {
5393 break;
5394 }
5395 scan += l;
5396 } else if ((class_tab[*scan] & mask) == testval) {
5397 scan++;
5398 } else if (rex.reg_line_lbr && *scan == '\n' && WITH_NL(OP(p))((((int)*(p))) >= 20 + 30 && (((int)*(p))) <= 48
+ 30)) {
5399 scan++;
5400 } else {
5401 break;
5402 }
5403 ++count;
5404 }
5405 break;
5406
5407 case NWHITE32:
5408 case NWHITE32 + ADD_NL30:
5409 mask = RI_WHITE0x100;
5410 goto do_class;
5411 case DIGIT33:
5412 case DIGIT33 + ADD_NL30:
5413 testval = mask = RI_DIGIT0x01;
5414 goto do_class;
5415 case NDIGIT34:
5416 case NDIGIT34 + ADD_NL30:
5417 mask = RI_DIGIT0x01;
5418 goto do_class;
5419 case HEX35:
5420 case HEX35 + ADD_NL30:
5421 testval = mask = RI_HEX0x02;
5422 goto do_class;
5423 case NHEX36:
5424 case NHEX36 + ADD_NL30:
5425 mask = RI_HEX0x02;
5426 goto do_class;
5427 case OCTAL37:
5428 case OCTAL37 + ADD_NL30:
5429 testval = mask = RI_OCTAL0x04;
5430 goto do_class;
5431 case NOCTAL38:
5432 case NOCTAL38 + ADD_NL30:
5433 mask = RI_OCTAL0x04;
5434 goto do_class;
5435 case WORD39:
5436 case WORD39 + ADD_NL30:
5437 testval = mask = RI_WORD0x08;
5438 goto do_class;
5439 case NWORD40:
5440 case NWORD40 + ADD_NL30:
5441 mask = RI_WORD0x08;
5442 goto do_class;
5443 case HEAD41:
5444 case HEAD41 + ADD_NL30:
5445 testval = mask = RI_HEAD0x10;
5446 goto do_class;
5447 case NHEAD42:
5448 case NHEAD42 + ADD_NL30:
5449 mask = RI_HEAD0x10;
5450 goto do_class;
5451 case ALPHA43:
5452 case ALPHA43 + ADD_NL30:
5453 testval = mask = RI_ALPHA0x20;
5454 goto do_class;
5455 case NALPHA44:
5456 case NALPHA44 + ADD_NL30:
5457 mask = RI_ALPHA0x20;
5458 goto do_class;
5459 case LOWER45:
5460 case LOWER45 + ADD_NL30:
5461 testval = mask = RI_LOWER0x40;
5462 goto do_class;
5463 case NLOWER46:
5464 case NLOWER46 + ADD_NL30:
5465 mask = RI_LOWER0x40;
5466 goto do_class;
5467 case UPPER47:
5468 case UPPER47 + ADD_NL30:
5469 testval = mask = RI_UPPER0x80;
5470 goto do_class;
5471 case NUPPER48:
5472 case NUPPER48 + ADD_NL30:
5473 mask = RI_UPPER0x80;
5474 goto do_class;
5475
5476 case EXACTLY5:
5477 {
5478 int cu, cl;
5479
5480 // This doesn't do a multi-byte character, because a MULTIBYTECODE
5481 // would have been used for it. It does handle single-byte
5482 // characters, such as latin1.
5483 if (rex.reg_ic) {
5484 cu = mb_toupper(*opnd);
5485 cl = mb_tolower(*opnd);
5486 while (count < maxcount && (*scan == cu || *scan == cl)) {
5487 count++;
5488 scan++;
5489 }
5490 } else {
5491 cu = *opnd;
5492 while (count < maxcount && *scan == cu) {
5493 count++;
5494 scan++;
5495 }
5496 }
5497 break;
5498 }
5499
5500 case MULTIBYTECODE200:
5501 {
5502 int i, len, cf = 0;
5503
5504 /* Safety check (just in case 'encoding' was changed since
5505 * compiling the program). */
5506 if ((len = (*mb_ptr2lenutfc_ptr2len)(opnd)) > 1) {
5507 if (rex.reg_ic) {
5508 cf = utf_fold(utf_ptr2char(opnd));
5509 }
5510 while (count < maxcount && (*mb_ptr2lenutfc_ptr2len)(scan) >= len) {
5511 for (i = 0; i < len; ++i) {
5512 if (opnd[i] != scan[i]) {
5513 break;
5514 }
5515 }
5516 if (i < len && (!rex.reg_ic
5517 || utf_fold(utf_ptr2char(scan)) != cf)) {
5518 break;
5519 }
5520 scan += len;
5521 ++count;
5522 }
5523 }
5524 }
5525 break;
5526
5527 case ANYOF21:
5528 case ANYOF21 + ADD_NL30:
5529 testval = 1;
5530 FALLTHROUGH{} __attribute__((fallthrough));
5531
5532 case ANYBUT22:
5533 case ANYBUT22 + ADD_NL30:
5534 while (count < maxcount) {
5535 int len;
5536 if (*scan == NUL'\000') {
5537 if (!REG_MULTI(rex.reg_match == ((void*)0)) || !WITH_NL(OP(p))((((int)*(p))) >= 20 + 30 && (((int)*(p))) <= 48
+ 30) || rex.lnum > rex.reg_maxline
5538 || rex.reg_line_lbr) {
5539 break;
5540 }
5541 reg_nextline();
5542 scan = rex.input;
5543 if (got_int) {
5544 break;
5545 }
5546 } else if (rex.reg_line_lbr && *scan == '\n' && WITH_NL(OP(p))((((int)*(p))) >= 20 + 30 && (((int)*(p))) <= 48
+ 30)) {
5547 scan++;
5548 } else if ((len = utfc_ptr2len(scan)) > 1) {
5549 if ((cstrchr(opnd, utf_ptr2char(scan)) == NULL((void*)0)) == testval) {
5550 break;
5551 }
5552 scan += len;
5553 } else {
5554 if ((cstrchr(opnd, *scan) == NULL((void*)0)) == testval)
5555 break;
5556 ++scan;
5557 }
5558 ++count;
5559 }
5560 break;
5561
5562 case NEWL18:
5563 while (count < maxcount
5564 && ((*scan == NUL'\000' && rex.lnum <= rex.reg_maxline && !rex.reg_line_lbr
5565 && REG_MULTI(rex.reg_match == ((void*)0))) || (*scan == '\n' && rex.reg_line_lbr))) {
5566 count++;
5567 if (rex.reg_line_lbr) {
5568 ADVANCE_REGINPUT()(rex.input += utfc_ptr2len((char_u *)rex.input));
5569 } else {
5570 reg_nextline();
5571 }
5572 scan = rex.input;
5573 if (got_int) {
5574 break;
5575 }
5576 }
5577 break;
5578
5579 default: // Oh dear. Called inappropriately.
5580 IEMSG(_(e_re_corr))iemsg((const char *)(gettext((char *)(e_re_corr))));
5581#ifdef REGEXP_DEBUG
5582 printf("Called regrepeat with op code %d\n", OP(p)((int)*(p)));
5583#endif
5584 break;
5585 }
5586
5587 rex.input = scan;
5588
5589 return (int)count;
5590}
5591
5592/*
5593 * regnext - dig the "next" pointer out of a node
5594 * Returns NULL when calculating size, when there is no next item and when
5595 * there is an error.
5596 */
5597static char_u *regnext(char_u *p)
5598 FUNC_ATTR_NONNULL_ALL
5599{
5600 int offset;
5601
5602 if (p == JUST_CALC_SIZE((char_u *) -1) || reg_toolong)
5603 return NULL((void*)0);
5604
5605 offset = NEXT(p)(((*((p) + 1) & 0377) << 8) + (*((p) + 2) & 0377
));
5606 if (offset == 0)
5607 return NULL((void*)0);
5608
5609 if (OP(p)((int)*(p)) == BACK4)
5610 return p - offset;
5611 else
5612 return p + offset;
5613}
5614
5615/*
5616 * Check the regexp program for its magic number.
5617 * Return true if it's wrong.
5618 */
5619static int prog_magic_wrong(void)
5620{
5621 regprog_T *prog;
5622
5623 prog = REG_MULTI(rex.reg_match == ((void*)0)) ? rex.reg_mmatch->regprog : rex.reg_match->regprog;
5624 if (prog->engine == &nfa_regengine) {
5625 // For NFA matcher we don't check the magic
5626 return false0;
5627 }
5628
5629 if (UCHARAT(((bt_regprog_T *)prog)->program)((int)*(char_u *)(((bt_regprog_T *)prog)->program)) != REGMAGIC0234) {
5630 EMSG(_(e_re_corr))emsg((char_u *)(gettext((char *)(e_re_corr))));
5631 return true1;
5632 }
5633 return false0;
5634}
5635
5636/*
5637 * Cleanup the subexpressions, if this wasn't done yet.
5638 * This construction is used to clear the subexpressions only when they are
5639 * used (to increase speed).
5640 */
5641static void cleanup_subexpr(void)
5642{
5643 if (rex.need_clear_subexpr) {
5644 if (REG_MULTI(rex.reg_match == ((void*)0))) {
5645 // Use 0xff to set lnum to -1
5646 memset(rex.reg_startpos, 0xff, sizeof(lpos_T) * NSUBEXP10);
5647 memset(rex.reg_endpos, 0xff, sizeof(lpos_T) * NSUBEXP10);
5648 } else {
5649 memset(rex.reg_startp, 0, sizeof(char_u *) * NSUBEXP10);
5650 memset(rex.reg_endp, 0, sizeof(char_u *) * NSUBEXP10);
5651 }
5652 rex.need_clear_subexpr = false0;
5653 }
5654}
5655
5656static void cleanup_zsubexpr(void)
5657{
5658 if (rex.need_clear_zsubexpr) {
5659 if (REG_MULTI(rex.reg_match == ((void*)0))) {
5660 /* Use 0xff to set lnum to -1 */
5661 memset(reg_startzpos, 0xff, sizeof(lpos_T) * NSUBEXP10);
5662 memset(reg_endzpos, 0xff, sizeof(lpos_T) * NSUBEXP10);
5663 } else {
5664 memset(reg_startzp, 0, sizeof(char_u *) * NSUBEXP10);
5665 memset(reg_endzp, 0, sizeof(char_u *) * NSUBEXP10);
5666 }
5667 rex.need_clear_zsubexpr = false0;
5668 }
5669}
5670
5671// Save the current subexpr to "bp", so that they can be restored
5672// later by restore_subexpr().
5673static void save_subexpr(regbehind_T *bp)
5674 FUNC_ATTR_NONNULL_ALL
5675{
5676 // When "rex.need_clear_subexpr" is set we don't need to save the values, only
5677 // remember that this flag needs to be set again when restoring.
5678 bp->save_need_clear_subexpr = rex.need_clear_subexpr;
5679 if (!rex.need_clear_subexpr) {
5680 for (int i = 0; i < NSUBEXP10; i++) {
5681 if (REG_MULTI(rex.reg_match == ((void*)0))) {
5682 bp->save_start[i].se_u.pos = rex.reg_startpos[i];
5683 bp->save_end[i].se_u.pos = rex.reg_endpos[i];
5684 } else {
5685 bp->save_start[i].se_u.ptr = rex.reg_startp[i];
5686 bp->save_end[i].se_u.ptr = rex.reg_endp[i];
5687 }
5688 }
5689 }
5690}
5691
5692// Restore the subexpr from "bp".
5693static void restore_subexpr(regbehind_T *bp)
5694 FUNC_ATTR_NONNULL_ALL
5695{
5696 // Only need to restore saved values when they are not to be cleared.
5697 rex.need_clear_subexpr = bp->save_need_clear_subexpr;
5698 if (!rex.need_clear_subexpr) {
5699 for (int i = 0; i < NSUBEXP10; i++) {
5700 if (REG_MULTI(rex.reg_match == ((void*)0))) {
5701 rex.reg_startpos[i] = bp->save_start[i].se_u.pos;
5702 rex.reg_endpos[i] = bp->save_end[i].se_u.pos;
5703 } else {
5704 rex.reg_startp[i] = bp->save_start[i].se_u.ptr;
5705 rex.reg_endp[i] = bp->save_end[i].se_u.ptr;
5706 }
5707 }
5708 }
5709}
5710
5711// Advance rex.lnum, rex.line and rex.input to the next line.
5712static void reg_nextline(void)
5713{
5714 rex.line = reg_getline(++rex.lnum);
5715 rex.input = rex.line;
5716 fast_breakcheck();
5717}
5718
5719// Save the input line and position in a regsave_T.
5720static void reg_save(regsave_T *save, garray_T *gap)
5721 FUNC_ATTR_NONNULL_ALL
5722{
5723 if (REG_MULTI(rex.reg_match == ((void*)0))) {
5724 save->rs_u.pos.col = (colnr_T)(rex.input - rex.line);
5725 save->rs_u.pos.lnum = rex.lnum;
5726 } else {
5727 save->rs_u.ptr = rex.input;
5728 }
5729 save->rs_len = gap->ga_len;
5730}
5731
5732// Restore the input line and position from a regsave_T.
5733static void reg_restore(regsave_T *save, garray_T *gap)
5734 FUNC_ATTR_NONNULL_ALL
5735{
5736 if (REG_MULTI(rex.reg_match == ((void*)0))) {
5737 if (rex.lnum != save->rs_u.pos.lnum) {
5738 // only call reg_getline() when the line number changed to save
5739 // a bit of time
5740 rex.lnum = save->rs_u.pos.lnum;
5741 rex.line = reg_getline(rex.lnum);
5742 }
5743 rex.input = rex.line + save->rs_u.pos.col;
5744 } else {
5745 rex.input = save->rs_u.ptr;
5746 }
5747 gap->ga_len = save->rs_len;
5748}
5749
5750// Return true if current position is equal to saved position.
5751static bool_Bool reg_save_equal(const regsave_T *save)
5752 FUNC_ATTR_NONNULL_ALL
5753{
5754 if (REG_MULTI(rex.reg_match == ((void*)0))) {
5755 return rex.lnum == save->rs_u.pos.lnum
5756 && rex.input == rex.line + save->rs_u.pos.col;
5757 }
5758 return rex.input == save->rs_u.ptr;
5759}
5760
5761/*
5762 * Tentatively set the sub-expression start to the current position (after
5763 * calling regmatch() they will have changed). Need to save the existing
5764 * values for when there is no match.
5765 * Use se_save() to use pointer (save_se_multi()) or position (save_se_one()),
5766 * depending on REG_MULTI.
5767 */
5768static void save_se_multi(save_se_T *savep, lpos_T *posp)
5769{
5770 savep->se_u.pos = *posp;
5771 posp->lnum = rex.lnum;
5772 posp->col = (colnr_T)(rex.input - rex.line);
5773}
5774
5775static void save_se_one(save_se_T *savep, char_u **pp)
5776{
5777 savep->se_u.ptr = *pp;
5778 *pp = rex.input;
5779}
5780
5781/*
5782 * Compare a number with the operand of RE_LNUM, RE_COL or RE_VCOL.
5783 */
5784static int re_num_cmp(uint32_t val, char_u *scan)
5785{
5786 uint32_t n = (uint32_t)OPERAND_MIN(scan)(((long)(scan)[3] << 24) + ((long)(scan)[4] << 16
) + ((long)(scan)[5] << 8) + (long)(scan)[6]);
5787
5788 if (OPERAND_CMP(scan)(scan)[7] == '>')
5789 return val > n;
5790 if (OPERAND_CMP(scan)(scan)[7] == '<')
5791 return val < n;
5792 return val == n;
5793}
5794
5795/*
5796 * Check whether a backreference matches.
5797 * Returns RA_FAIL, RA_NOMATCH or RA_MATCH.
5798 * If "bytelen" is not NULL, it is set to the byte length of the match in the
5799 * last line.
5800 */
5801static int match_with_backref(linenr_T start_lnum, colnr_T start_col, linenr_T end_lnum, colnr_T end_col, int *bytelen)
5802{
5803 linenr_T clnum = start_lnum;
5804 colnr_T ccol = start_col;
5805 int len;
5806 char_u *p;
5807
5808 if (bytelen != NULL((void*)0))
5809 *bytelen = 0;
5810 for (;; ) {
5811 /* Since getting one line may invalidate the other, need to make copy.
5812 * Slow! */
5813 if (rex.line != reg_tofree) {
5814 len = (int)STRLEN(rex.line)strlen((char *)(rex.line));
5815 if (reg_tofree == NULL((void*)0) || len >= (int)reg_tofreelen) {
5816 len += 50; /* get some extra */
5817 xfree(reg_tofree);
5818 reg_tofree = xmalloc(len);
5819 reg_tofreelen = len;
5820 }
5821 STRCPY(reg_tofree, rex.line)strcpy((char *)(reg_tofree), (char *)(rex.line));
5822 rex.input = reg_tofree + (rex.input - rex.line);
5823 rex.line = reg_tofree;
5824 }
5825
5826 /* Get the line to compare with. */
5827 p = reg_getline(clnum);
5828 assert(p)((void) sizeof ((p) ? 1 : 0), __extension__ ({ if (p) ; else __assert_fail
("p", "../src/nvim/regexp.c", 5828, __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__
); }));
5829
5830 if (clnum == end_lnum)
5831 len = end_col - ccol;
5832 else
5833 len = (int)STRLEN(p + ccol)strlen((char *)(p + ccol));
5834
5835 if (cstrncmp(p + ccol, rex.input, &len) != 0) {
5836 return RA_NOMATCH5; // doesn't match
5837 }
5838 if (bytelen != NULL((void*)0)) {
5839 *bytelen += len;
5840 }
5841 if (clnum == end_lnum) {
5842 break; // match and at end!
5843 }
5844 if (rex.lnum >= rex.reg_maxline) {
5845 return RA_NOMATCH5; // text too short
5846 }
5847
5848 /* Advance to next line. */
5849 reg_nextline();
5850 if (bytelen != NULL((void*)0))
5851 *bytelen = 0;
5852 ++clnum;
5853 ccol = 0;
5854 if (got_int)
5855 return RA_FAIL1;
5856 }
5857
5858 // found a match! Note that rex.line may now point to a copy of the line,
5859 // that should not matter.
5860 return RA_MATCH4;
5861}
5862
5863#ifdef BT_REGEXP_DUMP
5864
5865/*
5866 * regdump - dump a regexp onto stdout in vaguely comprehensible form
5867 */
5868static void regdump(char_u *pattern, bt_regprog_T *r)
5869{
5870 char_u *s;
5871 int op = EXACTLY5; /* Arbitrary non-END op. */
5872 char_u *next;
5873 char_u *end = NULL((void*)0);
5874 FILE *f;
5875
5876#ifdef BT_REGEXP_LOG
5877 f = fopen("bt_regexp_log.log", "a");
5878#else
5879 f = stdoutstdout;
5880#endif
5881 if (f == NULL((void*)0))
5882 return;
5883 fprintf(f, "-------------------------------------\n\r\nregcomp(%s):\r\n",
5884 pattern);
5885
5886 s = r->program + 1;
5887 /*
5888 * Loop until we find the END that isn't before a referred next (an END
5889 * can also appear in a NOMATCH operand).
5890 */
5891 while (op != END0 || s <= end) {
5892 op = OP(s)((int)*(s));
5893 fprintf(f, "%2d%s", (int)(s - r->program), regprop(s)); /* Where, what. */
5894 next = regnext(s);
5895 if (next == NULL((void*)0)) /* Next ptr. */
5896 fprintf(f, "(0)");
5897 else
5898 fprintf(f, "(%d)", (int)((s - r->program) + (next - s)));
5899 if (end < next)
5900 end = next;
5901 if (op == BRACE_LIMITS17) {
5902 /* Two ints */
5903 fprintf(f, " minval %" PRId64"l" "d" ", maxval %" PRId64"l" "d",
5904 (int64_t)OPERAND_MIN(s)(((long)(s)[3] << 24) + ((long)(s)[4] << 16) + ((
long)(s)[5] << 8) + (long)(s)[6]), (int64_t)OPERAND_MAX(s)(((long)((s) + 4)[3] << 24) + ((long)((s) + 4)[4] <<
16) + ((long)((s) + 4)[5] << 8) + (long)((s) + 4)[6]));
5905 s += 8;
5906 } else if (op == BEHIND11 || op == NOBEHIND12) {
5907 /* one int */
5908 fprintf(f, " count %" PRId64"l" "d", (int64_t)OPERAND_MIN(s)(((long)(s)[3] << 24) + ((long)(s)[4] << 16) + ((
long)(s)[5] << 8) + (long)(s)[6]));
5909 s += 4;
5910 } else if (op == RE_LNUM204 || op == RE_COL205 || op == RE_VCOL206) {
5911 // one int plus comparator
5912 fprintf(f, " count %" PRId64"l" "d", (int64_t)OPERAND_MIN(s)(((long)(s)[3] << 24) + ((long)(s)[4] << 16) + ((
long)(s)[5] << 8) + (long)(s)[6]));
5913 s += 5;
5914 }
5915 s += 3;
5916 if (op == ANYOF21 || op == ANYOF21 + ADD_NL30
5917 || op == ANYBUT22 || op == ANYBUT22 + ADD_NL30
5918 || op == EXACTLY5) {
5919 /* Literal string, where present. */
5920 fprintf(f, "\nxxxxxxxxx\n");
5921 while (*s != NUL'\000')
5922 fprintf(f, "%c", *s++);
5923 fprintf(f, "\nxxxxxxxxx\n");
5924 s++;
5925 }
5926 fprintf(f, "\r\n");
5927 }
5928
5929 /* Header fields of interest. */
5930 if (r->regstart != NUL'\000')
5931 fprintf(f, "start `%s' 0x%x; ", r->regstart < 256
5932 ? (char *)transchar(r->regstart)
5933 : "multibyte", r->regstart);
5934 if (r->reganch)
5935 fprintf(f, "anchored; ");
5936 if (r->regmust != NULL((void*)0))
5937 fprintf(f, "must have \"%s\"", r->regmust);
5938 fprintf(f, "\r\n");
5939
5940#ifdef BT_REGEXP_LOG
5941 fclose(f);
5942#endif
5943}
5944#endif /* BT_REGEXP_DUMP */
5945
5946#ifdef REGEXP_DEBUG
5947/*
5948 * regprop - printable representation of opcode
5949 */
5950static char_u *regprop(char_u *op)
5951{
5952 char *p;
5953 static char buf[50];
5954
5955 STRCPY(buf, ":")strcpy((char *)(buf), (char *)(":"));
5956
5957 switch ((int) OP(op)((int)*(op))) {
5958 case BOL1:
5959 p = "BOL";
5960 break;
5961 case EOL2:
5962 p = "EOL";
5963 break;
5964 case RE_BOF201:
5965 p = "BOF";
5966 break;
5967 case RE_EOF202:
5968 p = "EOF";
5969 break;
5970 case CURSOR203:
5971 p = "CURSOR";
5972 break;
5973 case RE_VISUAL208:
5974 p = "RE_VISUAL";
5975 break;
5976 case RE_LNUM204:
5977 p = "RE_LNUM";
5978 break;
5979 case RE_MARK207:
5980 p = "RE_MARK";
5981 break;
5982 case RE_COL205:
5983 p = "RE_COL";
5984 break;
5985 case RE_VCOL206:
5986 p = "RE_VCOL";
5987 break;
5988 case BOW15:
5989 p = "BOW";
5990 break;
5991 case EOW16:
5992 p = "EOW";
5993 break;
5994 case ANY20:
5995 p = "ANY";
5996 break;
5997 case ANY20 + ADD_NL30:
5998 p = "ANY+NL";
5999 break;
6000 case ANYOF21:
6001 p = "ANYOF";
6002 break;
6003 case ANYOF21 + ADD_NL30:
6004 p = "ANYOF+NL";
6005 break;
6006 case ANYBUT22:
6007 p = "ANYBUT";
6008 break;
6009 case ANYBUT22 + ADD_NL30:
6010 p = "ANYBUT+NL";
6011 break;
6012 case IDENT23:
6013 p = "IDENT";
6014 break;
6015 case IDENT23 + ADD_NL30:
6016 p = "IDENT+NL";
6017 break;
6018 case SIDENT24:
6019 p = "SIDENT";
6020 break;
6021 case SIDENT24 + ADD_NL30:
6022 p = "SIDENT+NL";
6023 break;
6024 case KWORD25:
6025 p = "KWORD";
6026 break;
6027 case KWORD25 + ADD_NL30:
6028 p = "KWORD+NL";
6029 break;
6030 case SKWORD26:
6031 p = "SKWORD";
6032 break;
6033 case SKWORD26 + ADD_NL30:
6034 p = "SKWORD+NL";
6035 break;
6036 case FNAME27:
6037 p = "FNAME";
6038 break;
6039 case FNAME27 + ADD_NL30:
6040 p = "FNAME+NL";
6041 break;
6042 case SFNAME28:
6043 p = "SFNAME";
6044 break;
6045 case SFNAME28 + ADD_NL30:
6046 p = "SFNAME+NL";
6047 break;
6048 case PRINT29:
6049 p = "PRINT";
6050 break;
6051 case PRINT29 + ADD_NL30:
6052 p = "PRINT+NL";
6053 break;
6054 case SPRINT30:
6055 p = "SPRINT";
6056 break;
6057 case SPRINT30 + ADD_NL30:
6058 p = "SPRINT+NL";
6059 break;
6060 case WHITE31:
6061 p = "WHITE";
6062 break;
6063 case WHITE31 + ADD_NL30:
6064 p = "WHITE+NL";
6065 break;
6066 case NWHITE32:
6067 p = "NWHITE";
6068 break;
6069 case NWHITE32 + ADD_NL30:
6070 p = "NWHITE+NL";
6071 break;
6072 case DIGIT33:
6073 p = "DIGIT";
6074 break;
6075 case DIGIT33 + ADD_NL30:
6076 p = "DIGIT+NL";
6077 break;
6078 case NDIGIT34:
6079 p = "NDIGIT";
6080 break;
6081 case NDIGIT34 + ADD_NL30:
6082 p = "NDIGIT+NL";
6083 break;
6084 case HEX35:
6085 p = "HEX";
6086 break;
6087 case HEX35 + ADD_NL30:
6088 p = "HEX+NL";
6089 break;
6090 case NHEX36:
6091 p = "NHEX";
6092 break;
6093 case NHEX36 + ADD_NL30:
6094 p = "NHEX+NL";
6095 break;
6096 case OCTAL37:
6097 p = "OCTAL";
6098 break;
6099 case OCTAL37 + ADD_NL30:
6100 p = "OCTAL+NL";
6101 break;
6102 case NOCTAL38:
6103 p = "NOCTAL";
6104 break;
6105 case NOCTAL38 + ADD_NL30:
6106 p = "NOCTAL+NL";
6107 break;
6108 case WORD39:
6109 p = "WORD";
6110 break;
6111 case WORD39 + ADD_NL30:
6112 p = "WORD+NL";
6113 break;
6114 case NWORD40:
6115 p = "NWORD";
6116 break;
6117 case NWORD40 + ADD_NL30:
6118 p = "NWORD+NL";
6119 break;
6120 case HEAD41:
6121 p = "HEAD";
6122 break;
6123 case HEAD41 + ADD_NL30:
6124 p = "HEAD+NL";
6125 break;
6126 case NHEAD42:
6127 p = "NHEAD";
6128 break;
6129 case NHEAD42 + ADD_NL30:
6130 p = "NHEAD+NL";
6131 break;
6132 case ALPHA43:
6133 p = "ALPHA";
6134 break;
6135 case ALPHA43 + ADD_NL30:
6136 p = "ALPHA+NL";
6137 break;
6138 case NALPHA44:
6139 p = "NALPHA";
6140 break;
6141 case NALPHA44 + ADD_NL30:
6142 p = "NALPHA+NL";
6143 break;
6144 case LOWER45:
6145 p = "LOWER";
6146 break;
6147 case LOWER45 + ADD_NL30:
6148 p = "LOWER+NL";
6149 break;
6150 case NLOWER46:
6151 p = "NLOWER";
6152 break;
6153 case NLOWER46 + ADD_NL30:
6154 p = "NLOWER+NL";
6155 break;
6156 case UPPER47:
6157 p = "UPPER";
6158 break;
6159 case UPPER47 + ADD_NL30:
6160 p = "UPPER+NL";
6161 break;
6162 case NUPPER48:
6163 p = "NUPPER";
6164 break;
6165 case NUPPER48 + ADD_NL30:
6166 p = "NUPPER+NL";
6167 break;
6168 case BRANCH3:
6169 p = "BRANCH";
6170 break;
6171 case EXACTLY5:
6172 p = "EXACTLY";
6173 break;
6174 case NOTHING6:
6175 p = "NOTHING";
6176 break;
6177 case BACK4:
6178 p = "BACK";
6179 break;
6180 case END0:
6181 p = "END";
6182 break;
6183 case MOPEN80 + 0:
6184 p = "MATCH START";
6185 break;
6186 case MOPEN80 + 1:
6187 case MOPEN80 + 2:
6188 case MOPEN80 + 3:
6189 case MOPEN80 + 4:
6190 case MOPEN80 + 5:
6191 case MOPEN80 + 6:
6192 case MOPEN80 + 7:
6193 case MOPEN80 + 8:
6194 case MOPEN80 + 9:
6195 sprintf(buf + STRLEN(buf)strlen((char *)(buf)), "MOPEN%d", OP(op)((int)*(op)) - MOPEN80);
6196 p = NULL((void*)0);
6197 break;
6198 case MCLOSE90 + 0:
6199 p = "MATCH END";
6200 break;
6201 case MCLOSE90 + 1:
6202 case MCLOSE90 + 2:
6203 case MCLOSE90 + 3:
6204 case MCLOSE90 + 4:
6205 case MCLOSE90 + 5:
6206 case MCLOSE90 + 6:
6207 case MCLOSE90 + 7:
6208 case MCLOSE90 + 8:
6209 case MCLOSE90 + 9:
6210 sprintf(buf + STRLEN(buf)strlen((char *)(buf)), "MCLOSE%d", OP(op)((int)*(op)) - MCLOSE90);
6211 p = NULL((void*)0);
6212 break;
6213 case BACKREF100 + 1:
6214 case BACKREF100 + 2:
6215 case BACKREF100 + 3:
6216 case BACKREF100 + 4:
6217 case BACKREF100 + 5:
6218 case BACKREF100 + 6:
6219 case BACKREF100 + 7:
6220 case BACKREF100 + 8:
6221 case BACKREF100 + 9:
6222 sprintf(buf + STRLEN(buf)strlen((char *)(buf)), "BACKREF%d", OP(op)((int)*(op)) - BACKREF100);
6223 p = NULL((void*)0);
6224 break;
6225 case NOPEN150:
6226 p = "NOPEN";
6227 break;
6228 case NCLOSE151:
6229 p = "NCLOSE";
6230 break;
6231 case ZOPEN110 + 1:
6232 case ZOPEN110 + 2:
6233 case ZOPEN110 + 3:
6234 case ZOPEN110 + 4:
6235 case ZOPEN110 + 5:
6236 case ZOPEN110 + 6:
6237 case ZOPEN110 + 7:
6238 case ZOPEN110 + 8:
6239 case ZOPEN110 + 9:
6240 sprintf(buf + STRLEN(buf)strlen((char *)(buf)), "ZOPEN%d", OP(op)((int)*(op)) - ZOPEN110);
6241 p = NULL((void*)0);
6242 break;
6243 case ZCLOSE120 + 1:
6244 case ZCLOSE120 + 2:
6245 case ZCLOSE120 + 3:
6246 case ZCLOSE120 + 4:
6247 case ZCLOSE120 + 5:
6248 case ZCLOSE120 + 6:
6249 case ZCLOSE120 + 7:
6250 case ZCLOSE120 + 8:
6251 case ZCLOSE120 + 9:
6252 sprintf(buf + STRLEN(buf)strlen((char *)(buf)), "ZCLOSE%d", OP(op)((int)*(op)) - ZCLOSE120);
6253 p = NULL((void*)0);
6254 break;
6255 case ZREF130 + 1:
6256 case ZREF130 + 2:
6257 case ZREF130 + 3:
6258 case ZREF130 + 4:
6259 case ZREF130 + 5:
6260 case ZREF130 + 6:
6261 case ZREF130 + 7:
6262 case ZREF130 + 8:
6263 case ZREF130 + 9:
6264 sprintf(buf + STRLEN(buf)strlen((char *)(buf)), "ZREF%d", OP(op)((int)*(op)) - ZREF130);
6265 p = NULL((void*)0);
6266 break;
6267 case STAR7:
6268 p = "STAR";
6269 break;
6270 case PLUS8:
6271 p = "PLUS";
6272 break;
6273 case NOMATCH10:
6274 p = "NOMATCH";
6275 break;
6276 case MATCH9:
6277 p = "MATCH";
6278 break;
6279 case BEHIND11:
6280 p = "BEHIND";
6281 break;
6282 case NOBEHIND12:
6283 p = "NOBEHIND";
6284 break;
6285 case SUBPAT13:
6286 p = "SUBPAT";
6287 break;
6288 case BRACE_LIMITS17:
6289 p = "BRACE_LIMITS";
6290 break;
6291 case BRACE_SIMPLE14:
6292 p = "BRACE_SIMPLE";
6293 break;
6294 case BRACE_COMPLEX140 + 0:
6295 case BRACE_COMPLEX140 + 1:
6296 case BRACE_COMPLEX140 + 2:
6297 case BRACE_COMPLEX140 + 3:
6298 case BRACE_COMPLEX140 + 4:
6299 case BRACE_COMPLEX140 + 5:
6300 case BRACE_COMPLEX140 + 6:
6301 case BRACE_COMPLEX140 + 7:
6302 case BRACE_COMPLEX140 + 8:
6303 case BRACE_COMPLEX140 + 9:
6304 sprintf(buf + STRLEN(buf)strlen((char *)(buf)), "BRACE_COMPLEX%d", OP(op)((int)*(op)) - BRACE_COMPLEX140);
6305 p = NULL((void*)0);
6306 break;
6307 case MULTIBYTECODE200:
6308 p = "MULTIBYTECODE";
6309 break;
6310 case NEWL18:
6311 p = "NEWL";
6312 break;
6313 default:
6314 sprintf(buf + STRLEN(buf)strlen((char *)(buf)), "corrupt %d", OP(op)((int)*(op)));
6315 p = NULL((void*)0);
6316 break;
6317 }
6318 if (p != NULL((void*)0))
6319 STRCAT(buf, p)strcat((char *)(buf), (char *)(p));
6320 return (char_u *)buf;
6321}
6322#endif /* REGEXP_DEBUG */
6323
6324
6325
6326/* 0xfb20 - 0xfb4f */
6327static decomp_T decomp_table[0xfb4f-0xfb20+1] =
6328{
6329 {0x5e2,0,0}, /* 0xfb20 alt ayin */
6330 {0x5d0,0,0}, /* 0xfb21 alt alef */
6331 {0x5d3,0,0}, /* 0xfb22 alt dalet */
6332 {0x5d4,0,0}, /* 0xfb23 alt he */
6333 {0x5db,0,0}, /* 0xfb24 alt kaf */
6334 {0x5dc,0,0}, /* 0xfb25 alt lamed */
6335 {0x5dd,0,0}, /* 0xfb26 alt mem-sofit */
6336 {0x5e8,0,0}, /* 0xfb27 alt resh */
6337 {0x5ea,0,0}, /* 0xfb28 alt tav */
6338 {'+', 0, 0}, /* 0xfb29 alt plus */
6339 {0x5e9, 0x5c1, 0}, /* 0xfb2a shin+shin-dot */
6340 {0x5e9, 0x5c2, 0}, /* 0xfb2b shin+sin-dot */
6341 {0x5e9, 0x5c1, 0x5bc}, /* 0xfb2c shin+shin-dot+dagesh */
6342 {0x5e9, 0x5c2, 0x5bc}, /* 0xfb2d shin+sin-dot+dagesh */
6343 {0x5d0, 0x5b7, 0}, /* 0xfb2e alef+patah */
6344 {0x5d0, 0x5b8, 0}, /* 0xfb2f alef+qamats */
6345 {0x5d0, 0x5b4, 0}, /* 0xfb30 alef+hiriq */
6346 {0x5d1, 0x5bc, 0}, /* 0xfb31 bet+dagesh */
6347 {0x5d2, 0x5bc, 0}, /* 0xfb32 gimel+dagesh */
6348 {0x5d3, 0x5bc, 0}, /* 0xfb33 dalet+dagesh */
6349 {0x5d4, 0x5bc, 0}, /* 0xfb34 he+dagesh */
6350 {0x5d5, 0x5bc, 0}, /* 0xfb35 vav+dagesh */
6351 {0x5d6, 0x5bc, 0}, /* 0xfb36 zayin+dagesh */
6352 {0xfb37, 0, 0}, /* 0xfb37 -- */
6353 {0x5d8, 0x5bc, 0}, /* 0xfb38 tet+dagesh */
6354 {0x5d9, 0x5bc, 0}, /* 0xfb39 yud+dagesh */
6355 {0x5da, 0x5bc, 0}, /* 0xfb3a kaf sofit+dagesh */
6356 {0x5db, 0x5bc, 0}, /* 0xfb3b kaf+dagesh */
6357 {0x5dc, 0x5bc, 0}, /* 0xfb3c lamed+dagesh */
6358 {0xfb3d, 0, 0}, /* 0xfb3d -- */
6359 {0x5de, 0x5bc, 0}, /* 0xfb3e mem+dagesh */
6360 {0xfb3f, 0, 0}, /* 0xfb3f -- */
6361 {0x5e0, 0x5bc, 0}, /* 0xfb40 nun+dagesh */
6362 {0x5e1, 0x5bc, 0}, /* 0xfb41 samech+dagesh */
6363 {0xfb42, 0, 0}, /* 0xfb42 -- */
6364 {0x5e3, 0x5bc, 0}, /* 0xfb43 pe sofit+dagesh */
6365 {0x5e4, 0x5bc,0}, /* 0xfb44 pe+dagesh */
6366 {0xfb45, 0, 0}, /* 0xfb45 -- */
6367 {0x5e6, 0x5bc, 0}, /* 0xfb46 tsadi+dagesh */
6368 {0x5e7, 0x5bc, 0}, /* 0xfb47 qof+dagesh */
6369 {0x5e8, 0x5bc, 0}, /* 0xfb48 resh+dagesh */
6370 {0x5e9, 0x5bc, 0}, /* 0xfb49 shin+dagesh */
6371 {0x5ea, 0x5bc, 0}, /* 0xfb4a tav+dagesh */
6372 {0x5d5, 0x5b9, 0}, /* 0xfb4b vav+holam */
6373 {0x5d1, 0x5bf, 0}, /* 0xfb4c bet+rafe */
6374 {0x5db, 0x5bf, 0}, /* 0xfb4d kaf+rafe */
6375 {0x5e4, 0x5bf, 0}, /* 0xfb4e pe+rafe */
6376 {0x5d0, 0x5dc, 0} /* 0xfb4f alef-lamed */
6377};
6378
6379static void mb_decompose(int c, int *c1, int *c2, int *c3)
6380{
6381 decomp_T d;
6382
6383 if (c >= 0xfb20 && c <= 0xfb4f) {
6384 d = decomp_table[c - 0xfb20];
6385 *c1 = d.a;
6386 *c2 = d.b;
6387 *c3 = d.c;
6388 } else {
6389 *c1 = c;
6390 *c2 = *c3 = 0;
6391 }
6392}
6393
6394// Compare two strings, ignore case if rex.reg_ic set.
6395// Return 0 if strings match, non-zero otherwise.
6396// Correct the length "*n" when composing characters are ignored.
6397static int cstrncmp(char_u *s1, char_u *s2, int *n)
6398{
6399 int result;
6400
6401 if (!rex.reg_ic) {
6402 result = STRNCMP(s1, s2, *n)strncmp((char *)(s1), (char *)(s2), (size_t)(*n));
6403 } else {
6404 assert(*n >= 0)((void) sizeof ((*n >= 0) ? 1 : 0), __extension__ ({ if (*
n >= 0) ; else __assert_fail ("*n >= 0", "../src/nvim/regexp.c"
, 6404, __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__); }));
6405 result = mb_strnicmp(s1, s2, (size_t)*n);
6406 }
6407
6408 // if it failed and it's utf8 and we want to combineignore:
6409 if (result != 0 && rex.reg_icombine) {
6410 char_u *str1, *str2;
6411 int c1, c2, c11, c12;
6412 int junk;
6413
6414 /* we have to handle the strcmp ourselves, since it is necessary to
6415 * deal with the composing characters by ignoring them: */
6416 str1 = s1;
6417 str2 = s2;
6418 c1 = c2 = 0;
6419 while ((int)(str1 - s1) < *n) {
6420 c1 = mb_ptr2char_adv((const char_u **)&str1);
6421 c2 = mb_ptr2char_adv((const char_u **)&str2);
6422
6423 /* decompose the character if necessary, into 'base' characters
6424 * because I don't care about Arabic, I will hard-code the Hebrew
6425 * which I *do* care about! So sue me... */
6426 if (c1 != c2 && (!rex.reg_ic || utf_fold(c1) != utf_fold(c2))) {
6427 // decomposition necessary?
6428 mb_decompose(c1, &c11, &junk, &junk);
6429 mb_decompose(c2, &c12, &junk, &junk);
6430 c1 = c11;
6431 c2 = c12;
6432 if (c11 != c12 && (!rex.reg_ic || utf_fold(c11) != utf_fold(c12))) {
6433 break;
6434 }
6435 }
6436 }
6437 result = c2 - c1;
6438 if (result == 0)
6439 *n = (int)(str2 - s2);
6440 }
6441
6442 return result;
6443}
6444
6445/***************************************************************
6446* regsub stuff *
6447***************************************************************/
6448
6449/* This stuff below really confuses cc on an SGI -- webb */
6450
6451
6452
6453static fptr_T do_upper(int *d, int c)
6454{
6455 *d = mb_toupper(c);
6456
6457 return (fptr_T)NULL((void*)0);
6458}
6459
6460static fptr_T do_Upper(int *d, int c)
6461{
6462 *d = mb_toupper(c);
6463
6464 return (fptr_T)do_Upper;
6465}
6466
6467static fptr_T do_lower(int *d, int c)
6468{
6469 *d = mb_tolower(c);
6470
6471 return (fptr_T)NULL((void*)0);
6472}
6473
6474static fptr_T do_Lower(int *d, int c)
6475{
6476 *d = mb_tolower(c);
6477
6478 return (fptr_T)do_Lower;
6479}
6480
6481/*
6482 * regtilde(): Replace tildes in the pattern by the old pattern.
6483 *
6484 * Short explanation of the tilde: It stands for the previous replacement
6485 * pattern. If that previous pattern also contains a ~ we should go back a
6486 * step further... But we insert the previous pattern into the current one
6487 * and remember that.
6488 * This still does not handle the case where "magic" changes. So require the
6489 * user to keep his hands off of "magic".
6490 *
6491 * The tildes are parsed once before the first call to vim_regsub().
6492 */
6493char_u *regtilde(char_u *source, int magic)
6494{
6495 char_u *newsub = source;
6496 char_u *tmpsub;
6497 char_u *p;
6498 int len;
6499 int prevlen;
6500
6501 for (p = newsub; *p; ++p) {
6502 if ((*p == '~' && magic) || (*p == '\\' && *(p + 1) == '~' && !magic)) {
6503 if (reg_prev_sub != NULL((void*)0)) {
6504 /* length = len(newsub) - 1 + len(prev_sub) + 1 */
6505 prevlen = (int)STRLEN(reg_prev_sub)strlen((char *)(reg_prev_sub));
6506 tmpsub = xmalloc(STRLEN(newsub)strlen((char *)(newsub)) + prevlen);
6507 /* copy prefix */
6508 len = (int)(p - newsub); /* not including ~ */
6509 memmove(tmpsub, newsub, (size_t)len);
6510 /* interpret tilde */
6511 memmove(tmpsub + len, reg_prev_sub, (size_t)prevlen);
6512 /* copy postfix */
6513 if (!magic)
6514 ++p; /* back off \ */
6515 STRCPY(tmpsub + len + prevlen, p + 1)strcpy((char *)(tmpsub + len + prevlen), (char *)(p + 1));
6516
6517 if (newsub != source) /* already allocated newsub */
6518 xfree(newsub);
6519 newsub = tmpsub;
6520 p = newsub + len + prevlen;
6521 } else if (magic)
6522 STRMOVE(p, p + 1)memmove((p), (p + 1), strlen((char *)(p + 1)) + 1); /* remove '~' */
6523 else
6524 STRMOVE(p, p + 2)memmove((p), (p + 2), strlen((char *)(p + 2)) + 1); /* remove '\~' */
6525 --p;
6526 } else {
6527 if (*p == '\\' && p[1]) { // skip escaped characters
6528 p++;
6529 }
6530 p += (*mb_ptr2lenutfc_ptr2len)(p) - 1;
6531 }
6532 }
6533
6534 xfree(reg_prev_sub);
6535 if (newsub != source) /* newsub was allocated, just keep it */
6536 reg_prev_sub = newsub;
6537 else /* no ~ found, need to save newsub */
6538 reg_prev_sub = vim_strsave(newsub);
6539 return newsub;
6540}
6541
6542static bool_Bool can_f_submatch = false0; // true when submatch() can be used
6543
6544// These pointers are used for reg_submatch(). Needed for when the
6545// substitution string is an expression that contains a call to substitute()
6546// and submatch().
6547typedef struct {
6548 regmatch_T *sm_match;
6549 regmmatch_T *sm_mmatch;
6550 linenr_T sm_firstlnum;
6551 linenr_T sm_maxline;
6552 int sm_line_lbr;
6553} regsubmatch_T;
6554
6555static regsubmatch_T rsm; // can only be used when can_f_submatch is true
6556
6557/// Put the submatches in "argv[argskip]" which is a list passed into
6558/// call_func() by vim_regsub_both().
6559static int fill_submatch_list(int argc FUNC_ATTR_UNUSED, typval_T *argv,
6560 int argskip, int argcount)
6561 FUNC_ATTR_NONNULL_ALL
6562{
6563 typval_T *listarg = argv + argskip;
6564
6565 if (argcount == argskip) {
6566 // called function doesn't take a submatches argument
6567 return argskip;
6568 }
6569
6570 // Relies on sl_list to be the first item in staticList10_T.
6571 tv_list_init_static10((staticList10_T *)listarg->vval.v_list);
6572
6573 // There are always 10 list items in staticList10_T.
6574 listitem_T *li = tv_list_first(listarg->vval.v_list);
6575 for (int i = 0; i < 10; i++) {
6576 char_u *s = rsm.sm_match->startp[i];
6577 if (s == NULL((void*)0) || rsm.sm_match->endp[i] == NULL((void*)0)) {
6578 s = NULL((void*)0);
6579 } else {
6580 s = vim_strnsave(s, rsm.sm_match->endp[i] - s);
6581 }
6582 TV_LIST_ITEM_TV(li)(&(li)->li_tv)->v_type = VAR_STRING;
6583 TV_LIST_ITEM_TV(li)(&(li)->li_tv)->vval.v_string = s;
6584 li = TV_LIST_ITEM_NEXT(argv->vval.v_list, li)((li)->li_next);
6585 }
6586 return argskip + 1;
6587}
6588
6589static void clear_submatch_list(staticList10_T *sl)
6590{
6591 TV_LIST_ITER(&sl->sl_list, li, {do { list_T *const l_ = (&sl->sl_list); ; if (l_ != ((
void*)0)) { for ( listitem_T *li = l_->lv_first; li != ((void
*)0); li = li->li_next) { { xfree((&(li)->li_tv)->
vval.v_string); } } } } while (0)
6592 xfree(TV_LIST_ITEM_TV(li)->vval.v_string);do { list_T *const l_ = (&sl->sl_list); ; if (l_ != ((
void*)0)) { for ( listitem_T *li = l_->lv_first; li != ((void
*)0); li = li->li_next) { { xfree((&(li)->li_tv)->
vval.v_string); } } } } while (0)
6593 })do { list_T *const l_ = (&sl->sl_list); ; if (l_ != ((
void*)0)) { for ( listitem_T *li = l_->lv_first; li != ((void
*)0); li = li->li_next) { { xfree((&(li)->li_tv)->
vval.v_string); } } } } while (0);
6594}
6595
6596/// vim_regsub() - perform substitutions after a vim_regexec() or
6597/// vim_regexec_multi() match.
6598///
6599/// If "copy" is true really copy into "dest".
6600/// If "copy" is false nothing is copied, this is just to find out the length
6601/// of the result.
6602///
6603/// If "backslash" is true, a backslash will be removed later, need to double
6604/// them to keep them, and insert a backslash before a CR to avoid it being
6605/// replaced with a line break later.
6606///
6607/// Note: The matched text must not change between the call of
6608/// vim_regexec()/vim_regexec_multi() and vim_regsub()! It would make the back
6609/// references invalid!
6610///
6611/// Returns the size of the replacement, including terminating NUL.
6612int vim_regsub(regmatch_T *rmp, char_u *source, typval_T *expr, char_u *dest,
6613 int copy, int magic, int backslash)
6614{
6615 regexec_T rex_save;
6616 bool_Bool rex_in_use_save = rex_in_use;
6617
6618 if (rex_in_use) {
6619 // Being called recursively, save the state.
6620 rex_save = rex;
6621 }
6622 rex_in_use = true1;
6623
6624 rex.reg_match = rmp;
6625 rex.reg_mmatch = NULL((void*)0);
6626 rex.reg_maxline = 0;
6627 rex.reg_buf = curbuf;
6628 rex.reg_line_lbr = true1;
6629 int result = vim_regsub_both(source, expr, dest, copy, magic, backslash);
6630
6631 rex_in_use = rex_in_use_save;
6632 if (rex_in_use) {
6633 rex = rex_save;
6634 }
6635
6636 return result;
6637}
6638
6639int vim_regsub_multi(regmmatch_T *rmp, linenr_T lnum, char_u *source, char_u *dest, int copy, int magic, int backslash)
6640{
6641 regexec_T rex_save;
6642 bool_Bool rex_in_use_save = rex_in_use;
6643
6644 if (rex_in_use) {
6645 // Being called recursively, save the state.
6646 rex_save = rex;
6647 }
6648 rex_in_use = true1;
6649
6650 rex.reg_match = NULL((void*)0);
6651 rex.reg_mmatch = rmp;
6652 rex.reg_buf = curbuf; // always works on the current buffer!
6653 rex.reg_firstlnum = lnum;
6654 rex.reg_maxline = curbuf->b_ml.ml_line_count - lnum;
6655 rex.reg_line_lbr = false0;
6656 int result = vim_regsub_both(source, NULL((void*)0), dest, copy, magic, backslash);
6657
6658 rex_in_use = rex_in_use_save;
6659 if (rex_in_use) {
6660 rex = rex_save;
6661 }
6662
6663 return result;
6664}
6665
6666static int vim_regsub_both(char_u *source, typval_T *expr, char_u *dest,
6667 int copy, int magic, int backslash)
6668{
6669 char_u *src;
6670 char_u *dst;
6671 char_u *s;
6672 int c;
6673 int cc;
6674 int no = -1;
6675 fptr_T func_all = (fptr_T)NULL((void*)0);
6676 fptr_T func_one = (fptr_T)NULL((void*)0);
6677 linenr_T clnum = 0; /* init for GCC */
6678 int len = 0; /* init for GCC */
6679 static char_u *eval_result = NULL((void*)0);
6680
6681 // We need to keep track of how many backslashes we escape, so that the byte
6682 // counts for `extmark_splice` are correct.
6683 int num_escaped = 0;
6684
6685 // Be paranoid...
6686 if ((source == NULL((void*)0) && expr == NULL((void*)0)) || dest == NULL((void*)0)) {
6687 EMSG(_(e_null))emsg((char_u *)(gettext((char *)(e_null))));
6688 return 0;
6689 }
6690 if (prog_magic_wrong())
6691 return 0;
6692 src = source;
6693 dst = dest;
6694
6695 // When the substitute part starts with "\=" evaluate it as an expression.
6696 if (expr != NULL((void*)0) || (source[0] == '\\' && source[1] == '=')) {
6697 // To make sure that the length doesn't change between checking the
6698 // length and copying the string, and to speed up things, the
6699 // resulting string is saved from the call with "copy" == false to the
6700 // call with "copy" == true.
6701 if (copy) {
6702 if (eval_result != NULL((void*)0)) {
6703 STRCPY(dest, eval_result)strcpy((char *)(dest), (char *)(eval_result));
6704 dst += STRLEN(eval_result)strlen((char *)(eval_result));
6705 XFREE_CLEAR(eval_result)do { void **ptr_ = (void **)&(eval_result); xfree(*ptr_);
*ptr_ = ((void*)0); (void)(*ptr_); } while (0);
6706 }
6707 } else {
6708 const bool_Bool prev_can_f_submatch = can_f_submatch;
6709 regsubmatch_T rsm_save;
6710
6711 xfree(eval_result);
6712
6713 // The expression may contain substitute(), which calls us
6714 // recursively. Make sure submatch() gets the text from the first
6715 // level.
6716 if (can_f_submatch) {
6717 rsm_save = rsm;
6718 }
6719 can_f_submatch = true1;
6720 rsm.sm_match = rex.reg_match;
6721 rsm.sm_mmatch = rex.reg_mmatch;
6722 rsm.sm_firstlnum = rex.reg_firstlnum;
6723 rsm.sm_maxline = rex.reg_maxline;
6724 rsm.sm_line_lbr = rex.reg_line_lbr;
6725
6726 if (expr != NULL((void*)0)) {
6727 typval_T argv[2];
6728 int dummy;
6729 typval_T rettv;
6730 staticList10_T matchList = TV_LIST_STATIC10_INIT{ .sl_list = { .lv_first = ((void*)0), .lv_last = ((void*)0),
.lv_refcount = 0, .lv_len = 0, .lv_watch = ((void*)0), .lv_idx_item
= ((void*)0), .lv_lock = VAR_FIXED, .lv_used_next = ((void*)
0), .lv_used_prev = ((void*)0), }, };
6731
6732 rettv.v_type = VAR_STRING;
6733 rettv.vval.v_string = NULL((void*)0);
6734 argv[0].v_type = VAR_LIST;
6735 argv[0].vval.v_list = &matchList.sl_list;
6736 if (expr->v_type == VAR_FUNC) {
6737 s = expr->vval.v_string;
6738 call_func(s, -1, &rettv, 1, argv,
6739 fill_submatch_list, 0L, 0L, &dummy,
6740 true1, NULL((void*)0), NULL((void*)0));
6741 } else if (expr->v_type == VAR_PARTIAL) {
6742 partial_T *partial = expr->vval.v_partial;
6743
6744 s = partial_name(partial);
6745 call_func(s, -1, &rettv, 1, argv,
6746 fill_submatch_list, 0L, 0L, &dummy,
6747 true1, partial, NULL((void*)0));
6748 }
6749 if (tv_list_len(&matchList.sl_list) > 0) {
6750 // fill_submatch_list() was called.
6751 clear_submatch_list(&matchList);
6752 }
6753 if (rettv.v_type == VAR_UNKNOWN) {
6754 // something failed, no need to report another error
6755 eval_result = NULL((void*)0);
6756 } else {
6757 char buf[NUMBUFLEN];
6758 eval_result = (char_u *)tv_get_string_buf_chk(&rettv, buf);
6759 if (eval_result != NULL((void*)0)) {
6760 eval_result = vim_strsave(eval_result);
6761 }
6762 }
6763 tv_clear(&rettv);
6764 } else {
6765 eval_result = eval_to_string(source + 2, NULL((void*)0), true1);
6766 }
6767
6768 if (eval_result != NULL((void*)0)) {
6769 int had_backslash = false0;
6770
6771 for (s = eval_result; *s != NUL'\000'; MB_PTR_ADV(s)(s += utfc_ptr2len((char_u *)s))) {
6772 // Change NL to CR, so that it becomes a line break,
6773 // unless called from vim_regexec_nl().
6774 // Skip over a backslashed character.
6775 if (*s == NL'\012' && !rsm.sm_line_lbr) {
6776 *s = CAR'\015';
6777 } else if (*s == '\\' && s[1] != NUL'\000') {
6778 s++;
6779 /* Change NL to CR here too, so that this works:
6780 * :s/abc\\\ndef/\="aaa\\\nbbb"/ on text:
6781 * abc\
6782 * def
6783 * Not when called from vim_regexec_nl().
6784 */
6785 if (*s == NL'\012' && !rsm.sm_line_lbr) {
6786 *s = CAR'\015';
6787 }
6788 had_backslash = true1;
6789 }
6790 }
6791 if (had_backslash && backslash) {
6792 /* Backslashes will be consumed, need to double them. */
6793 s = vim_strsave_escaped(eval_result, (char_u *)"\\");
6794 xfree(eval_result);
6795 eval_result = s;
6796 }
6797
6798 dst += STRLEN(eval_result)strlen((char *)(eval_result));
6799 }
6800
6801 can_f_submatch = prev_can_f_submatch;
6802 if (can_f_submatch) {
6803 rsm = rsm_save;
6804 }
6805 }
6806 } else
6807 while ((c = *src++) != NUL'\000') {
6808 if (c == '&' && magic)
6809 no = 0;
6810 else if (c == '\\' && *src != NUL'\000') {
6811 if (*src == '&' && !magic) {
6812 ++src;
6813 no = 0;
6814 } else if ('0' <= *src && *src <= '9') {
6815 no = *src++ - '0';
6816 } else if (vim_strchr((char_u *)"uUlLeE", *src)) {
6817 switch (*src++) {
6818 case 'u': func_one = (fptr_T)do_upper;
6819 continue;
6820 case 'U': func_all = (fptr_T)do_Upper;
6821 continue;
6822 case 'l': func_one = (fptr_T)do_lower;
6823 continue;
6824 case 'L': func_all = (fptr_T)do_Lower;
6825 continue;
6826 case 'e':
6827 case 'E': func_one = func_all = (fptr_T)NULL((void*)0);
6828 continue;
6829 }
6830 }
6831 }
6832 if (no < 0) { /* Ordinary character. */
6833 if (c == K_SPECIAL(0x80) && src[0] != NUL'\000' && src[1] != NUL'\000') {
6834 /* Copy a special key as-is. */
6835 if (copy) {
6836 *dst++ = c;
6837 *dst++ = *src++;
6838 *dst++ = *src++;
6839 } else {
6840 dst += 3;
6841 src += 2;
6842 }
6843 continue;
6844 }
6845
6846 if (c == '\\' && *src != NUL'\000') {
6847 // Check for abbreviations -- webb
6848 switch (*src) {
6849 case 'r': c = CAR'\015'; ++src; break;
6850 case 'n': c = NL'\012'; ++src; break;
6851 case 't': c = TAB'\011'; ++src; break;
6852 // Oh no! \e already has meaning in subst pat :-(
6853 // case 'e': c = ESC; ++src; break;
6854 case 'b': c = Ctrl_H8; ++src; break;
6855
6856 // If "backslash" is true the backslash will be removed
6857 // later. Used to insert a literal CR.
6858 default:
6859 if (backslash) {
6860 num_escaped += 1;
6861 if (copy) {
6862 *dst = '\\';
6863 }
6864 dst++;
6865 }
6866 c = *src++;
6867 }
6868 } else {
6869 c = utf_ptr2char(src - 1);
6870 }
6871 // Write to buffer, if copy is set.
6872 if (func_one != NULL((void*)0)) {
6873 func_one = (fptr_T)(func_one(&cc, c));
6874 } else if (func_all != NULL((void*)0)) {
6875 func_all = (fptr_T)(func_all(&cc, c));
6876 } else {
6877 // just copy
6878 cc = c;
6879 }
6880
6881 int totlen = utfc_ptr2len(src - 1);
6882
6883 if (copy) {
6884 utf_char2bytes(cc, dst);
6885 }
6886 dst += utf_char2len(cc) - 1;
6887 int clen = utf_ptr2len(src - 1);
6888
6889 // If the character length is shorter than "totlen", there
6890 // are composing characters; copy them as-is.
6891 if (clen < totlen) {
6892 if (copy) {
6893 memmove(dst + 1, src - 1 + clen, (size_t)(totlen - clen));
6894 }
6895 dst += totlen - clen;
6896 }
6897 src += totlen - 1;
6898 dst++;
6899 } else {
6900 if (REG_MULTI(rex.reg_match == ((void*)0))) {
6901 clnum = rex.reg_mmatch->startpos[no].lnum;
6902 if (clnum < 0 || rex.reg_mmatch->endpos[no].lnum < 0) {
6903 s = NULL((void*)0);
6904 } else {
6905 s = reg_getline(clnum) + rex.reg_mmatch->startpos[no].col;
6906 if (rex.reg_mmatch->endpos[no].lnum == clnum) {
6907 len = rex.reg_mmatch->endpos[no].col
6908 - rex.reg_mmatch->startpos[no].col;
6909 } else {
6910 len = (int)STRLEN(s)strlen((char *)(s));
6911 }
6912 }
6913 } else {
6914 s = rex.reg_match->startp[no];
6915 if (rex.reg_match->endp[no] == NULL((void*)0)) {
6916 s = NULL((void*)0);
6917 } else {
6918 len = (int)(rex.reg_match->endp[no] - s);
6919 }
6920 }
6921 if (s != NULL((void*)0)) {
6922 for (;; ) {
6923 if (len == 0) {
6924 if (REG_MULTI(rex.reg_match == ((void*)0))) {
6925 if (rex.reg_mmatch->endpos[no].lnum == clnum) {
6926 break;
6927 }
6928 if (copy) {
6929 *dst = CAR'\015';
6930 }
6931 dst++;
6932 s = reg_getline(++clnum);
6933 if (rex.reg_mmatch->endpos[no].lnum == clnum) {
6934 len = rex.reg_mmatch->endpos[no].col;
6935 } else {
6936 len = (int)STRLEN(s)strlen((char *)(s));
6937 }
6938 } else {
6939 break;
6940 }
6941 } else if (*s == NUL'\000') { // we hit NUL.
6942 if (copy) {
6943 IEMSG(_(e_re_damg))iemsg((const char *)(gettext((char *)(e_re_damg))));
6944 }
6945 goto exit;
6946 } else {
6947 if (backslash && (*s == CAR'\015' || *s == '\\')) {
6948 /*
6949 * Insert a backslash in front of a CR, otherwise
6950 * it will be replaced by a line break.
6951 * Number of backslashes will be halved later,
6952 * double them here.
6953 */
6954 if (copy) {
6955 dst[0] = '\\';
6956 dst[1] = *s;
6957 }
6958 dst += 2;
6959 } else {
6960 c = utf_ptr2char(s);
6961
6962 if (func_one != (fptr_T)NULL((void*)0))
6963 /* Turbo C complains without the typecast */
6964 func_one = (fptr_T)(func_one(&cc, c));
6965 else if (func_all != (fptr_T)NULL((void*)0))
6966 /* Turbo C complains without the typecast */
6967 func_all = (fptr_T)(func_all(&cc, c));
6968 else /* just copy */
6969 cc = c;
6970
6971 {
6972 int l;
6973
6974 // Copy composing characters separately, one
6975 // at a time.
6976 l = utf_ptr2len(s) - 1;
6977
6978 s += l;
6979 len -= l;
6980 if (copy) {
6981 utf_char2bytes(cc, dst);
6982 }
6983 dst += utf_char2len(cc) - 1;
6984 }
6985 dst++;
6986 }
6987
6988 ++s;
6989 --len;
6990 }
6991 }
6992 }
6993 no = -1;
6994 }
6995 }
6996 if (copy)
6997 *dst = NUL'\000';
6998
6999exit:
7000 return (int)((dst - dest) + 1 - num_escaped);
7001}
7002
7003
7004/*
7005 * Call reg_getline() with the line numbers from the submatch. If a
7006 * substitute() was used the reg_maxline and other values have been
7007 * overwritten.
7008 */
7009static char_u *reg_getline_submatch(linenr_T lnum)
7010{
7011 char_u *s;
7012 linenr_T save_first = rex.reg_firstlnum;
7013 linenr_T save_max = rex.reg_maxline;
7014
7015 rex.reg_firstlnum = rsm.sm_firstlnum;
7016 rex.reg_maxline = rsm.sm_maxline;
7017
7018 s = reg_getline(lnum);
7019
7020 rex.reg_firstlnum = save_first;
7021 rex.reg_maxline = save_max;
7022 return s;
7023}
7024
7025/*
7026 * Used for the submatch() function: get the string from the n'th submatch in
7027 * allocated memory.
7028 * Returns NULL when not in a ":s" command and for a non-existing submatch.
7029 */
7030char_u *reg_submatch(int no)
7031{
7032 char_u *retval = NULL((void*)0);
7033 char_u *s;
7034 int round;
7035 linenr_T lnum;
7036
7037 if (!can_f_submatch || no < 0)
7038 return NULL((void*)0);
7039
7040 if (rsm.sm_match == NULL((void*)0)) {
7041 ssize_t len;
7042
7043 /*
7044 * First round: compute the length and allocate memory.
7045 * Second round: copy the text.
7046 */
7047 for (round = 1; round <= 2; round++) {
7048 lnum = rsm.sm_mmatch->startpos[no].lnum;
7049 if (lnum < 0 || rsm.sm_mmatch->endpos[no].lnum < 0) {
7050 return NULL((void*)0);
7051 }
7052
7053 s = reg_getline_submatch(lnum);
7054 if (s == NULL((void*)0)) { // anti-crash check, cannot happen?
7055 break;
7056 }
7057 s += rsm.sm_mmatch->startpos[no].col;
7058 if (rsm.sm_mmatch->endpos[no].lnum == lnum) {
7059 // Within one line: take form start to end col.
7060 len = rsm.sm_mmatch->endpos[no].col - rsm.sm_mmatch->startpos[no].col;
7061 if (round == 2) {
7062 STRLCPY(retval, s, len + 1)xstrlcpy((char *)(retval), (char *)(s), (size_t)(len + 1));
7063 }
7064 len++;
7065 } else {
7066 // Multiple lines: take start line from start col, middle
7067 // lines completely and end line up to end col.
7068 len = (ssize_t)STRLEN(s)strlen((char *)(s));
7069 if (round == 2) {
7070 STRCPY(retval, s)strcpy((char *)(retval), (char *)(s));
7071 retval[len] = '\n';
7072 }
7073 len++;
7074 lnum++;
7075 while (lnum < rsm.sm_mmatch->endpos[no].lnum) {
7076 s = reg_getline_submatch(lnum++);
7077 if (round == 2)
7078 STRCPY(retval + len, s)strcpy((char *)(retval + len), (char *)(s));
7079 len += STRLEN(s)strlen((char *)(s));
7080 if (round == 2)
7081 retval[len] = '\n';
7082 ++len;
7083 }
7084 if (round == 2) {
7085 STRNCPY(retval + len, reg_getline_submatch(lnum),strncpy((char *)(retval + len), (char *)(reg_getline_submatch
(lnum)), (size_t)(rsm.sm_mmatch->endpos[no].col))
7086 rsm.sm_mmatch->endpos[no].col)strncpy((char *)(retval + len), (char *)(reg_getline_submatch
(lnum)), (size_t)(rsm.sm_mmatch->endpos[no].col));
7087 }
7088 len += rsm.sm_mmatch->endpos[no].col;
7089 if (round == 2) {
7090 retval[len] = NUL'\000'; // -V595
7091 }
7092 len++;
7093 }
7094
7095 if (retval == NULL((void*)0)) {
7096 retval = xmalloc(len);
7097 }
7098 }
7099 } else {
7100 s = rsm.sm_match->startp[no];
7101 if (s == NULL((void*)0) || rsm.sm_match->endp[no] == NULL((void*)0)) {
7102 retval = NULL((void*)0);
7103 } else {
7104 retval = vim_strnsave(s, rsm.sm_match->endp[no] - s);
7105 }
7106 }
7107
7108 return retval;
7109}
7110
7111// Used for the submatch() function with the optional non-zero argument: get
7112// the list of strings from the n'th submatch in allocated memory with NULs
7113// represented in NLs.
7114// Returns a list of allocated strings. Returns NULL when not in a ":s"
7115// command, for a non-existing submatch and for any error.
7116list_T *reg_submatch_list(int no)
7117{
7118 if (!can_f_submatch || no < 0) {
7119 return NULL((void*)0);
7120 }
7121
7122 linenr_T slnum;
7123 linenr_T elnum;
7124 list_T *list;
7125 const char *s;
7126
7127 if (rsm.sm_match == NULL((void*)0)) {
7128 slnum = rsm.sm_mmatch->startpos[no].lnum;
7129 elnum = rsm.sm_mmatch->endpos[no].lnum;
7130 if (slnum < 0 || elnum < 0) {
7131 return NULL((void*)0);
7132 }
7133
7134 colnr_T scol = rsm.sm_mmatch->startpos[no].col;
7135 colnr_T ecol = rsm.sm_mmatch->endpos[no].col;
7136
7137 list = tv_list_alloc(elnum - slnum + 1);
7138
7139 s = (const char *)reg_getline_submatch(slnum) + scol;
7140 if (slnum == elnum) {
7141 tv_list_append_string(list, s, ecol - scol);
7142 } else {
7143 tv_list_append_string(list, s, -1);
7144 for (int i = 1; i < elnum - slnum; i++) {
7145 s = (const char *)reg_getline_submatch(slnum + i);
7146 tv_list_append_string(list, s, -1);
7147 }
7148 s = (const char *)reg_getline_submatch(elnum);
7149 tv_list_append_string(list, s, ecol);
7150 }
7151 } else {
7152 s = (const char *)rsm.sm_match->startp[no];
7153 if (s == NULL((void*)0) || rsm.sm_match->endp[no] == NULL((void*)0)) {
7154 return NULL((void*)0);
7155 }
7156 list = tv_list_alloc(1);
7157 tv_list_append_string(list, s, (const char *)rsm.sm_match->endp[no] - s);
7158 }
7159
7160 tv_list_ref(list);
7161 return list;
7162}
7163
7164static regengine_T bt_regengine =
7165{
7166 bt_regcomp,
7167 bt_regfree,
7168 bt_regexec_nl,
7169 bt_regexec_multi,
7170 (char_u *)""
7171};
7172
7173
7174// XXX Do not allow headers generator to catch definitions from regexp_nfa.c
7175#ifndef DO_NOT_DEFINE_EMPTY_ATTRIBUTES
7176# include "nvim/regexp_nfa.c"
7177#endif
7178
7179static regengine_T nfa_regengine =
7180{
7181 nfa_regcomp,
7182 nfa_regfree,
7183 nfa_regexec_nl,
7184 nfa_regexec_multi,
7185 (char_u *)""
7186};
7187
7188/* Which regexp engine to use? Needed for vim_regcomp().
7189 * Must match with 'regexpengine'. */
7190static int regexp_engine = 0;
7191
7192#ifdef REGEXP_DEBUG
7193static char_u regname[][30] = {
7194 "AUTOMATIC Regexp Engine",
7195 "BACKTRACKING Regexp Engine",
7196 "NFA Regexp Engine"
7197};
7198#endif
7199
7200/*
7201 * Compile a regular expression into internal code.
7202 * Returns the program in allocated memory.
7203 * Use vim_regfree() to free the memory.
7204 * Returns NULL for an error.
7205 */
7206regprog_T *vim_regcomp(char_u *expr_arg, int re_flags)
7207{
7208 regprog_T *prog = NULL((void*)0);
7209 char_u *expr = expr_arg;
7210 int save_called_emsg;
7211
7212 regexp_engine = p_re;
7213
7214 /* Check for prefix "\%#=", that sets the regexp engine */
7215 if (STRNCMP(expr, "\\%#=", 4)strncmp((char *)(expr), (char *)("\\%#="), (size_t)(4)) == 0) {
7216 int newengine = expr[4] - '0';
7217
7218 if (newengine == AUTOMATIC_ENGINE0
7219 || newengine == BACKTRACKING_ENGINE1
7220 || newengine == NFA_ENGINE2) {
7221 regexp_engine = expr[4] - '0';
7222 expr += 5;
7223#ifdef REGEXP_DEBUG
7224 smsg("New regexp mode selected (%d): %s",
7225 regexp_engine,
7226 regname[newengine]);
7227#endif
7228 } else {
7229 EMSG(_(emsg((char_u *)(gettext((char *)("E864: \\%#= can only be followed by 0, 1, or 2. The automatic engine will be used "
))))
7230 "E864: \\%#= can only be followed by 0, 1, or 2. The automatic engine will be used "))emsg((char_u *)(gettext((char *)("E864: \\%#= can only be followed by 0, 1, or 2. The automatic engine will be used "
))));
7231 regexp_engine = AUTOMATIC_ENGINE0;
7232 }
7233 }
7234#ifdef REGEXP_DEBUG
7235 bt_regengine.expr = expr;
7236 nfa_regengine.expr = expr;
7237#endif
7238 // reg_iswordc() uses rex.reg_buf
7239 rex.reg_buf = curbuf;
7240
7241 //
7242 // First try the NFA engine, unless backtracking was requested.
7243 //
7244 save_called_emsg = called_emsg;
7245 called_emsg = false0;
7246 if (regexp_engine != BACKTRACKING_ENGINE1) {
7247 prog = nfa_regengine.regcomp(expr,
7248 re_flags + (regexp_engine == AUTOMATIC_ENGINE0 ? RE_AUTO8 : 0));
7249 } else {
7250 prog = bt_regengine.regcomp(expr, re_flags);
7251 }
7252
7253 // Check for error compiling regexp with initial engine.
7254 if (prog == NULL((void*)0)) {
7255#ifdef BT_REGEXP_DEBUG_LOG
7256 // Debugging log for BT engine.
7257 if (regexp_engine != BACKTRACKING_ENGINE1) {
7258 FILE *f = fopen(BT_REGEXP_DEBUG_LOG_NAME, "a");
7259 if (f) {
7260 fprintf(f, "Syntax error in \"%s\"\n", expr);
7261 fclose(f);
7262 } else
7263 EMSG2("(NFA) Could not open \"%s\" to write !!!",emsgf((const char *) ("(NFA) Could not open \"%s\" to write !!!"
), (BT_REGEXP_DEBUG_LOG_NAME))
7264 BT_REGEXP_DEBUG_LOG_NAME)emsgf((const char *) ("(NFA) Could not open \"%s\" to write !!!"
), (BT_REGEXP_DEBUG_LOG_NAME));
7265 }
7266#endif
7267 // If the NFA engine failed, try the backtracking engine. The NFA engine
7268 // also fails for patterns that it can't handle well but are still valid
7269 // patterns, thus a retry should work.
7270 // But don't try if an error message was given.
7271 if (regexp_engine == AUTOMATIC_ENGINE0 && !called_emsg) {
7272 regexp_engine = BACKTRACKING_ENGINE1;
7273 report_re_switch(expr);
7274 prog = bt_regengine.regcomp(expr, re_flags);
7275 }
7276 }
7277 called_emsg |= save_called_emsg;
7278
7279 if (prog != NULL((void*)0)) {
7280 // Store the info needed to call regcomp() again when the engine turns out
7281 // to be very slow when executing it.
7282 prog->re_engine = regexp_engine;
7283 prog->re_flags = re_flags;
7284 }
7285
7286 return prog;
7287}
7288
7289/*
7290 * Free a compiled regexp program, returned by vim_regcomp().
7291 */
7292void vim_regfree(regprog_T *prog)
7293{
7294 if (prog != NULL((void*)0))
7295 prog->engine->regfree(prog);
7296}
7297
7298static void report_re_switch(char_u *pat)
7299{
7300 if (p_verbose > 0) {
7301 verbose_enter();
7302 MSG_PUTS(_("Switching to backtracking RE engine for pattern: "))msg_puts((const char *)(gettext((char *)("Switching to backtracking RE engine for pattern: "
))));
7303 MSG_PUTS(pat)msg_puts((const char *)(pat));
7304 verbose_leave();
7305 }
7306}
7307
7308/// Matches a regexp against a string.
7309/// "rmp->regprog" is a compiled regexp as returned by vim_regcomp().
7310/// Note: "rmp->regprog" may be freed and changed.
7311/// Uses curbuf for line count and 'iskeyword'.
7312/// When "nl" is true consider a "\n" in "line" to be a line break.
7313///
7314/// @param rmp
7315/// @param line the string to match against
7316/// @param col the column to start looking for match
7317/// @param nl
7318///
7319/// @return true if there is a match, false if not.
7320static bool_Bool vim_regexec_string(regmatch_T *rmp, char_u *line, colnr_T col,
7321 bool_Bool nl)
7322{
7323 regexec_T rex_save;
7324 bool_Bool rex_in_use_save = rex_in_use;
7325
7326 // Cannot use the same prog recursively, it contains state.
7327 if (rmp->regprog->re_in_use) {
7328 EMSG(_(e_recursive))emsg((char_u *)(gettext((char *)(e_recursive))));
7329 return false0;
7330 }
7331 rmp->regprog->re_in_use = true1;
7332
7333 if (rex_in_use) {
7334 // Being called recursively, save the state.
7335 rex_save = rex;
7336 }
7337 rex_in_use = true1;
7338
7339 rex.reg_startp = NULL((void*)0);
7340 rex.reg_endp = NULL((void*)0);
7341 rex.reg_startpos = NULL((void*)0);
7342 rex.reg_endpos = NULL((void*)0);
7343
7344 int result = rmp->regprog->engine->regexec_nl(rmp, line, col, nl);
7345 rmp->regprog->re_in_use = false0;
7346
7347 // NFA engine aborted because it's very slow, use backtracking engine instead.
7348 if (rmp->regprog->re_engine == AUTOMATIC_ENGINE0
7349 && result == NFA_TOO_EXPENSIVE-1) {
7350 int save_p_re = p_re;
7351 int re_flags = rmp->regprog->re_flags;
7352 char_u *pat = vim_strsave(((nfa_regprog_T *)rmp->regprog)->pattern);
7353
7354 p_re = BACKTRACKING_ENGINE1;
7355 vim_regfree(rmp->regprog);
7356 report_re_switch(pat);
7357 rmp->regprog = vim_regcomp(pat, re_flags);
7358 if (rmp->regprog != NULL((void*)0)) {
7359 rmp->regprog->re_in_use = true1;
7360 result = rmp->regprog->engine->regexec_nl(rmp, line, col, nl);
7361 rmp->regprog->re_in_use = false0;
7362 }
7363
7364 xfree(pat);
7365 p_re = save_p_re;
7366 }
7367
7368 rex_in_use = rex_in_use_save;
7369 if (rex_in_use) {
7370 rex = rex_save;
7371 }
7372
7373 return result > 0;
7374}
7375
7376// Note: "*prog" may be freed and changed.
7377// Return true if there is a match, false if not.
7378bool_Bool vim_regexec_prog(regprog_T **prog, bool_Bool ignore_case, char_u *line,
7379 colnr_T col)
7380{
7381 regmatch_T regmatch = { .regprog = *prog, .rm_ic = ignore_case };
7382 bool_Bool r = vim_regexec_string(&regmatch, line, col, false0);
7383 *prog = regmatch.regprog;
7384 return r;
7385}
7386
7387// Note: "rmp->regprog" may be freed and changed.
7388// Return true if there is a match, false if not.
7389bool_Bool vim_regexec(regmatch_T *rmp, char_u *line, colnr_T col)
7390{
7391 return vim_regexec_string(rmp, line, col, false0);
7392}
7393
7394// Like vim_regexec(), but consider a "\n" in "line" to be a line break.
7395// Note: "rmp->regprog" may be freed and changed.
7396// Return true if there is a match, false if not.
7397bool_Bool vim_regexec_nl(regmatch_T *rmp, char_u *line, colnr_T col)
7398{
7399 return vim_regexec_string(rmp, line, col, true1);
7400}
7401
7402/// Match a regexp against multiple lines.
7403/// "rmp->regprog" must be a compiled regexp as returned by vim_regcomp().
7404/// Note: "rmp->regprog" may be freed and changed, even set to NULL.
7405/// Uses curbuf for line count and 'iskeyword'.
7406///
7407/// Return zero if there is no match. Return number of lines contained in the
7408/// match otherwise.
7409long vim_regexec_multi(
7410 regmmatch_T *rmp,
7411 win_T *win, // window in which to search or NULL
7412 buf_T *buf, // buffer in which to search
7413 linenr_T lnum, // nr of line to start looking for match
7414 colnr_T col, // column to start looking for match
7415 proftime_T *tm, // timeout limit or NULL
7416 int *timed_out // flag is set when timeout limit reached
7417)
7418 FUNC_ATTR_NONNULL_ARG(1)
7419{
7420 regexec_T rex_save;
7421 bool_Bool rex_in_use_save = rex_in_use;
7422
7423 // Cannot use the same prog recursively, it contains state.
7424 if (rmp->regprog->re_in_use) {
7425 EMSG(_(e_recursive))emsg((char_u *)(gettext((char *)(e_recursive))));
7426 return false0;
7427 }
7428 rmp->regprog->re_in_use = true1;
7429
7430 if (rex_in_use) {
7431 // Being called recursively, save the state.
7432 rex_save = rex;
7433 }
7434 rex_in_use = true1;
7435
7436 int result = rmp->regprog->engine->regexec_multi(rmp, win, buf, lnum, col,
7437 tm, timed_out);
7438 rmp->regprog->re_in_use = false0;
7439
7440 // NFA engine aborted because it's very slow, use backtracking engine instead.
7441 if (rmp->regprog->re_engine == AUTOMATIC_ENGINE0
7442 && result == NFA_TOO_EXPENSIVE-1) {
7443 int save_p_re = p_re;
7444 int re_flags = rmp->regprog->re_flags;
7445 char_u *pat = vim_strsave(((nfa_regprog_T *)rmp->regprog)->pattern);
7446
7447 p_re = BACKTRACKING_ENGINE1;
7448 vim_regfree(rmp->regprog);
7449 report_re_switch(pat);
7450 // checking for \z misuse was already done when compiling for NFA,
7451 // allow all here
7452 reg_do_extmatch = REX_ALL(1 | 2);
7453 rmp->regprog = vim_regcomp(pat, re_flags);
7454 reg_do_extmatch = 0;
7455
7456 if (rmp->regprog != NULL((void*)0)) {
7457 rmp->regprog->re_in_use = true1;
7458 result = rmp->regprog->engine->regexec_multi(rmp, win, buf, lnum, col,
7459 tm, timed_out);
7460 rmp->regprog->re_in_use = false0;
7461 }
7462
7463 xfree(pat);
7464 p_re = save_p_re;
7465 }
7466
7467 rex_in_use = rex_in_use_save;
7468 if (rex_in_use) {
7469 rex = rex_save;
7470 }
7471
7472 return result <= 0 ? 0 : result;
7473}
